results.title: Wearable device
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a wearable device, which comprises a device body, a circuit board and a conductive button assembly. One side of the device body has a contact surface. When the wearable device is worn by the user, the contact surface is used to contact and electrically connect to the user. The circuit board is arranged in the device body and electrically connected to the contact surface. The conductive button assembly includes a conductive body and Insulation part, the conductive body can move through the button hole along the first direction, one end of the conductive body has a touch surface facing the outside of the device body, and the other end of the conductive body extends to the inside of the device body to be electrically connected to the circuit board, insulating The insulating part is fixedly sleeved on at least part of the outer circumference of the conductive body, and the outer circumference of the insulating part is slidably connected to the device body along a first direction, wherein the first direction is the direction in which the conductive key assembly is pressed. The conductive button assembly can not only realize the button function, but also be used as an electrode, so that the structure of the wearable device is more compact.
results.owner: 上海闻泰信息技术有限公司

results.title: Ring type wearable device
results.abstract: A wearable ring wearable device is disclosed. A ring-type wearable device comprising: an outer ring member; An inner ring member detachably inserted into the outer ring member; A sensor unit disposed on the outer ring member; And a control unit disposed on the outer ring member and electrically connected to the sensor unit, wherein the sensor unit can maintain a predetermined sensing sensitivity corresponding to the thickness of the inner ring member.

results.title: Finger-ring monitoring device and monitoring system
results.abstract: Disclosed are a finger-ring monitoring device and a monitoring system. The finger-ring monitoring device comprises: a housing, a battery, and a circuit board assembly. The housing comprises a ring portion and a protrusion. The inner space of the ring portion is used for accommodating the battery, and the inner space of the protrusion is used for accommodating the circuit board assembly; the battery is used for powering the circuit board assembly; the circuit board assembly comprises a processing unit and a monitoring unit; the monitoring unit is used for obtaining physiological parameter data of a wearer, and the processing unit is used for performing a corresponding operation according to the obtained physiological parameter data.

results.title: Locking mechanism for wearable device components
results.abstract: A wearable device (500) including a locking mechanism for components of the wearable device is described. The device is a wearable ring device including a ring-shaped housing (505) configured to house one or more sensors configured to acquire physiological data from a user, and a flexible printed circuit board PCB (515) including electrical circuitry for the one or more sensors. The wearable ring device includes one or more locking grooves (510) disposed within an interior surface of the ring-shaped housing (505), the one or more locking grooves (510) configured to receive the flexible PCB (515) and to maintain a gap (520) between an inner circumferential surface (535) of the ring-shaped housing (505) and a first surface of the flexible PCB (515). This ensures a defined position of the flexible PCB (515) within the device (500) and also provides for shock absorption between the PCB (515) and the housing (505).

results.title: Method for controlling digital equipment by using ring and ring
results.abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of wearing, and discloses a finger ring which comprises a shell assembly, a circuit board, a battery, a magnetic absorption charging assembly and an electrode plate, wherein the shell assembly comprises a shell outer ring and a shell inner ring, the outer side of the shell inner ring is directly sleeved on a finger of a user, a cavity formed by buckling the shell outer ring and the shell inner ring accommodates the circuit board, the battery, the magnetic absorption charging assembly and the electrode plate, the electrode plate is electrically connected with the circuit board and the battery, the electrode plate is distributed on the inner side of the shell outer ring, the electrode plate can sense a gesture acted on a surface touch area of the shell outer ring by the user, and the circuit board is connected with a wireless receiving; the power management module is electrically connected with the magnetic charging assembly, the surface of the inner ring of the shell is provided with a charging groove, and the magnetic charging assembly is arranged in the charging groove. Have magnetism and inhale functions such as charging, intelligent bluetooth connection and control external electronic equipment.
results.owner: 深圳市大摩登科技有限公司

results.title: Ring-type wearable device
results.abstract: A ring-type wearable device is disclosed. The disclosed ring-type wearable device comprises: an outer ring member; an inner ring member separably inserted into the outer ring member; a sensor unit disposed in the outer ring member; and a control unit disposed in the outer ring member so as to be electrically connected to the sensor unit, wherein the sensor unit can maintain constant sensitivity in correspondence to the thickness of the inner ring member.

results.title: Wearable Electronic Devices
results.abstract: The invention discloses a wearable electronic device, which comprises a ring body, a plurality of accommodating grooves, a plurality of circuit boards and a circuit board. A plurality of accommodating grooves are respectively arranged in the ring body. Multiple circuit boards are arranged in multiple accommodating slots, and one circuit board corresponds to one accommodating slot. The circuit board is integrally arranged in the ring and electrically connected to a plurality of circuit boards, so that each circuit board can be electrically connected to each other through the circuit board.
results.owner: 致伸科技股份有限公司

results.title: a wearable device
results.abstract: The invention discloses a wearable device, comprising a device main body and a belt body connected with the device main body. The device main body includes an upper shell and a lower shell that are fixedly connected, a circuit board is arranged in the inner cavity formed by the upper shell and the lower shell, and the upper shell and the lower shell are provided with a circuit board. The shell includes an insulating part and a metal part fixedly connected to at least one end of the insulating part, the metal part is electrically connected with the circuit board and is used as an upper electrode for monitoring biological information; At one end of the lower connecting part, the upper electrode and the lower connecting part are matched and fixedly connected with the belt body. When the user wears the wearable device, since the upper electrode is directly used as part of the upper shell, the user will not touch the upper electrode and the metal shell at the same time, which will cause the test to be inaccurate or impossible to test, which greatly facilitates the user's operation. . In addition, the upper electrode corresponds to the position connected to the belt body, so the upper electrode is less limited by space and has a relatively large size, which further facilitates user operations.

results.title: Wearable electronic device
results.abstract: The invention discloses a wearable electronic device comprising a ring body, a plurality of receiving slots, a plurality of circuit boards and a circuit board. The plurality of accommodating grooves are respectively disposed in the ring body. The plurality of circuit boards are disposed in the plurality of receiving slots, and one of the circuit boards corresponds to one of the receiving slots. The circuit board is integrally formed in the ring body and electrically connected to the plurality of circuit boards, so that each of the circuit boards can be electrically connected to each other through the circuit board.
results.owner: 致伸科技股份有限公司

results.title: wearable ring
results.abstract: The application discloses a wearable finger ring, belonging to the technical field of wearable devices, comprising: a power source, a first brush head, a second brush head; a first casing and a second casing, the first brush head is disposed at a On the inner surface of the first shell, the second brush head is arranged on the outer surface of the second shell, the first shell and the second shell are movably connected, and the first brush A conductive path is formed between the head and the second brush head through the first housing and the second housing; a control module, the control module is connected with the conductive path; wherein, the control module is located in the When the first casing moves relative to the second casing, the position information of the first brush head and the current change information in the conductive path are obtained, and according to the position information and the current change information, and output target commands to control electronic equipment. The wearable ring can conveniently output target commands for controlling electronic devices.
results.owner: 维沃移动通信有限公司

results.title: Flexible Input Device Worn on a Finger
results.abstract: Methods and apparatus are directed to an input device including a wearable ring shaped component that is supported on a finger and located between a finger tip and a knuckle of the wearer. The wearable component comprises a touch pad device that is located on an outward surface of the wearable ring shaped component. The touch pad device is contacted to provide an input command. The wearable component includes a transmitter to transmit the input command.

results.title: Wearable electronic device with interface
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device is disclosed. The wearable electronic device comprises a ring body and a substrate. The ring body has an outer cover and an interface disposed on an exterior of the outer cover, with the ring body defining an annular receiving space within the ring body. The substrate is disposed in the annular receiving space and has a plurality of capacitive plates.

results.title: Wearables and Wearables Components
results.abstract: The present application discloses a wearable device and a wearable device assembly. The wearable device includes: a casing, an adapter, a conductive member, a movable assembly, and a sensing assembly; the casing has a wearing surface, and the wearing surface is used to communicate with the wearer's skin. contact; the first end of the adapter is exposed on the wearing surface, the second end of the adapter is set in the casing, and the second end of the adapter is connected with the sensing component; the movable component and the conductive member are set in the casing, and the movable The component is connected to the conductive member for driving the conductive member to be electrically connected or separated from the second end of the adapter; wherein, when the wearable device is in a charged state, the conductive member is electrically connected to the adapter; when the wearable device is in a charged state, the conductive member is electrically connected to the adapter In the wearing state, the conductive member is separated from the adapter, and the sensing component acquires the wearer's physiological parameters through the adapter.
results.owner: 维沃移动通信有限公司

results.title: Rings and ring manufacturing systems
results.abstract: The present invention relates to a ring that fits for each wearer in accordance with a part where the wearer wears the ring, and a manufacturing system for the ring.   A ring 1 according to the present invention is characterized in that an outer peripheral surface shape of a ring mounting portion of a wearer's finger F is measured, and an inner peripheral wall surface is formed along the obtained shape. In addition, the ring manufacturing system of the present invention includes a measuring device 10, 10 ′ for measuring the outer peripheral surface shape of the ring wearing portion of the wearer's finger F, and at least along the shape obtained by the measuring devices 10, 10 ′. And a ring manufacturing apparatus 20 that forms an inner peripheral wall surface.   [Selection diagram] Fig. 1

results.title: Smart ring and method of making the same
results.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of wearable products, and discloses a smart finger ring and a manufacturing method thereof. The smart finger ring comprises a casing, a soft glue part, a circuit module and a power supply module, wherein the casing is provided with a ring groove with a notch, and the soft glue part is provided with a ring groove. It is filled in the ring groove and has an integral structure with the shell. The soft rubber part is enclosed with the groove wall of the ring groove to form a closed installation space. Part of the structure of the soft rubber part protrudes from the notch of the ring groove. Located in the above-mentioned installation space, the power module is electrically connected with the circuit module. The wearing experience of the smart ring proposed by the present invention is better.

results.title: Biometric sensors integrated with electronic displays of wearable devices
results.abstract: The wearable computing device includes an outer cover defining an outermost top surface and an outer perimeter, and an interior volume defined at least in part by an inner surface of the outer cover. The wearable computing device also includes an electronic display and an electronic display module connector disposed within the interior volume. Additionally, the wearable computing device includes at least one biometric sensor electrode located on the outermost top surface of the outer cover and wrapped around one or more side edges of the outer cover to the interior volume. Additionally, the wearable computing device includes a printed circuit board disposed within the interior volume. Additionally, the wearable computing device includes conductive components that electrically connect the biometric sensor electrodes to the printed circuit board through the electronic display module connector.

results.title: Wearable interactive device, method thereof, and interactive system
results.abstract: The present invention provides a wearable interactive device, a method thereof, and an interactive system. The wearable interactive device includes: a finger ring, which can be put on a first finger; a lower casing, the lower casing has a cavity, and the lower casing A first through hole is arranged on the main board bracket, the main board bracket is accommodated in the cavity, and the finger ring passes through the cavity through the first through hole; the main board, the main board is assembled on the main board bracket; the inertial measurement unit is arranged on the main board, It is used to sense the posture of the first finger and generate output; the upper casing is covered on the main board and is fixedly connected with the lower casing; the touch panel is used to sense the touch action of the second finger on the touch panel and generate output; The function button is used to accept the pressing action of the third finger and generate output; the data processing chip is used to process at least the output of the inertial measurement unit, the touch panel and the function button to generate interactive control instructions, thereby simplifying the interactive device structure and volume, and increase the maneuverability of interaction.
results.owner: 凌宇科技（北京）有限公司

results.title: Biosensors integrated with electronic displays of wearable devices
results.abstract: The wearable computing device includes an outer cover defining an outer circumference with an outermost top surface and an inner volume defined at least in part by an inner surface of the outer cover. The wearable computing device also includes an electronic display and an electronic display module connector disposed within the interior volume. The wearable computing device also includes at least one biosensor electrode positioned over an outermost upper surface of the outer cover and wrapped around one or more side edges of the outer cover to the inner volume. The wearable computing device also includes a printed circuit board arranged within the interior volume. The wearable computing device also includes a conductive component that electrically connects the biosensor electrode(s) to the printed circuit board through the electronic display module connector.

results.title: Wearable electronic device and its components
results.abstract: Embodiments of a wearable electronic device, its components, and related systems and technologies are disclosed herein. For example, a wearable electronic device may include: a wearable support structure having a first surface and a second surface; a first electrode located at the first surface, wherein when the wearable electronic device is When worn by a user on a part of the user's body, the first electrode is configured to contact the skin of the user in the part of the user's body; a first electrode located at the second surface Two electrodes, wherein when the wearable electronic device is worn by a user on the part of the user's body, the second electrode is configured not to contact the use in the part of the user's body And a resistance switch having a first input terminal and a second input terminal respectively coupled to the first electrode and the second electrode. Other embodiments may be disclosed and / or claimed.

results.title: Wearable computing device
results.abstract: The present disclosure describes a wearable computing device (WCD) in the form of a ring that can be worn on the finger of a human user. In one example, a wearable computing device comprises: an interior wall; an exterior wall; a flexible printed circuit board disposed between the interior wall and the exterior wall; at least one component disposed on the flexible printed circuit board; and wherein at least one of the interior wall and the exterior wall defines a window that facilitates at least one of data transmission, battery recharge, and status indication

results.title: Wearable Devices and Electronic Device Components
results.abstract: The present application discloses a wearable device and an electronic device assembly. The above-mentioned wearable device includes: a casing, a circuit board and a fastener; the casing has an accommodating space, and the circuit board is arranged in the accommodating space, The housing is provided with a first mounting hole, the circuit board is provided with a second mounting hole, and the fastener passes through the first mounting hole and is matched with the second mounting hole to attach the The circuit board is fixed on the casing; wherein, the fastener is electrically connected with the charging module of the circuit board.
results.owner: 维沃移动通信有限公司

results.title: Smart Wearables
results.abstract: The present disclosure relates to a smart wearable device, which realizes a stable touch function in the limited space structure of the smart wearable device. The smart wearable device has a casing, and the casing includes an upper casing and a lower casing; a circuit board is arranged inside the casing, and a groove is formed on the circuit board; the inner side of the upper casing has an inner protrusion The inner convex column is adhered with a first conductive part; the inner side of the bottom of the lower shell is adhered with a second conductive part; the groove is arranged opposite to the inner convex column; The upper surface, the lower surface and the inner side are covered with a conductive layer; the first conductive member is in electrical contact with the conductive layer covering the groove, and is in electrical contact with the second conductive member; the outer side of the housing is in contact with the first conductive layer. The area corresponding to the two conductive components is a touch sensing area, which is used for sensing touch.
results.owner: 北京心有灵犀科技有限公司
inventors: THE INVENTOR HAS WAIVED THE RIGHT TO BE MENTIONED

results.title: a smart ring
results.abstract: The utility model provides an intelligent finger ring, comprising: an installation compartment, a circuit board, a main control chip, a motion capture component for detecting the pressing state of a finger on the surface of the finger ring, a battery for supplying power to the above components, and a ring whose length can be adjusted. belt; the motion capture component is located on the outer surface of the endless belt and is connected to the circuit board; the battery and the main control chip are mounted on the circuit board; the battery and the main control chip are installed The circuit board of the chip is located in the mounting compartment. The utility model is a wearable input device, which is more convenient to carry, avoids the problem that the handheld input device is inconvenient to carry, frees the hands, and enables the hands to do more things.
results.owner: 中煤科工集团重庆设计研究院有限公司

results.title: Intelligent wearable apparatus
results.abstract: The present disclosure relates to an intelligent wearable apparatus, achieving stability of a touch function in a limited spatial structure of the intelligent wearable apparatus. The intelligent wearable apparatus has a housing, and the housing comprises an upper casing and a lower casing. A circuit board is disposed within the housing. The circuit board has a recess. An inwardly protruding post is provided at an inner side of the upper casing. A first conductive component is attached to the inwardly protruding post. A second conductive component is attached to an inner side of a bottom portion of the lower casing. The recess is arranged opposite to the inwardly protruding post. An upper surface, a lower surface, and an inner side of the recess are coated with a conductive layer. The first conductive component is in electrical contact with the conductive layer of the recess, and is in electrical contact with the second conductive component. A region at an outer side of the housing, corresponding to the second conductive component, is a touch sensing region used for sensing a touch.
results.owner: 北京心有灵犀科技有限公司

results.title: Automatically reconfigurable antenna circuit for enabling operation within multiple frequency bands
results.abstract: A wearable ring includes an inner surface and an outer surface; a first antenna component and a second antenna component, each disposed between the inner surface and the outer surface; a first electrical circuit connecting a first end portion of the first antenna component with a first end portion of the second antenna component; and a second electrical circuit connecting a second end portion of the first antenna component with a second end portion of the second antenna component, and wherein, based on configuration of the first electrical circuit and the second electrical circuit, the first antenna component and second antenna component are configured to operate in a given frequency band.

results.title: Wearable electronic device and its detection module
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device includes a device body, a wearing component, and a detecting module mounted on the device body; the detecting module defines a detecting surface, and the detecting module is provided with a contact exposed on the detecting surface And the detecting component, the contact component and the detecting component are spaced apart from each other at the detecting surface; the contact component and the detecting component can be electrically connected to each other to implement power-off of the wearable electronic device. With the above design, electrolytic corrosion of the wearable electronic device can be effectively prevented.
results.owner: 鴻騰精密科技股份有限公司

results.title: smart wearable device
results.abstract: The present invention provides a smart wearable device, which includes a wearable body and a battery assembly, the wearable body includes a casing and a main control board disposed in the casing, the casing is provided with a accommodating groove, and the battery assembly includes a battery A casing and a rechargeable battery arranged in the battery casing, the battery casing is detachably accommodated in the accommodating slot, the rechargeable battery is used to provide power to the main control board, and the battery casing After the body is accommodated in the accommodating groove, the outer surface of the battery case and the outer surface of the outer shell are coplanar. When the rechargeable battery in the battery assembly needs to be charged, the battery assembly is removed from the wearable body, and another battery assembly is installed in the placement slot to continuously supply power to the wearable body, so The smart wearable device continuously detects the user's health data.
results.owner: Oppo广东移动通信有限公司

results.title: Electronic equipment and wearable electronic equipment
results.abstract: Embodiments of the present application provide an electronic device and a wearable electronic device. The electronic device includes: a casing frame, the casing frame has an inner cavity and a first through hole, and the first through hole communicates with the inner cavity and the outside of the casing frame. External space; key assembly, the key assembly includes a first conductive member and a second conductive member, the first conductive member is connected to the housing frame, at least part of the first conductive member is located in the external space, and at least part of the second conductive member is located in the first conductive member. In the hole, the first conductive member and the second conductive member are elastically abutted, and the first conductive member and the second conductive member can be electrically connected; The electrical contact portion is electrically connected to the circuit board, and the electrical contact portion abuts an end of the second conductive member away from the first conductive member, so that the first conductive member and the electrical contact portion are electrically connected. The present application provides an electronic device and a key assembly with good impact resistance for a wearable electronic device.
results.owner: Oppo广东移动通信有限公司

results.title: Finger touch contact physical measurement device and wearable equipment
results.abstract: The utility model relates to a body measuring device and a wearable device for finger touch contacts, comprising a casing, the casing includes a face shell, a middle shell and a back shell, and also includes a plurality of ECG metal contacts, a measuring device and a PCB board, The face shell, the middle shell and the back shell form a housing cavity, the plurality of ECG metal contacts are arranged on the face shell and the back shell, the measuring device and the PCB board are fixed in the housing cavity, the The measuring device is connected to the PCB board, and the ECG metal contact is electrically connected to the PCB board. The utility model has the advantages of novel structure, simple operation, good portability and strong applicability, can be used at one touch, can quickly measure data, and can know personal health conditions at any time when worn on the body.
results.owner: 深圳市阿尔法通讯技术有限公司

results.title: Wearable device including moisture permeable structure and manufacturing method for the same
results.abstract: The present invention relates to a wearable device.  A wearable device according to an embodiment of the present invention is a wearable device used by being attached to a user's skin, and includes a housing and a main body including a battery disposed inside the housing, and a plurality of electrodes connected to the battery It includes an electrode part and at least one conductive member electrically connecting the electrode part and the user's skin, and is made by stacking a plurality of layers, and a layer in contact with the user's skin includes a patch part having a plurality of ventilation holes do.

results.title: Wearable electronic devices and their components
results.abstract: Embodiments of wearable electronic devices, components thereof, and related systems and techniques are disclosed herein. For example, a wearable electronic device may include: a wearable support structure having a first surface and a second surface; a first electrode located at the first surface, wherein when the wearable electronic device is worn by a user on the When on a part of the user's body, the first electrode is arranged to contact the user's skin in the part of the user's body; a second electrode located at the second surface, wherein when the When the wearable electronic device is worn by the user on the part of the user's body, the second electrode is arranged not to contact the user's skin in the part of the user's body; and a resistive switch having first and second input terminals coupled to the first and second electrodes, respectively. Other embodiments may also be disclosed and/or claimed.

results.title: An electronic device comprising an antenna
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device according to various embodiments of the present disclosure includes a housing, a conductive patch disposed inside the housing, a printed circuit board (PCB) disposed in the housing, a wireless communication circuit disposed on the PCB, and disposed on the PCB and a first touch sensing circuit electrically connected to the conductive patch, wherein the housing includes a first housing facing the outside of the body and a second housing facing the inside of the body when the electronic device is worn The first housing and the second housing may be combined to form an internal space of the electronic device, and the wireless communication circuit feeds power to a first point spaced apart from the edge of the conductive patch by a predetermined distance or more. Thus, an RF signal of a first frequency band may be received, and the first touch sensing circuit may sense a touch input to the conductive patch.

results.title: Wearable device and manufacturing method therefor
results.abstract: A wearable device and a manufacturing method therefor relate to the technical field of intelligent wearing. The wearable device comprises a surface shell (110), a bottom shell (130) and an electronic component (150); the surface shell (110) and the bottom shell (130) are abutted to each other vertically, and the surface shell (110) and the bottom shell (130) form a waterproof enclosure cavity; the electronic component (150) is enclosed in the cavity; the electronic component (150) comprises a printed circuit board (151) and a battery (152), and a wireless data transceiver component and at least one kind of sensor are provided on the printed circuit board (151). The waterproof cavity containing the wireless data transceiver component is provided in the wearable device, so that the problem of frequent failures of a bracelet due to a USB interface provided compulsorily in the art is solved, and the wearable device can be worn for normal use when a user is in a humid environment or access to water.
results.owner: 小米科技有限责任公司

results.title: A wearable computing device having one or more biometric sensor electrodes on a cover for a display screen
results.abstract: A wearable computing device is provided. A wearable computing device includes a conductive housing and a printed circuit board disposed at least partially within the conductive housing. The wearable computing device further includes a slot antenna defined by a gap between the conductive housing and the printed circuit board. A wearable computing device includes a display screen electrically coupled to a printed circuit board. A wearable computing device includes a cover positioned over a display screen. The cover includes a top surface and a bottom surface. The wearable computing device includes biometric sensor electrodes positioned partially on the top surface of the cover. The biometric sensor at least partially covers the periphery of the cover.

results.title: Wearable computing device having one or more biometric sensor electrodes on a cover for a display screen
results.abstract: A wearable computing device is provided. The wearable computing device includes a conductive housing and a printed circuit board at least partially disposed within the conductive housing. The wearable computing device further includes a slot antenna defined by a gap between the conductive housing and the printed circuit board. The wearable computing device includes a display screen electrically coupled to the printed circuit board. The wearable computing device includes a cover positioned on the display screen. The cover includes a top surface and a bottom surface. The wearable computing device includes a biometric sensor electrode positioned partially on the top surface of the cover. The biometric sensor at least partially wraps around a periphery of the cover.

results.title: wearable electronic devices and components thereof
results.abstract: Patent Summary: "Wearable electronic devices and components thereof". The present invention relates to embodiments of wearable electronic devices, components thereof, and related systems and sets of procedures. for example, a wearable electronic device may include a wearable support structure having a first surface and a second surface; a first electrode located on the first surface, wherein when the wearable electronic device is worn by a wearer over a portion of the wearer's body, the first electrode is arranged to contact the wearer's skin on the wearer's body portion; a second electrode located on the second surface, wherein when the wearable electronic device is worn by a wearer over the user's body portion, the second electrode is arranged so as not to contact the wearer's skin on the wearer's body portion ; and a resistance switch having first and second input terminals coupled to the first and second electrodes, respectively. other embodiments may be described and / or claimed.

results.title: A finger-sized physiological monitoring ring
results.abstract: A physiological monitoring ring suitable for the size of a finger, which includes a monitoring ring body, the monitoring ring body is composed of a ring belt for external decoration and a processing chip ring arranged in the ring belt, wherein the upper part of the processing chip ring is embedded in the ring belt Inside, the contact electrode area below it exposes the ring belt, and the processing chip ring is fixed in the ring belt through the fixing ring arranged outside the processing chip ring. The fixing ring is provided with a plurality of buckles, which are stuck on the ring belt For fixing, a plurality of contact electrode holes are provided at the bottom for placing the contact electrodes on the exposed contact electrode area, and an elastic body is also arranged inside the fixing ring. The utility model has the advantages of simple structure, good user experience, convenient use, comfortable wearing, wide application range and the like.
results.owner: 浙江好络维医疗技术有限公司

results.title: Wearable devices and associated systems
results.abstract: A finger-wearable computing device may comprise a processor, a ring base, and a display screen. The display screen is coupled to the ring base and coupled to the processor to display an output. The display screen includes a command area configured to receive user input from a wearer's thumb while the finger-wearable computing device is worn on a wearer's finger. The ring base may be resiliently flexible and may define an overlapping loop with a central opening that expands and contracts to the fit the wearer's finger. The display screen may be flexibly coupled to the ring base and may have a vertical axis that is canted at an angle relative to a central axis of the ring base to ergonomically position the display screen while the wearable computing device is worn on the finger of the wearer's hand.

results.title: Wearable equipment
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a wearable device, including equipment principal and the area body of being connected with equipment principal, equipment principal includes fixed connection's epitheca and inferior valve, is provided with the circuit board in the inner chamber that epitheca and inferior valve formed, and the epitheca includes insulating part and the metal portion of fixed connection in the at least one end of insulating part, and metal portion is connected with the circuit board electricity and is used as the last electrode that carries out biological information monitoring, and the inferior valve includes with insulating part complex lower main part and the lower connecting portion that is located the at least one end of lower main part, go up electrode and lower connecting portion cooperation and with area body fixed connection. When the user wears the wearable device, the upper electrode is directly used as part of the upper shell, so that the user does not touch the upper electrode and the metal shell simultaneously to cause inaccurate test or failure in test, and great convenience is brought to the user operation. And the upper electrode corresponds to the position connected with the belt body, so that the upper electrode is less limited by space and has a relatively larger size, thereby further facilitating the operation of a user.

results.title: Wearable device including leakage current prevention structure
results.abstract: A wearable device having a leakage current preventing structure is provided. The wearable device includes a case having a structure which is electrically connected to a substrate and included in an internal space of the case and a slot formed in an upper surface of the case and communicating with the internal space, a battery arranged on the structure, a first electrode which is supported at one side of the structure and contacts one surface of the battery, a second electrode which is supported at the other side of the structure and contacts the other surface of the battery, and an insulation sheet that is inserted or removed through the slot and inserted between the battery and the first electrode or between the battery and the second electrode to block a leakage current of the battery.

results.title: Ring Shaped Wearable Device Controller
results.abstract: The present invention provides a control unit formed on the surface of a ring case made of a ring shape to fit on the user's finger, a size adjustment unit formed inside the ring case to be in close contact with the user's finger made of an elastically deformable material, and the user's manipulation of the control unit. It consists of a first sensor that converts an input signal, a second sensor that transmits a position signal of the wearable controller according to the user's movement, and a wireless communication unit that transmits and controls a control signal to the device, and consists of a PCB circuit mounted inside a ring case It relates to a ring-shaped wearable device controller.

results.title: Wearable device and method for manufacturing the same
results.abstract: The present invention relates to a wearable device and a manufacturing method thereof, and belongs to the field of smart wearable technology. The wearable device includes an upper case, a lower case, and an electronic member; The upper case and the lower case abutting up and down, and the upper case and the lower case are surrounded to form a waterproof cavity; The electronic member is installed in the cavity; The electronic member includes a printed circuit board (PCB) and a battery, and the printed circuit board (PCB) is provided with a wireless data transmitting / receiving assembly and at least one sensor. A waterproof inner cavity including a wireless data transmitting and receiving assembly is installed in a wearable device to solve a problem that a bracelet is frequently broken by installing a USB interface among related technologies, The wearable device can still be used normally and the wearable device can be worn.

results.title: A replaceable wear component
results.abstract: The disclosure relates to a replaceable wear component (1) for an industrial accessory (100), wherein the wear component (1) comprises:- an inner wear member (10) comprising an inner wear surface (12),- an outer wear member (20) comprising an outer wear surface (22),- wherein the inner and outerwear members (10, 20) are configured to be releasably attached to each other so that the inner and outerwear surfaces (12, 22) are provided on opposing sides of the wear component (1), and- wherein at least one of the inner and outer wear members (10, 20) further comprises:- a support surface (14, 24) provided on an opposite side with respect to its wear surface (12, 22),- a protruding portion (16, 26) provided on said opposite side, wherein the protruding portion extends away from the support surface (14, 24) and in a direction away from the wear surface (12, 22) of the wear member so that it forms an extension of the wear member, and wherein the protruding portion (16, 26) comprises a mating surface (161, 261) facing away from the wear surface of the wear member, and- wherein the mating surface (161) of the at least one of the inner and outer wear members (10) is adapted to face a corresponding mating surface (261) of the other one of the inner and outer wear members (20) when the inner and outer wear members (10, 20) are attached to each other. The disclosure further relates to an industrial accessory (100, 100').

results.title: Wearable devices and their wearables
results.abstract: The present application discloses a wearable device and a wearing part thereof. The wearing piece includes: a casing, including a first connecting section and a concave section, the concave section is connected to one end of the first connecting section, wherein the concave section is formed with a downward depression in the wearing state; the circuit board is arranged on the inside the casing; the push piece is arranged on the first connecting section and is electrically connected with the circuit board; the battery is arranged on the first connecting section and is electrically connected with the circuit board; the indicator piece is arranged on the concave section and is electrically connected with the circuit board The board is electrically connected, and the battery is located between the push piece and the indicator piece. In the above manner, the layout of each electrical device in the wearing piece provided by the present application is more reasonable, which is beneficial to the miniaturization of the wearing piece.
results.owner: 深圳市韶音科技有限公司

results.title: Finger-wearable devices and associated systems
results.abstract: A finger-wearable computing device may comprise a processor, a ring base, and a display screen. The display screen is coupled to the ring base and coupled to the processor to display an output. The display screen includes a command area configured to receive user input from a wearer's thumb while the finger-wearable computing device is worn on a wearer's finger. The ring base may be resiliently flexible and may define an overlapping loop with a central opening that expands and contracts to fit the wearer's finger. The display screen may be flexibly coupled to the ring base and may have a vertical axis that is canted at an angle relative to a central axis of the ring base to ergonomically position the display screen while the wearable computing device is worn on the finger of the wearer's hand.

results.title: Case for electronic device
results.abstract: Various embodiments of the present invention relate to a case, for example, a case for a wearable electronic device that can be worn on part of the body. According to various embodiments of the present invention, provided is a case for an electronic device for storing a wearable electronic device, the case comprising: a case housing forming a space in which the wearable electronic device is accommodated; a conductive support member disposed inside the case housing; and a contact member that is disposed in the space in which the wearable electronic device is accommodated, exposed to the outside when the case housing is open, electrically connected to the conductive support member, and at least partially in contact with a conductive portion of the wearable electronic device. Various other embodiments may be applied.

results.title: Wearables and Wearable Systems
results.abstract: Embodiments of the present application provide a wearable device and a wearable system. The wearable device includes: a device body; the device body includes a casing and a battery and a motherboard disposed in the casing, and the casing includes a first surface and a second surface opposite to each other. A sensor is arranged on the first surface, a sensor is arranged on the second surface, the main board is connected to the battery, and the sensor is connected to the main board; the first surface and the second surface are connected through a side wall, and a fixing part is arranged on the side wall, and the fixing part is used for The main body of the device is worn on the human body; a first area and a second area are set on the first surface, a heart-lung sound sensor is set in the first area, and a first temperature sensor is set in the second area. Embodiments of the present application provide a wearable device and a wearable system, which can monitor health indicators of different parts of the human body.

results.title: Wearable article with removable module
results.abstract: A system includes a wearable article and a housing assembly including a receptacle defining a chamber and having an access opening providing access to the chamber to removably receive an electronic module within the chamber. The housing assembly further includes first and second contact members each having a contact pad positioned outside the chamber and an arm extending from the contact pad into the chamber to form electrical contacts of an interface exposed to the chamber. Conductive leads are connected to the contact pads to place the leads in electronic communication with the contacts, and bonding the housing assembly to a wearable article. The housing assembly is bonded between top and bottom layers of material forming a portion of the wearable article, such that the layers are bonded to the receptacle by a bonding material. The article has an electrically-powered component, and the leads are connected to the component.

results.title: Coupling pin and wearable electronic device including the same
results.abstract: According to various embodiments disclosed herein, the binding pin is configured to connect the wearing member to the housing of the wearable electronic device, and the binding pin and the wearable electronic device including the binding pin are configured to be accommodated in the wearing member, and at least partially A tube portion having electrical conductivity, a core portion configured to protrude from at least one of both ends of the tube portion to be bound to the housing, at least partially electrically conductive, and adjacent to the tube portion in a state that surrounds at least a portion of the core portion and a sleeve having electrical conductivity, wherein the sleeve is electrically insulated from the core part and the tube part, and at least one of the core part and the sleeve is provided between the wearable member and the housing. It may be configured to transmit a signal. In addition, various embodiments are possible.

results.title: smart ring
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a smart finger ring. The smart finger ring comprises a finger ring shell and a finger ring cover; the finger ring shell is arranged in a ring shape and a wearing hole is formed inside the finger ring shell; The inner peripheral surface of the inner casing is used for the installation of electronic components; the finger ring cover is arranged on the inner peripheral surface of the inner casing to cover the electronic components. Wherein, the outer shell of the finger-ring shell is made of ceramic material; the inner shell of the finger-ring shell is made of plastic material. The smart ring of the utility model can improve the wear resistance of the smart ring to meet people's requirements for wear resistance of the smart ring; the external ceramic and internal plastic material structure can effectively improve the overall strength of the entire shell and improve the anti-fall of the composite structure. performance; at the same time, the built-in plastic body structure has the advantages of lightweight products and improved processing efficiency.

results.title: Intelligent ring
results.abstract: The invention discloses an intelligent ring, which comprises a wearable intelligent ring body and a charging assembly for supplying power; the intelligent ring body comprises an annular shell, the annular shell is provided with a control assembly, and the surface of the annular shell is provided with a charging interface and a touch area which are electrically connected with the control assembly; the annular shell comprises a stainless steel ring and an appearance sealing shell, the appearance sealing shell is provided with first mounting holes used for mounting a charging interface and a touch area respectively, and the stainless steel ring is provided with a second mounting hole used for mounting the charging interface; the control assembly comprises a flexible circuit board arranged between the stainless steel ring and the appearance glue sealing shell, and the flexible circuit board is connected with a Bluetooth chip and a battery. The method has the advantages of strong cruising ability, good compatibility, long communication distance, support of full-duplex wireless two-way communication, large data carrying capacity and the like; the smart phone matched with the smart phone can be controlled through finger touch.
results.owner: 深圳市大创物联科技有限公司

results.title: Wearable computing device having a biometric sensor electrode positioned on a display screen cover and operable as an antenna
results.abstract: A wearable computing device is provided. The wearable computing device includes a housing and a printed circuit board at least partially disposed within the housing. The wearable computing device includes a display screen electrically coupled to the printed circuit board. The wearable computing device includes a cover positioned on the display screen. The cover includes a top surface and a bottom surface. The bottom surface includes one or more electrical contacts electrically connected to the printed circuit board. The wearable computing device includes a biometric sensor electrode positioned partially on the top surface of the cover. The biometric sensor electrode wraps at least partially around a periphery of the cover and contacts the one or more electrical contacts on the bottom surface of the cover. The biometric sensor electrode has one or more portions that include a conductive material capable of carrying a radio frequency current.

results.title: Wearable electronic and its component
results.abstract: Disclosed herein is wearable electronic, the embodiments of its component and related system and technology.For example, wearable electronic may include：Wearable support construction with first surface and second surface；First electrode at the first surface, wherein when the wearable electronic is worn on by user in a part for the body of the user, the first electrode is arranged to contact the skin of the user in the part of the body of the user；Second electrode at the second surface, wherein, when the wearable electronic is worn on by the user on the part of the body of the user, the second electrode is arranged to not contact the skin of the user in the part of the body of the user；And the resistance switch with the first input end for being respectively coupled to the first electrode and the second electrode and the second input terminal.Can also disclose and/or claimed other embodiments.

results.title: Wearable device and method for manufacturing wearable device
results.abstract: A wearable device and a method of manufacturing the wearable device are provided. A wearable device according to an embodiment of the present invention includes a printed circuit board including a base and a plurality of protrusions formed on the base, and a receiving portion that contacts the printed circuit board and receives the printed circuit board, And a housing including a plurality of depressions corresponding to the protrusions.

results.title: Antenna for wearable device
results.abstract: A wearable device mountable on a user's wrist is provided. The wearable device includes a housing having a metal structure, a display disposed in the housing and including a metal layer, the metal layer being disposed so as to be surrounded by the metal structure and to be spaced apart by a gap, a printed circuit board (PCB) disposed in the housing and including a ground area, and a control circuit disposed on the PCB and feeding a first point of the metal structure. Here, the metal layer is electrically connected with the ground area of the PCB at a second point spaced apart by an angle with respect to the first point.

results.title: Wearable device body, wearable device and charging device
results.abstract: The utility model provides a wearable device main body, a wearable device and a charging device. The wearable device main body comprises: a casing (10) and at least two conductive buttons (20), and the casing (10) is provided with an accommodating cavity (11) , and is provided with at least two button mounting holes, and the distance between the at least two button mounting holes is adapted to the distance between at least two charging terminals of the charging device; at least two conductive buttons (20) are respectively arranged on at least two key installation holes; at least two conductive connectors (21) and a circuit board (40) are further provided in the accommodating cavity (11), and at least some of the conductive keys (20) are connected to the circuit board (40) through the conductive connectors (21) electrical connection. By using at least two conductive buttons as charging pins, it is not necessary to provide charging pins separately, thereby reducing the assembly cost of materials related to the charging pins, and the casing can have fewer holes, thereby improving the overall sealing.
results.owner: 安徽华米信息科技有限公司

results.title: Housing for electronic device wearable on user's finger
results.abstract: A housing including a sleeve portion having an interior bend configured to receive a knuckle on a wearer's finger such that the housing can be securely mounted on the wearer's finger. The housing also includes a cavity configured to receive an electronics module therein, and a control access configured to align with controls of the electronics module such that the wearer can operate the electronics module when contained in the recess. The housing may include an electronics module such a watch or medical monitoring device.

results.title: Touch buttons and wearable devices
results.abstract: The present application provides a touch button and a wearable device, the touch button includes: a decorative part, a plastic casing, a flexible circuit board FPC pad and a printed circuit board; wherein the decorative part is located in the plastic casing above; the FPC pads and the printed circuit board are arranged inside the plastic housing, located directly below the position of the decorative component; the FPC pads are connected to the printed circuit board. The technical solution of the present application avoids the problem of destroying the integrity structure of the overall surface shell caused by the need to connect the decorative parts and the capacitive touch circuit through wires, improves the airtightness of the wearable device, and improves the waterproof, Dustproof performance.
results.owner: 安徽华米信息科技有限公司

results.title: Wearables and Wearables
results.abstract: The present application discloses a wearable part and a wearable device, wherein the wearable part includes: a watchband, with a built-in circuit component in the watchband; The circuit components are connected; wherein, when the wearable part is connected with the device body, the electrodes can be used to transmit electrical signals to the device body. Then, the electrodes on the wearable part are used to transmit the electrical signals of the human body to the main body of the device, so that the main body of the device can output the corresponding electrical signals according to the electrical signals of the human body, so that the electrodes originally set on the main body of the device are transferred to the wearable part, thus eliminating the need for the device. The electrodes on the main body make the device main body have more usable space, facilitate the component layout of the device main body, and facilitate the lightening and thinning of the device main body. Moreover, there is no need to open holes for installing electrodes in the device main body, which is convenient for the waterproof setting of the device main body.
results.owner: 维沃移动通信有限公司

results.title: Finger-wearable computing devices
results.abstract: A finger-wearable computing device comprises a ring base configured to be worn on a finger of a wearer's hand, a processor housed within the ring base, and a display screen.

results.title: Portable assembly including a portable article and an electronics module
results.abstract: A wearable assembly, comprising: a wearable article; an electronics module configured to be detachably coupled to the wearable article, the electronics module comprising: a housing comprising an upper surface and a lower upper surface; one disposed within the housing processor; a sensor disposed within the housing, the sensor configured to monitor a property of the environment outside of the electronics module through the housing, the housing further comprising a window aligned with the sensor such that the sensor having a line of sight through the window;a first communicator disposed in the housing and configured to wirelessly communicate with an external device;a second communicator disposed in the housing and including a near field communication, NFC, antenna; a printed circuit board on which the processor is provided, and d The NFC antenna is positioned above the printed circuit board and near the top surface of the case.

results.title: A protective cover and wearable system
results.abstract: The utility model provides a protective cover and a wearable system, which relate to the technical field of wearable equipment. The protective cover includes an outer ring body and an inner ring body. The outer ring body includes a first outer peripheral surface and a first inner peripheral surface arranged oppositely, and the outer ring body is provided with a plurality of functional holes penetrating the first outer peripheral surface and the first inner peripheral surface. The inner ring body is an elastic body, including a second outer peripheral surface and a second inner peripheral surface arranged oppositely, the second outer peripheral surface is protruded with a protruding structure, and the protruding structure penetrates the functional hole and protrudes from the first outer peripheral surface, The second outer peripheral surface abuts against the first inner peripheral surface. A hollow groove for mounting the dial is formed around the second inner peripheral surface and is used to sleeve and abut the dial. The wearable system includes a wearable device and the aforementioned protective cover. The inner side of the inner ring body included in the above protective cover is sleeved against the dial of the wearable device, and the inner ring body is an elastic body. When the dial is dropped, the inner ring body can buffer the dial by elastic action, so as to prevent the dial from being easily broken. .

results.title: Wearable device including a leakage current protection structure
results.abstract: The present invention relates to a wearable device including a leakage current prevention structure. A wearable device according to an embodiment of the present invention has a structure electrically connected to a substrate in an inner space, a case in which a slot communicating with the inner space is formed on an upper surface, a battery disposed on the structure, and one side of the structure A first electrode that is supported on and is in contact with one surface of the battery, a second electrode that is supported on the other side of the structure and in contact with the other surface of the battery, and is removable through the slot, and the battery and the first electrode or And an insulating sheet inserted between the battery and the second electrode to block a leakage current of the battery.

results.title: Slot antenna for a wearable device
results.abstract: A wearable device includes: a metal middle cover, a metal bottom cover, a printed circuit board PCB, and a gap. The metal middle cover encircles the wearable device for a whole circle and serves as an exterior of the wearable device. The metal bottom cover is located under the metal middle cover and serves as a rear cover of the wearable device. The gap with a preset width exists between the metal middle cover and the metal bottom cover, and serves as a slot antenna of the wearable device. The PCB is in an inner side of the metal middle cover, and is located above the metal bottom cover. The PCB is electrically connected to the metal middle cover by using a feed point, and feeds power to the metal middle cover.

results.title: Sharing a single electrode between skin resistance and capacitance measurements
results.abstract: Wearable devices including a housing and a mount configured to mount the housing to the wearer &apos; s outer surface are described herein. The wearable devices protrude from the housing and include first and second electrical contacts configured to allow the electrical contacts to be used to measure the galvanic skin resistance of the skin proximate the electrical contacts when the wearable device is mounted to the wearer & . The electrical contacts are additionally configured to measure the capacitance between the electrical contacts. The measured capacitance between the electrical contacts can be related to the capacitance of the skin proximate the electrical contacts when the wearable device is mounted on the wearer's outer surface. The wearable devices further include an electronically switched capacitor connected between the electrical contacts that can be operated to enable the galvanic skin resistance and capacitance measurements described above.

results.title: A finger-sleeve wearable mouse structure
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a finger-sleeve wearable mouse structure, which comprises a hand, the wrist of the hand is sleeved with a wearing ring, and the index finger end, the middle finger end and the ring finger end of the hand are sleeved with an index finger sleeve, a middle finger sleeve and a ring finger sleeve respectively. Ring finger cover, the wearing ring includes a protective ring and a device ring, a switch button is fixedly installed on the surface of the protective ring, one side of the switch button is fixedly interspersed with a charging head, one side of the device ring is fixedly installed with a battery, and one side of the battery is fixedly installed with a Charge and discharge controller, a processing chip is fixedly installed in the middle of the circuit board, a reset module and a storage module are fixedly installed on both sides of the processing chip, a Bluetooth module is fixedly installed on one side of the storage module, and a click is fixedly installed inside the index finger cover The button and the middle finger cover are fixedly installed with an electrostatic induction sensor. The utility model provides a finger cover wearable mouse structure. The electrostatic induction sensor replaces the optical sensor for sensing, so that the device is less affected.
results.owner: 广州穗景客车制造有限公司

results.title: Electronic device including sensor module
results.abstract: A wearable device is provided. The wearable device includes a housing including a transparent part, a circuit board disposed in the housing and including a first surface facing the transparent part and a second surface opposite to the first surface, a first integrated circuit (IC) layer disposed adjacent to the circuit board, a first sensor module, at least a part of which is disposed in the first IC layer, a second sensor module disposed adjacent to the first sensor module, and a second IC layer electrically connected to the first IC layer and the circuit board, and including a processor configured to process data acquired by the first sensor module and the second sensor module, wherein the circuit board, the first IC layer, and the second IC layer are stacked and disposed in a direction perpendicular to the first surface or the second surface of the circuit board.

results.title: Low-profile wearable medical device
results.abstract: Wearable medical devices are provided. An exemplary wearable medical device includes a printed circuit board assembly (PCBA) comprising a dielectric layer having a top surface and conductive features on the top surface of the dielectric layer. Further, the exemplary wearable medical device includes a top housing mounted directly to the top surface of the PCBA. Also, the wearable medical device includes a power source located between the top housing and the PCBA. The top housing and the dielectric layer of the PCBA encapsulates the conductive features and power source and define an outer surface of the wearable medical device.

results.title: Smart ring and method for manufacturing the same
results.abstract: The invention discloses an intelligent finger ring and a manufacturing method of the finger ring shell. The finger-ring case is annularly arranged and a wearing hole is formed on the inner side thereof; the finger-ring case includes an outer casing and an inner casing arranged on the inner peripheral surface of the outer casing for installing electronic components. The manufacturing method of the finger ring shell includes using ceramic material to prepare the outer shell; constructing an inner shell made of plastic material on the inner circumferential surface of the outer shell, so as to be combined with the inner shell to form the inner shell. A finger-ring shell; a component cavity for mounting electronic components is formed on the inner shell of the finger-ring shell. The smart ring and the manufacturing method of the ring shell of the present invention can improve the wear resistance of the smart ring to meet people's wear resistance requirements for the smart ring; the external ceramic and internal plastic material structure can effectively improve the overall strength of the entire shell, Improve the anti-drop performance of the composite structure; at the same time, the built-in plastic body structure has the advantages of lightweight products and improved processing efficiency.

results.title: Wearable apparatus having ring shape and method for controlling motion thereof
results.abstract: A wearable device having a ring shape and a method of controlling the operation thereof are provided. The wearable device includes at least one haptic member movably disposed along the inner peripheral surface. The haptic member transfers information to the wearer by moving along the inner circumferential surface of the wearer in contact with the skin of the wearer's finger. When a position to be recognized by the wearer is selected among a plurality of positions arranged on the outer circumferential surface of the wearer's fingertip, the haptic member moves in contact with the finger skin of the wearer to transmit information to the wearer. The movement of the haptic member may be performed one or more times.

results.title: Portable interactive card
results.abstract: A wearable interactive card including an housing, a circuit board, a processing unit, a transceiver, a power supply and a sensing element. The housing has an upper surface, a lower surface and a side surface connecting the upper surface and the lower surface. The circuit board is disposed in the housing and has a carying surface. The upper surface and the lower surface are located above and below the carrying surface, respectively. The processing unit is disposed at the carying surface and electrically connected to the circuit board. The transceiver is disposed at the carrying surface and electrically connected to the circuit board. The transceiver is electrically connected to the processing unit. The power supply is disposed at the carrying surface and electrically connected to the circuit board. The power supply provides required electric power to the processing unit and the transceiver in operation. The sensing element is disposed at the side surface of the housing and electrically connected to the processing unit.

results.title: Wearable Interactive Controller
results.abstract: The utility model provides a wearable interactive controller, which comprises: a ring-shaped structure, which can be put on the finger; a lower casing, which has a cavity, and is provided with a first through hole; In the cavity, and make the ring-shaped structure pass through the cavity through the first through hole; a main board provided with a data processing chip, the main board is assembled on the main board support; an inertial measurement unit is electrically connected with the data processing chip, used Sensing the posture of the finger and generating output; an upper casing, covering the main board and docking with the lower casing; a touch panel, electrically connected to the data processing chip, used to sense the touch action on the touch panel and Generate an output; the function button is electrically connected to the data processing chip, and is used to receive the pressing action and generate an output; the data processing chip is used to process at least one output of the inertial measurement unit, the touch panel, and the function button, thereby simplifying the The structure and volume of the interactive device increase the manipulability of the interaction.
results.owner: 北京凌宇智控科技有限公司

results.title: Wearable electronic equipment and its detection module
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device, which includes a device body, a wearing piece, and a detection module installed on the device body; the detection module defines a detection surface, and the detection module is provided with a contact exposed on the detection surface and a detection element, the contact element and the detection element are spaced and independent from each other at the detection surface; the contact element and the detection element can be conducted by the electrolyte to realize the power-off of the wearable electronic device. With the above design, the electrolytic corrosion of the wearable electronic device can be effectively prevented.
results.owner: 富士康(昆山)电脑接插件有限公司

results.title: Wearable ring device with real-time detection and transmission of body physiological characteristics
results.abstract: The utility model is a wearable ring device with functions of real-time detection and transmission of body physiological characteristics. There is a horizontal piece and a half-ring piece, the half-ring piece and the horizontal piece are connected and encircled to form a hollow part, the light emitting receiver is arranged on the horizontal piece, and is electrically connected to at least one wire, the first conductive component is embedded in the half-piece The ring part faces the inner wall of the hollow part, the upper conductive power supply body is connected and protrudes from the top of the half ring part, and the upper conductive power supply body is also provided with a second conductive component. The user wears the utility model and uses the light emitting receiver, The first conductive component, the upper conductive power supply body, and the second conductive component detect the user's physiological characteristic functions in real time.

results.title: Wearable device with interior frame
results.abstract: A wearable device includes a wearable device structure having first and second ends. A support member is positioned at least partially positioned in the wearable device structure. Electronic circuitry is at a surface or an interior of the wearable device. The electronic circuitry provides at least identification of the wearable device. One or more batteries are coupled to the electronic circuitry.

results.title: Electronic device comprising sensor module
results.abstract: Provided is a wearable device. The wearable device comprises: a housing including a transparent portion; a circuit board disposed in the housing and including a first surface facing the transparent portion and a second surface opposite the first surface; a first integrated circuit (IC) layer disposed adjacent to the circuit board; and a second IC layer including a first sensor module at least partially disposed in the first IC layer, a second sensor module disposed adjacent to the first sensor module, and a processor, which is electrically connected to the first IC layer and the circuit board, for processing data acquired by the first sensor module and the second sensor module, wherein the circuit board, the first IC layer, and the second IC layer are stacked in a direction perpendicular to the first surface or the second surface of the circuit board.

results.title: Information processing method, wearable electronic device, electronic device and storage medium
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device includes: a body and a connector. The body includes a display component. A display area of the display component is on the surface of the body and is configured to output display contents. The connector has a first accommodating space. When the body is fixed with the connector, the body is in the accommodating space. The connector can form a wearing ring. When the first accommodating space is empty, the body is separated from the connector. A first communication component is disposed in the body, and is configured for the communication between the body and external devices. A second communication component independent of the first communication component is disposed in in the connector, and is configured for the communication between the connector and external devices.
results.owner: Beijing Xiaomi Mobile Software Co., Ltd.

results.title: Smart wearable host and smart wearable device
results.abstract: The utility model discloses an intelligent wearable host and an intelligent wearable device. The intelligent wearable host includes a bottom supporting board and a main body. One of the host body is provided with a connector and the other of the slot, and the connector is mated with the slot to realize the detachable connection of the host body to the bottom support plate; wherein, the slot is equipped with There is a first conductive part, and a second conductive part is provided on the connector. When the connector is inserted into the socket slot, the second conductive part contacts and conducts with the first conductive part to realize the electrical connection between the electrical components and the host body . The smart wearable host and the smart wearable device provided by the embodiment of the utility model can externally place some electrical components, reduce the occupation of the space inside the host body, and meet the miniaturization design requirements of the smart wearable host.
results.owner: 广东小天才科技有限公司

results.title: Wearable User Devices
results.abstract: The present invention provides a wearable user equipment. The wearable user device of the present invention includes a device body and a side-out assembly with a SIM card inside, the bottom surface of the device body can be attached to the user's skin, a placement groove is provided on the side of the device body, and the side-out assembly The component is pluggably arranged in the placement slot, and when the side exit component is located in the placement slot, the SIM card in the side exit component is electrically connected to the device main body. The invention can conveniently carry out the pick-and-place operation of the SIM card.
results.owner: 青岛海信移动通信技术股份有限公司

results.title: Apparatus and method for obtaining biological information
results.abstract: A wearable device comprises a first electrode portion comprising two electrodes configured to be electrically isolated from each other and to be in direct contact with a user of the wearable device; and a second electrode portion comprising two electrodes configured to be electrically isolated from each other and sized and arranged to be simultaneously touchable by a single finger of the user, wherein, when the first electrode portion and the second electrode portion are touched by the user, the first electrode portion and the second electrode portion form a closed circuit through the user, a first electrode of the two electrodes of the second electrode portion surrounds a second electrode of the two electrodes of the second electrode portion, the wearable device is a wrist-wearable type and comprises a main body and a strap, the first electrode portion is arranged on an inner surface of the main body or an inner surface of the strap so as to contact a wrist of the user, and the second electrode portion is arranged on an outer surface of the main body or an outer surface of the strap.

results.title: Modular wearable sensor device
results.abstract: A wearable sensor and method for providing a wearable sensor are disclosed. In a first aspect, the wearable sensor comprises a first module, wherein the first module comprises a top layer, a printed circuit board (PCB) layer, and a bottom layer. The bottom layer comprises a double adhesive layer that adheres to both the PCB layer and the user. The bottom layer includes at least two openings to house at least two electrodes for monitoring of a user. The wearable sensor further comprises a second module coupled to the first module, wherein the first module is disposable and the second module is reusable. In a second aspect, the method comprises providing the aforementioned wearable sensor.

results.title: A wearable smart device with detachable device
