results.abstract: The utility model discloses a wearable intelligent device with a detachable device, which comprises an elastic webbing, a detachable sensor module, a storage module, a battery module, a Bluetooth module and a waterproof main circuit; Modules, battery modules and Bluetooth modules, each groove is provided with elastic clips, card slots are provided on both sides of the groove, springs and clips are set in the elastic clips, positioning slots are set at the bottom of the groove, sensor modules, storage modules, gold The finger is arranged on the plane of the groove, and the golden finger is electrically connected with the pins of the waterproof main circuit; the terminals of the sensor module, the storage module, the battery module and the Bluetooth module are electrically connected with the golden finger. The Bluetooth module is set in the elastic clip, and the two sides of the elastic clip are provided with protruding blocks corresponding to the card slots; all modules on the wearable device can be disassembled, which is convenient for maintenance, replacement and equipment cleaning. Users can flexibly combine the required measurement Physiological data.

results.title: wearable electronics
results.abstract: The embodiment of the present invention relates to a wearable electronic device, which relates to the field of wearable devices, and mainly solves the technical problem that the wireless communication quality of smart watches is poor. The technical solution mainly adopted is: the wearable electronic device includes: a wearing-side housing; a communication-side housing, opposite to the wearing-side housing, forming an accommodation space between the wearing-side housing and the communication-side housing, and the communication-side housing is opposite to the wearing-side housing; The metal area of the side shell is used as a metal antenna, and the metal antenna has a feeder terminal and a ground terminal; the circuit chip board is arranged in the accommodating space; the circuit chip board includes a communication module, an antenna feed lead electrically connected to the communication module pin, an antenna ground pin electrically connected to the communication module; wherein, the antenna feed pin is electrically connected to the feeder end of the metal antenna, and the antenna ground pin is electrically connected to the ground end of the metal antenna connection, the wearing side shell is a metal shell. Wearable electronic devices have strong wireless communication capabilities.
results.owner: 出门问问信息科技有限公司

results.title: Electronic equipment and wearing equipment
results.abstract: The utility model discloses an electronic device and a wearable device, which comprises a shell, wherein the side wall of the shell is provided with a containing through groove; the functional module is arranged in the accommodating through groove; the first circuit board is arranged in the shell and covers the notch of the accommodating through groove; the second signal transmission piece is arranged in the shell and is positioned on one side of the first circuit board, which is far away from the functional module, and the second signal transmission piece is electrically connected with the first circuit board; the second circuit board is arranged in the shell, and the second signal transmission piece is electrically connected with the second circuit board; the signal acquired by the functional module is transmitted to the second circuit board through the first circuit board and the second signal transmission piece respectively.
results.owner: 维沃移动通信有限公司

results.title: Button assemblies and wearable devices for wearable devices
results.abstract: The present disclosure relates to a button assembly of a wearable device and the wearable device. The button assembly includes an insulating member and a metal member fixedly connected with the insulating member, wherein the insulating member includes: a first rod portion for passing through a wearable device. The frame is sealed with the frame, and the through hole penetrates the insulating member along the axis direction of the first rod portion; the metal member includes: a second rod portion, which is accommodated in the through hole to maintain insulation from the frame through the first rod portion, and the first rod portion is insulated from the frame. One end of the two rods away from the second head is in contact with the circuit board, and the second head is connected to one end of the second rod, and the second head is spaced from the frame. Through the above technical solutions, the key assembly of the wearable device and the wearable device provided by the present disclosure can solve the technical problem of insufficient strength of functional keys and easy deformation.
results.owner: 北京小米移动软件有限公司

results.title: Wearable electronic device including heat dissipation structure
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device is provided. The wearable electronic device includes a housing including a first portion constituting a first outer surface of the wearable electronic device and a second portion constituting a second outer surface of the wearable electronic device, at least one electronic component positioned in an inner space of the housing and configured to emit heat, and multiple support structures which are at least partially positioned to correspond to the at least one electronic component between the first portion and the second portion, wherein a boundary part between the first portion and the second portion is at least partially positioned along a surface boundary between the first outer surface and the second outer surface and includes at least one opening, and an at least one distancing space between the multiple support structures is configured to communicate with an outer space of the housing through the at least one opening.

results.title: Wearables
results.abstract: The application discloses a wearable device, which belongs to the field of electronic technology. The wearable device includes: a device main body, a wearing part, a switch part and a first connecting part; the device main body is provided with an accommodating hole, the switch part is arranged in the accommodating hole, and the switch part has a first state and the second state, the first connecting piece is connected with the wearing piece; when the switch piece is in the first state, the switch piece covers the opening of the accommodating hole, and is connected to the The accommodating hole forms an accommodating space, the first connecting piece is located in the accommodating space, and the first connecting piece is rotatably connected with the main body of the device; when the switch piece is in the second state, all the The switch element at least partially avoids the opening of the accommodating hole, so as to increase the accommodating space. In this way, the disassembly efficiency of the wearable device is enhanced.
results.owner: 维沃移动通信有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint recognition module and manufacturing method of the fingerprint recognition module
results.abstract: The present invention provides a fingerprint recognition module (2) comprising a fingerprint sensor device (20) having a sensing array (21) arranged on a first side of the device. The fingerprint sensor device also includes a connection pad 24 for connecting the fingerprint sensor device to external circuitry and a fingerprint sensor device cover structure 30, the cover structure comprising a first surface 32 configured to be in contact with a finger; , having a second side (34) facing the sensing array, the cover structure comprising a conductive trace (35) disposed on the second side for electrically connecting the fingerprint sensor module to external circuitry; The surface area of the cover structure is greater than the surface area of the sensor device. The fingerprint sensor device also includes wire bonds 40 and 66 electrically connecting the connection pad of the fingerprint sensing device to the conductive trace of the cover structure.

results.title: Fingerprint sensor module and portable electronic device having the same
results.abstract: According to an embodiment of the present invention, there is provided a fingerprint sensor, comprising: a fingerprint sensor; a fingerprint sensor base material having a metal pad spaced apart from the fingerprint sensor; An insulating layer covering a bottom surface of the base material of the fingerprint sensor except for the metal pad; A metal connection part connected to the metal pad and provided on a lower surface of the insulating layer; A fingerprint sensor module including a solder ball coupled to an end of the metal connection part, a portable electronic device having the fingerprint sensor module, and a method of manufacturing the same are provided.

results.title: Key Structures and Wearables
results.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of key structures, and the invention discloses a key structure and a wearable device, wherein a shell of the wearable device is provided with a key hole, the key structure includes a conductive key and a mounting sleeve, and the conductive key includes a key cap and a key shaft, The key cap is provided with a guide groove, and the key shaft is provided on the bottom wall of the guide groove; the installation sleeve includes a support part and an insulating part, and the support part has a first end extending into the guide groove and a second end passing through the key hole, The support part is provided with a shaft hole for the key shaft to pass through; the insulating part includes an isolation section arranged on the inner peripheral wall of the shaft hole, and a first extension section extending and covering the surface of the first end facing the groove wall of the guide groove, and the isolation section is located in the between the key shaft and the hole wall of the shaft hole, and slidingly abuts with the key shaft. The reliability of insulation isolation between the key structure proposed by the present invention and the wearable device casing is high.

results.title: Ring-shaped wearable terminal and manufacturing method thereof
results.abstract: The present invention provides a ring-type wearable terminal with improved strength and a manufacturing method thereof. The ring-type wearable terminal (10) has: a first ring (12) having a recess (16) formed on a side surface; a second ring (14) engaging with the first ring (12) and covering the recess (16); And a communication part (26), which is housed in the recess (16). The recess (16) is filled with an adhesive (24). The adhesive (24) filled in the recess (16) joins the first ring and the second ring, and fixes the communication part (26) in the recess (16) to protect the communication part (26). Due to such a structure, the strength of the ring-type wearable terminal (10) is improved.

results.title: Electronic device and wearable electronic device
results.abstract: An electronic device and a wearable electronic device, the electronic device (100) comprising: a housing frame (1), the housing frame (1) having an inner cavity (102) and a first through hole (103), and the first through hole (103) establishing communication between the inner cavity (102) and an external space (400) outside of the housing frame (1); a button assembly (4), the button assembly (4) comprising a first electrically conductive member (41) and a second electrically conductive member (42), the first electrically conductive member (41) being connected to the housing frame (1), at least part of the first electrically conductive member (41) being located in the external space (400), at least part of the second electrically conductive member (42) being located within the first through hole (103), the first electrically conductive member (41) elastically abutting against the second electrically conductive member (42), and the first electrically conductive member (41) able to perform electrical conduction with the second electrically conductive member (42); and a circuit assembly (5) which is arranged within the inner cavity (102), the circuit assembly (5) comprising a circuit board (51) and an electrical contact portion (52), the electrical contact portion (52) being electrically connected to the circuit board (51), and the electrical contact portion (52) abutting against an end of the second electrically conductive member (42) away from the first electrically conductive member (41), allowing the first electrically conductive member (41) to perform electrical conduction with the electrical contact portion (52). The electronic device and the wearable electronic device have a button assembly possessing good impact resistance.
results.owner: Oppo广东移动通信有限公司

results.title: Integrated circuit device and associated method having openings exposing integrated circuit die
results.abstract: The present invention includes a fingerprint sensor device, comprising: an outer shell material body having an integrated circuit die, an opening that surrounds the integrated circuit die and exposing an integrated circuit die portion, and a conductive member mounted to the outer material body adjacent to the opening or An integrated circuit device having a frame. The conductive member is adhered to and attached to the integrated circuit die. Therefore, the conductive member bonded and installed may serve to seal the space between the outer skin layer and the die. The frame can be defined as surrounding the removable material at an intermediate stage of the manufacturing process. The removable material layer and its frame may be installed on an integrated circuit die while plastic is cast to inject and surround the assembly.

results.title: Multipurpose wearable electrical contact
results.abstract: Wearable devices are described herein including a housing and a mount configured to mount the housing to an external surface of a wearer. The wearable devices further include first and second electrical contacts protruding from the housing and configured such that the electrical contacts can be used to measure a Galvanic skin resistance of skin proximate to the electrical contacts when the wearable device is mounted to the external surface of the wearer. The wearable devices are powered by rechargeable batteries disposed within the wearable devices. The electrical contacts are additionally configured to connect the wearable device to an external charger or other power source such that a recharger disposed within the wearable device can recharge the rechargeable battery using power from the external charger or other power source.

results.title: Wearable device and wearable system
results.abstract: Embodiments of the present application provide a wearable device and a wearable system. The wearable device comprises: a device main body. The device main body comprises a housing and a battery and a mainboard which are arranged in the housing. The housing comprises a first surface and a second surface arranged opposite to each other. A sensor is arranged on the first surface, and a sensor is arranged on the second surface. The mainboard is connected to the battery. The sensors are connected to the mainboard, respectively. The first surface is connected to the second surface by means of the side wall. A fixing part is arranged on the side wall, and the fixing part is used for wearing the device main body on the human body. A first area and a second area are arranged on the first surface. A cardiopulmonary sound sensor is arranged in the first area, and a first temperature sensor is arranged in the second area. According to the wearable device and the wearable system provided by the embodiments of the present application, health indicators of different parts of the human body can be monitored.

results.title: Fingerprint sensing module and manufacturing method thereof, smart card and manufacturing method thereof
results.abstract: Provided are a fingerprint sensing module and a manufacturing method thereof, and a smart card and a manufacturing method thereof. A fingerprint sensing module comprising a fingerprint sensor arrangement having a sensing array arranged on a first side of the fingerprint sensor arrangement is provided. The fingerprint sensor device further includes connection pads for connecting the fingerprint sensor device to external circuitry and a fingerprint sensor device cover structure having a first side configured to be touched by a finger and a second side facing the sensing array, wherein The covering structure includes conductive traces arranged on the second side for electrically connecting the fingerprint sensing module to an external circuit, and wherein a surface area of the covering structure is larger than a surface area of the sensor device. Furthermore, the fingerprint sensor device includes wire bonds electrically connecting the connection pads of the fingerprint sensor device to the conductive traces of the overlying structure.

results.title: a wearable ring
results.abstract: The purpose of this application is to provide a wearable finger ring, the application includes an outer ring touch component, an inner ring main body and a wireless charging coil connected to at least one of the two sides of the inner ring main body through a smart finger ring; the inner ring main body includes a battery , the control circuit and the wireless connection module are all arc-shaped; the wireless charging coil is used to wirelessly charge the battery by coupling with the wireless charging base; wherein, the wireless connection module is used to communicate with one or more intelligent The device establishes a wireless network connection; the inner side of the arc shape of the control circuit is provided with at least one sensor, which is used to obtain the wearer's wearing motion information; the outer ring touch component is used to identify and obtain the wearer's touch on the wearable ring. control operation; the control circuit is used to generate corresponding control commands based on touch operation and/or wearing motion information and send them to the smart device through a wireless network connection, so as to realize remote control of the smart device, and the control is simpler.
results.owner: 上海龙旗科技股份有限公司

results.title: Button finger ring smart machine press-button structure
results.abstract: The utility model belongs to wearable device field, and in particular to a kind of button finger ring device button structure；The structure includes button control plane and main circuit board plane；The button control plane is fixedly connected with main circuit board plane, and button control plane and angle formed by main circuit board plane are 45 degree~55 degree；The button control plane includes button, flexible PCB, flexible PCB support liner；The button is connected by flexible PCB with main circuit board, and flexible PCB support liner is equipped with flexible PCB；Further include battery, screen, upper main case and lower main case.The utility model can fundamentally solve the fault of construction of current finger ring class wearable device；It reduces because bad power caused by when finger presses button is decomposed, improves pressing accuracy, reduce axial and circumferential sliding of the finger ring equipment on wearing finger；Promote product appearance aesthetic feeling；Reduce the device element premature breakdown caused by the bad power of force is decomposed.
results.owner: 扬州康优信息科技有限公司

results.title: wearable electronic device including a biometric sensor and a wireless charging module
results.abstract: Various embodiments of the present disclosure relate to a wearable electronic device including a biometric sensor and a wireless charging module.  According to various embodiments of the present disclosure, a sensor module includes: a circuit board; A biometric sensor unit disposed in a first area of the first surface of the circuit board; A conductive line disposed in a second region of the first surface of the circuit board and disposed to surround at least a portion of the biometric sensor unit when viewed from above of the first surface of the circuit board; A plurality of electrode pads disposed in a third area of the second surface of the circuit board; It is possible to provide a sensor module including at least one electronic component disposed in a third area of the second surface of the circuit board and electrically connected to the plurality of electrode pads.

results.title: Button structure and wearable device
results.abstract: The present application provides a key structure for wearable devices. The key structure includes: a shell, a key body and a conductive member; the key body is movably arranged on the shell, and the key body includes an insulating part and a conductive part arranged in layers. The side of the conductive part away from the insulating part is configured as the pressing side of the button body; the conductive member is penetrated through the casing and the insulating part, so that the electrical connector of the wearable device is electrically connected with the conductive part. In the above manner, the processing time and cost of the key body can be reduced.
results.owner: Oppo广东移动通信有限公司

results.title: Wireless charging of a wrist-mounted sensor platform
results.abstract: Wearable devices are described herein including a housing and a mount configured to mount a contact surface of the housing to an external surface of a wearer. The wearable devices further include a coil disposed in the housing proximate to the contact surface and at least one sensor disposed on the contact surface and configured to detect one or more properties of the body of the wearer. The wearable devices are powered by a rechargeable battery disposed within the wearable devices. The wearable devices additionally include a recharger disposed within the wearable devices and configured to recharge the rechargeable battery using electromagnetic energy received by the coil. The sensor is disposed within a central portion of the contact surface enclosed by the coil.

results.title: Wearable live electrical circuit detection device
results.abstract: A wearable electrical circuit detection device is provided with a plurality of modules configured to functionally execute the necessary steps of detecting an energized electrical circuit. These modules include a wearable holder worn at or near a finger, a sensing module positioned on the wearable holder, an alarm module in communication with the sensing module, and a fastener that fastens the wearable holder in a fastened position. The sensing module, in one embodiment, senses an energized electrical circuit when the sensing module is near the electrical circuit. In some embodiments, the alarm module generates an alarm in response to the sensing module sensing an energized electrical circuit. The fastener, in some embodiments, alternates between the fastened position and an unfastened position. In some embodiments, the fastener includes a conductive interface that activates the sensing module in response to the fastener being in the fastened position.

results.title: Intelligent wear device
results.abstract: The utility model discloses an intelligent wear device belongs to intelligent wear device technical field. Intelligent wear device include functional module, battery module, insulating watchband with inlay the plain conductor on the watchband, the functional module on be provided with fixed slot and metal contact, battery module on be provided with fixed slot and metal contact, functional module and battery module carry out detachable through fixed slot and watchband respectively and be connected, plain conductor respectively with the functional module on metal contact and the metal contact on the battery module be connected, realize functional module and battery module's electrical connection. The utility model discloses a structure has realized the extension of module, and time of endurance's increase has reduced the volume of single module simultaneously, has realized intelligent wear device's portability and scalability.
results.owner: 深圳市微运动信息科技有限公司

results.title: Electric assembly
results.abstract: An electric assembly includes a wearable device and a cable assembly; the wearable device includes a housing and a socket connector, the housing has a receiving space and a docking interface connecting the receiving space and an exterior, and the socket connector is accommodated in the receiving space and includes an insulating body and a set of conductive terminals. The insulating body has a receiving groove, each conductive terminal has a contact part. The cable assembly includes a base, a tongue plate, a plastic part, a plug terminal and a cable. The wearable device also includes a first magnetic element disposed on the housing, the first magnetic element is located in front of the socket connector. The cable assembly also includes a second magnetic element which is used to attract with the first magnetic element so as to ensure that the cable assembly and the wearable device can be reliably mated and matched.
results.owner: 英屬開曼群島商鴻騰精密科技股份有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint detection module and its method
results.abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a fingerprint sensing module suitable for integration into a smart card, a method for manufacturing such a fingerprint sensing module, and a smart card including such a fingerprint sensing module.  A fingerprint sensing module 2 includes a connection pad 24 for connecting a fingerprint sensing module to an external circuit and a cover structure 30 of the fingerprint sensing module. The cover structure is configured to be touchable with a finger, thereby having a first side 32 forming a sensing surface of the fingerprint sensing module and a second side 34 facing the sensing array. The cover structure further comprises a conductive trace 35 located on the second side of the cover structure for electrically connecting the fingerprint sensing module to an external circuit. The surface area of the cover structure is larger than the surface area of the fingerprint sensing module. The fingerprint sensing module also includes a wire bond 40 that electrically connects the connection pad to the conductive trace of the cover structure.  [Selection diagram] Fig. 2
results.owner: フィンガープリント カーズ アナカタム アイピー アクチボラグ

results.title: Fingerprint sensing module and method for manufacturing the fingerprint sensing module
results.abstract: There is provided a fingerprint sensing module (2) comprising a fingerprint sensor device (20) having a sensing array (21) arranged on a first side of the device. The fingerprint sensor device also comprises connection pads (24) for connecting the fingerprint sensor device to external circuitry and a fingerprint sensor device cover structure(30), the cover structure having a first side (32) configured to be touched by a finger, and a second side (34) facing the sensing array, wherein the cover structure comprises conductive traces (35), arranged on the second side, for electrically connecting the fingerprint sensor module to external circuitry, and wherein a surface area of the cover structure is larger than a surface area of the sensor device. Moreover, the fingerprint sensor device comprises wire-bonds (40,66) electrically connecting the connection pads of the fingerprint sensing device to the conductive traces of the cover structure.

results.title: Electronic device for charging a battery using a terminal exposed outward and method of operating the same
results.abstract: A wearable device according to various embodiments of the present invention includes a housing defining at least a portion of the outer surface of the wearable device, a battery housed in the housing, the battery including a positive terminal and a negative terminal, A connection terminal portion including a first terminal and a second terminal which are exposed to the outside and have a conductive property and a connection terminal portion including a first terminal and a second terminal which are electrically conductive and on the basis of polarities of voltages applied to the first terminal and the second terminal, A bridge circuit for electrically connecting the terminal to the terminal corresponding to the polarity of the positive electrode terminal and the negative terminal, a sensor module for acquiring biometric information, and a sensor module for selectively connecting the connection terminal portion to the bridge circuit and the sensor module And may include a switch circuit for connection.

results.title: Extensible wrist band for wearable device
results.abstract: A wearable device includes a strap configured for removable placement about an external body surface. The wearable device also includes an electronics module having a communication port. The wearable device further includes a biological sensor coupled to the electronics module and configured to obtain a measurement via the external body surface. The wearable device also includes a holder coupled to the strap. The holder defines a frame configured to receive the electronics module, and the frame defines an opening through which the biological sensor is able to obtain the measurement via the external body surface. The wearable device further includes a flexible printed circuit board (PCB) embedded within at least one of the holder or the strap. The wearable device also includes a connector configured to electrically connect the flexible PCB to the communication port.

results.title: Be applied to wearable equipment's button subassembly and wearable equipment
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a key assembly applied to wearable equipment, which comprises a substrate, wherein a coil and an inductance sensor are arranged on the substrate, and the substrate is arranged in a shell of the wearable equipment; further comprising: the key body penetrates through the shell from outside to inside, and a gap is formed between the inner end of the key body and the substrate; when external force acts on the key body, the key body moves relative to the shell; the moving stroke of the key body relative to the shell is smaller than the width of the gap in the moving direction of the key body. A wearable device is also disclosed. The utility model provides a no longer set up the sheetmetal among the key subassembly, consequently can not have stopped capacitanc and triggered the coexistent phenomenon with inductance type because the contact of staff and ground connection metal device produces the electric capacity effect, compare in traditional inductance type touch mode, the maloperation rate obviously reduces.

results.title: Circuit board and Wearable for Wearable
results.abstract: The utility model is related to a kind of circuit board and Wearable for Wearable.Circuit board for Wearable includes：Circuit board main body；Fexible conductor, including skin contact surface and device connection surface, the device connection surface of the fexible conductor are connected with the circuit board main body；One or more miniature conductive connectors, it is arranged in the fexible conductor or between the circuit board main body and the fexible conductor, each miniature conductive connector includes relative first end and the second end, the first end is connected with the circuit board main body, the second end is connected with the device connection surface of the fexible conductor, so that the fexible conductor is electrically connected by the miniature conductive connector with the circuit board main body.Circuit board of the present utility model for Wearable can avoid occurring loose contact inside circuit board, it is ensured that the normal of circuit board is used.
results.owner: 西人马（厦门）科技有限公司

results.title: A buckle switch of a wearable device
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a buckle switch for a wearable device, comprising: a buckle accommodating part and a buckle inserting part; the buckle accommodating part is internally provided with a card slot, the card slot and the buckle accommodating part are integrally formed, and the insertion buckle The buckle insert is slidably connected with the card slot; the buckle insert is provided with a contact, and the contact is connected with the power supply of the wearable device through a first wire; an electrode ring is arranged on the card slot, and the electrode ring passes through the first wire. The two wires are connected with the power supply of the wearable device; when the utility model is connected with the card slot through the buckle insert, the contact is in contact with the electrode ring to conduct the circuit. The waterproof design enables the button switch to work normally in rainy days, with high safety factor and wear resistance, and is not easy to be damaged.

results.title: Ring type wearable terminal and method for manufacturing the ring type wearable terminal
results.abstract: RING TYPE WEARABLE TERMINAL AND METHOD FOR MANUFACTURING THE RING TYPE WEARABLE TERMINAL A ring type wearable terminal (10) includes: a first ring (12) that has a recessed portion (16) formed on a side surface thereof; a second ring (14) that is bonded to the first ring (12) and that covers the recessed portion (16); and a communication unit (26) that is housed in the recessed portion (16). The recessed portion (16) is filled with an adhesive agent (24). The adhesive agent (24) filling the recessed portion (16) bonds the first ring (12) and the second ring (14) and also fixes the communication unit (26) to the recessed portion (16) so as to protect the communication unit (26). This allows the strength of the ring type wearable terminal (10) to be improved. [Figure 4]

results.title: Fingerprint sensing packaging module and its manufacturing method
results.abstract: A fingerprint sensing package module includes a substrate, a fingerprint sensing chip, multiple metal wires, and an insulating package. The substrate includes a mounting surface, and a plurality of circuit contacts disposed on the mounting surface. The fingerprint sensing chip is provided on the mounting surface of the substrate, the fingerprint sensing chip has a first surface facing away from the mounting surface, a sensing area located on the first surface, and a plurality of disposed on the first surface and The electrical contacts adjacent to the periphery of the sensing area. The distance between the electrical contacts and the sensing area is less than 300 microns. The metal wires are connected between the circuit contacts and the electrical contacts. The insulating package covers the mounting surface of the substrate, the fingerprint sensing chip and the metal wires, and the insulating package forms a slot that exposes the sensing area.
results.owner: 同欣電子工業股份有限公司

results.title: electronic components
results.abstract: An electronic assembly includes a wearable device and a cable assembly; the wearable device includes a casing and a socket connector, the casing is provided with a receiving space and a docking port connecting the receiving space and the outside world, the socket The connector is accommodated in the accommodating space and includes an insulating body and a plurality of conductive terminals. The insulating body is provided with an accommodating slot, and the conductive terminals are provided with a contact portion; the cable assembly includes a base, a tongue plate, a plastic portion, and a plug. a terminal and a cable; the wearable device further includes a first magnetic element disposed on the housing, the first magnetic element is located in front of the socket connector; the cable assembly further includes a The first magnetic attraction element adsorbs the matched second magnetic attraction element, thereby ensuring reliable docking and cooperation between the cable assembly and the wearable device.
results.owner: 富士康(昆山)电脑接插件有限公司

results.title: Finger ring supporting structure
results.abstract: A kind of finger ring supporting structure, is suitable for portable electric device, and the finger ring supporting structure includes plate body, ring-shaped component and annular ring.The plate body includes positioned at the top surface and bottom surface of two opposite sides, and the bottom surface is suitable for being installed on the portable electric device.The ring-shaped component is set to the top surface of the plate body, the ring-shaped component include the finger being available for users to pass through ring body, be connected to the articulated part of the ring body, and for rotating basis that the articulated part wears and can be rotated according to its own axis in the top surface of the plate body.Annular ring is installed between the top surface of the plate body and the rotating basis, and annular ring is suitable for preventing the friction between the plate body and the ring-shaped component.

results.title: Wearable device including structure for preventing noise due to static electricity
results.abstract: The present invention relates to a wearable device.  A wearable device according to an embodiment of the present invention is a wearable device used by being attached to a user's skin, and includes a body part including a housing and a substrate disposed inside the housing, and a sensing electrode connected to the body part A patch comprising an electrode part and one or more conductive members electrically connecting the electrode part to the user's skin, wherein the electrode part includes a floating conductive shielding layer so as not to be electrically connected to the body part.

results.title: Wearable sensor device
results.abstract: The present disclosure relates to a wearable sensor device (10) for arrangement to a skin surface of a subject. The wearable sensor device (10) comprises a base structure (1) which, when the wearable sensor device is arranged to a skin surface of a subject, provides a proximal skin facing surface (7) proximal to the skin surface and a distal skin facing surface (8) distal to the skin surface; one or more electrodes (2a, 2b, 2c, 2d) arranged on a proximal skin facing surface (7) of the base structure (1) and configured to provide an electrical signal containing information of the subject; an electronics module (3) configured to process the electrical signal provided by the one or more electrodes (2a, 2b, 2c, 2d), and electrically conductive tracks (2) electrically connecting said one or more electrodes (2a, 2b, 2c, 2d) to the electronics module (3), wherein the electronics module (3) is arranged on the distal skin facing surface of the base structure (1). A method of manufacturing the wearable sensor device (10) is also provided.

results.title: Capacitive sensor
results.abstract: One example disclosed wearable device includes a first housing portion having a conductive section and a non-conductive section. The conductive section is connected to ground. A second housing portion includes a printed circuit board (PCB) with a conductor on the PCB surface positioned beneath the non-conductive section. The conductor on the PCB surface and the conductive section form a capacitor of a capacitive sensor. The wearable device may also include a first adhesive layer between a surface of the non-conductive section of the first housing portion and the PCB surface. A second adhesive layer, coplanar with the first adhesive layer, may be applied between a surface of the conductive section of the first housing portion and the PCB surface. The first adhesive layer and the second adhesive layer form a water tight seal that prevents liquids from penetrating into at least the second housing portion.

results.title: Abstracted pattern messaging wearable electronic device for wireless communication
results.abstract: Example embodiments described herein provide for a wearable electronic device, such as an electronic bracelet, that includes a circuit board coupled to a plurality of electronic components (which may include any type of components, elements, circuitry, etc.). One particular implementation of a wearable electronic device includes at least one electronic bead including a touch input device configured to receive a first touch input from a first user associated with the wearable electronic device, and a communication module in communication with the at least one electronic bead. The communication module includes a processor configured to receive the first touch input from the at least one electronic bead, and send a first message including first information indicative of the first touch input and a first device indentifier associated with the at least one electronic bead to an electronic device associated with a second user.

results.title: Finger-wearable Input Device
results.abstract: The present invention relates to a finger-wearable input device. The finger-wearable input device includes an operative bulk configured to wear on a finger of a user and comprising a main board module, on which main board module a motion sensor and a first action button are disposed for generating a wireless signal with respect to a mouse event; and a battery module configured to be separated from the operative bulk but electrically connected with the main board module.

results.title: wearable computer
results.abstract: The present invention provides a wearable computer, wherein the wearable computer comprises: an electronic body, a power module and a fixing belt for confining the electronic body within a specified space; the electronic body comprises: a casing and a an electronic component inside the casing; the power module is located outside the casing; one end of the fixing strap is a fixing end, and the fixing strap is integrally formed and fixedly connected to the casing through the fixing end; the The wearable computer further includes: a wire for conducting electrical conduction between the electronic component and the power module, the wire is connected to the electronic component from the inside of the fixing band through the fixing end. The invention can improve the wearable computer's endurance ability while improving the wearing comfort of the wearable computer.
results.owner: 研祥智能科技股份有限公司

results.title: A fingerprint recognition module
results.abstract: The present invention provides a fingerprint identification module, the fingerprint identification module (10) sequentially includes a ceramic cover (12) and a fingerprint identification chip (13) from top to bottom; wherein, the ceramic cover (12) A ring-shaped conductive part (121) is integrally formed on the outer edge of the upper surface of the upper surface, and the ring-shaped conductive part (121) is connected to the fingerprint identification chip (13) through a wire (14). In the fingerprint recognition module of the present invention, the outer edge of the upper surface of the ceramic cover is integrally formed into a ring-shaped conductive part with a conductive function, so that the conductive ring-shaped conductive part can replace the metal ring to realize the function of the metal ring, completely It avoids the problem of height difference caused by the existence of the metal ring, and there will no longer be problems of protruding edges scratching fingers and dead corners of dust, reducing structural components, and there is no problem of assembly error at all, saving costs at the same time Improved product accuracy.
results.owner: 北京赛乐米克材料科技有限公司

results.title: wearable battery pack
results.abstract: The invention discloses a wearable battery pack, comprising: a battery pack body, including an electric core and a casing for containing the electric core; wearable equipment, used for wearing by a user so that the battery pack is carried on the back of the user; wherein, The battery pack body includes: a heat dissipation channel, which runs from one side of the battery pack body to the opposite side; a circuit board, electrically connected to the battery cell so that the electric energy of the battery cell can be output at a certain voltage; the circuit board is provided with a through hole, The through holes correspond to the heat dissipation channels. The invention provides a wearable battery pack which can be carried by a user. The battery pack has good heat dissipation performance and can be comfortably carried by the user.
results.owner: 南京德朔实业有限公司

results.title: Electronic devices and wearable devices
results.abstract: The present application relates to an electronic device and a wearable device. The electronic device includes a casing, an electrocardiogram module and a back casing. The rear casing includes a casing, a first conductive layer, a second conductive layer, a first conductive column and a second conductive column, the casing is connected to the casing, and the casing is provided with a first installation hole and a second installation hole. The first conductive layer and the second conductive layer are arranged on the surface of the casing in isolation from each other. The first conductive column is arranged in the first mounting hole and is electrically connected with the first conductive layer, and the second conductive column is arranged in the second mounting hole and is electrically connected with the second conductive layer. The casing is provided with a detection electrode, and the detection electrode, the first conductive column and the second conductive column are respectively electrically connected with the ECG module. The detection electrodes, the ECG module, the back shell and the user's body can form a closed detection loop for acquiring the user's ECG data. In the above-mentioned wearable device, the electrical connection between the first conductive layer and the second conductive layer and the electrocardiogram module has relatively high reliability.
results.owner: Oppo广东移动通信有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint sensing package module and manufacturing method thereof
results.abstract: A fingerprint sensing package module includes a cover layer, an adhesive layer, a circuit board, a fingerprint sensing wafer, a conductive pattern layer and a package. The adhesive layer is on the cover layer. The circuit board has a first surface, and the circuit board includes a plurality of pads on the first surface. The first surface of the circuit board is disposed on the cover layer through the adhesive layer, and the circuit board has at least one slot. The fingerprint sensing chip has a sensing surface and includes a plurality of contacts on the sensing surface. The sensing surface of the fingerprint sensing chip is disposed on the cover layer through the adhesive layer and is received in the slot. The conductive pattern layer is located on the first surface and the sensing surface to electrically connect the pads and the contacts. The package is at least partially located within the slot to cover the fingerprint sensing wafer.
results.owner: 茂丞科技股份有限公司

results.title: Antennas for Wearable Devices
results.abstract: A wearable device that can be mounted on a user's wrist, comprising: a case, the case includes a metal structure; a display, the display is located in the case, wherein the display includes a metal layer, the metal layer is located within and spaced apart from the metal structure by a given gap; a printed circuit board (PCB) located within the housing and including a ground area and a control circuit located on the PCB and is configured to feed a first point of the metal structure. The metal layer is electrically connected to the ground area of the PCB at a second point spaced a given angle from the first point.

results.title: Electronics module
results.abstract: The electronics module for a wearable article comprises a housing having an opening, a processor and a flexible electronics structure 50 comprising a flexible substrate on which an electronics component 105 is provided. The electronics component 105 is communicatively connected to the processor 109. The flexible substrate extends through the opening 17 in the housing 101 such that the electronics component 105 is located at least partially outside of the housing 101 and the processor is located within the housing. The electronics module may further comprise a contact pad, wherein the electronics component is sandwiched between the contact pad and the housing. The contact pad may be shaped to accommodate at least part of the electronics component. The contact pad may comprise a recess to receive at least part of the electronics component. The contact pad may be electrically connected to the processor. The housing may comprise a first and second enclosure which are connected together. The electronics module may be used in smart garments or biosensing garments and used to measure a user’s bio-signals.

results.title: Wearable electrical apparatus
results.abstract: A wearable input device includes a pair of ring-shaped signal electrodes and a current sensor arranged in parallel in the direction of the axis of a finger. The current sensor is provided outside an area sandwiched between the signal electrodes. An alternating current signal is applied between the signal electrodes. When the top end of the finger with this device worn thereon is brought into contact with any other body site, a current flows through the current measure point of the current sensor. When the top end of the finger is not in contact with any other body site, no current flows through the measurement point of the current sensor. Based on the measured current, it is determined whether the finger is in contact with any other body site. A command is outputted to an external device according to the result of the determination.

results.title: Fingerprint recognition sensor and manufacturing method thereof
results.abstract: The invention relates to a fingerprint recognition sensor and a manufacturing method thereof. The fingerprint identification sensor includes: a circuit board with opposite first and second surfaces, and a plurality of welding pads are arranged on the first surface; a fingerprint identification chip is arranged on the first surface of the circuit board and has a working surface and connection surface, the working surface is used for contacting with fingers, and the connection surface is provided with electrical connection points; a conductive adhesive is used to electrically connect the circuit board pads and the electrical connection points of the fingerprint recognition chip; The conductive adhesive is arranged on the first surface of the circuit board and is located around the fingerprint recognition chip, so that a closed space is formed between the fingerprint recognition chip and the circuit board. The above-mentioned fingerprint identification sensor has good sealing performance to the conductive adhesive.
results.owner: 深圳市欧菲投资控股有限公司

results.title: Wrist Band Attachment for a Wearable Device
results.abstract: A wearable device includes an electronics module having a first peripheral mating surface extending around a periphery of the electronics module. The first peripheral mating surface includes a first level portion and a second level portion. The second level portion is substantially concentric with the first level portion. The second level portion is configured to meet the first level portion at the periphery of the electronics module to form a step. The wearable device also includes a strap configured for removable placement about an external body surface. The wearable device further includes a holder coupled to the strap. The holder defines a frame configured to receive the electronics module. The frame includes a second peripheral mating surface opposing the first peripheral mating surface of the electronics module. The second peripheral mating surface includes a respective step configured to mate with the step of the first peripheral mating surface.

results.title: Wearable electronic device and processing method therefor after getting wet, and storage medium
results.abstract: The present application discloses a wearable electronic device and a processing method therefor after getting wet, and a storage medium. The wearable electronic device comprises a device body and a wearable accessory connected to the device body. The device body comprises a housing unit and a control unit disposed inside the housing unit; the housing unit comprises a main housing and an auxiliary housing; the main housing is provided with N first grooves, a metal wire is disposed between the bottom of each first groove and one side wall of the main housing, the side wall is a side wall opposite to the first groove, and the metal wire is electrically connected to the control unit; the auxiliary housing is provided with N second grooves; N ≥ 2, and N is an integer; when the main housing and the auxiliary housing are combined, the N first grooves and the N second grooves are fit in one-to-one correspondence to form N closed cavities, and each cavity is internally provided with a waterproof adhesive tape.
results.owner: 中兴通讯股份有限公司

results.title: Method for obtaining bio signal and electronic device implementing the same
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device in accordance with any one of the various embodiments of the present invention includes a housing, a battery mounted within the housing, a connector coupled to a portion of the housing and detachably attaching the electronic device to a portion of a user's body A conductive member disposed on one side of the housing or on one side of the binding member and electrically connected to the battery and exposed to the outside; at least one sensor electrically connected to the conductive member; And a circuit electrically coupled to the battery, the conductive member, and the at least one sensor, wherein the conductive member includes a first contact and a second contact, the circuit comprising a first contact or a second contact of the conductive member, 2 monitor the intensity or voltage of the current received via the contact, And may be configured to charge the battery using the current or to operate the at least one sensor.   An electronic device according to any one of the various embodiments of the present invention includes a housing, a battery mounted within the housing, a housing coupled to a portion of the housing, and detachably coupling the electronic device to a portion of the body of the user. At least one terminal exposed on at least one of the one surface of the housing or one surface of the coupling member, a switch for controlling the switch to charge the battery or acquire a bio-signal through the at least one terminal, A control unit for processing the bio-signal, a switch for electrically connecting the at least one terminal to at least one of the biometric sensor or the battery, and a circuit including the battery, the terminal, the control unit, the biosensor, and the switch Wherein the circuit further comprises: And a controller that electrically connects the at least one terminal and the biosensor in accordance with a gain command, receives a current transmitted from an external material, and acquires a bio-signal of the external material with the biosensor based on the received current So that it can be controlled.   A method for acquiring a living body signal of an electronic device according to any one of the various embodiments of the present invention includes recognizing a request for acquiring a living body signal and electrically connecting at least one terminal and the living body sensor according to the request, And acquiring a bio-signal of the foreign substance with the bio-sensor based on the received current and based on the received current.   An electronic device according to any one of the various embodiments of the present invention includes a housing, a battery mounted within the housing, a housing coupled to a portion of the housing, and detachably coupling the electronic device to a portion of the body of the user. The at least one terminal exposed to at least one of the one surface of the housing or one surface of the coupling member, the at least one terminal, and controls the switch to charge the battery A controller for processing the bio-signal, a switch for electrically connecting the at least one terminal to at least one of the biosensor or the battery, and a circuit including the battery, the terminal, the controller, the biosensor, and the switch And the circuit is configured such that, when the electronic device is in a discharging state, And may be configured to electrically connect at least one of the terminals and the battery and to charge the battery with a current transferred from the external material by applying a current from an external material to the switch and adjusting the switch to which the current is applied have.   In the bio-signal acquisition method of an electronic device according to any one of the various embodiments of the present invention, when the electronic device is in a discharged state, a current transmitted from an external material is applied to a switch, and the switch to which the current is applied is adjusted And electrically connecting the one or more terminals to the battery and charging the battery with a current transferred from the external material. Other embodiments are possible.

results.title: Miniature wearable physiological device
results.abstract: Disclosed are a wearable physiological device and a wearable physiological system. The wearable physiological device comprises a housing (100) and an electric extension base structure (50), wherein the electric extension base structure (50) comprises a main housing (501), which is provided with an accommodating space (301) used for having the housing (100) arranged therein, a circuit substrate arranged in the main housing (501), and an extension body (502) extending out of the main housing (501); the extension body (502) is provided with at least two electrophysiological input and output elements (504), the at least two electrophysiological input and output elements (504) are electrically connected to a control unit in the housing (100) by means of an electric contact part (101) on the housing (100) and an electric contact part (503) exposed out of the accommodating space (301); and in addition, at least one of the electric contact parts (101, 503) is configured to be an ejector pin connector.

results.title: Wearable terminal device
results.abstract: In a wearable terminal device worn on an index finger of a user's hand, the operability when operating an operation unit with a thumb is improved.   A wearable terminal device includes a ring-shaped terminal main body, an inner member attached to the inner side of the terminal main body, and an operation button. In a state where the inner member 30 is assembled inside the terminal body 20, a mounting hole 41 into which the index finger of the user's hand is inserted is formed inside the wearable terminal device 10 including the terminal body 20 and the inner member 30. The The mounting hole 41 is eccentric to the middle finger side of the user's hand with respect to the center C <b> 1 of the terminal body 20 in a front view of the wearable terminal device 10. The operation button 81 is provided below the center portion 25A in the height direction of the side surface portion 25 located on the thumb side of the user's hand in the terminal body 20. The operation button 81 has a direction toward the center C2 of the mounting hole 41 as an operation direction.   [Selection] Figure 4

results.title: A wearable monitoring host and a wearable monitoring device
results.abstract: The embodiment of the utility model discloses a wearable monitoring host and equipment. The wearable monitoring device in some embodiments of the present invention includes a housing, a circuit board, a battery and a first connection part. In the wearable monitoring host according to the embodiment of the utility model, the circuit board and the battery are stacked in the casing, and the size of the stack of the circuit board and the battery is the smallest, and the space occupied by the stack is relatively small, which is conducive to miniaturization and arrangement. In addition, the first connecting portion extends from the position where the connecting position is located toward the first side, passes through the casing and is partially exposed outside the casing, and the end of the first connecting portion exposed outside the casing is formed to charge the circuit board and /or an interface for information transmission with the circuit board. The connection relationship between the first connecting part and the circuit board is simple and does not need to be realized by other components, so that the arrangement of some components can be reduced, the structure can be further optimized, and the weight can be reduced.
results.owner: 深圳迈瑞生物医疗电子股份有限公司

results.title: A charge-free waterproof ring-type body temperature pulse oximeter
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a charge-free waterproof finger-ring type body temperature pulse oximeter, which comprises a casing, a physical sign collection control module, a power supply module and a wireless transceiver module; the casing comprises a metal casing (11), a plexiglass panel (12), a frame body (13), the metal shell and the frame body form an annular cavity, and other modules are arranged in the cavity; the frame body has an opening (131) through which the sign collection control module contacts the wearer's finger, which includes blood oxygen and a heart rate sensor (21), a temperature sensor (22), an accelerometer (23), an infrared temperature sensor (24) and a microcontroller (25); the power module includes a PCBA board (31), a battery (32) and a battery charging stand (33) ; The physical sign collection control module is connected with the PCBA board; the wireless transceiver module includes a wireless Bluetooth antenna. The utility model can realize the intelligent monitoring of the wearer's blood oxygen, body temperature, heart rate, respiration and the wearer's posture.
results.owner: 延擎电子科技(上海)有限公司

results.title: Wearable device with antenna
results.abstract: The present invention provides a wearable device. The device includes a housing, a circuit board, and a strap. The housing defines a receiving space to receive the circuit board. At least one sidewall of the receiving space defines a through hole. One end of the strap adjacent to the through hole defines a cavity including an opening. The device further includes at least one antenna. The antenna extends from one end of the circuit board and is electrically connected to the circuit board. The antenna extends through the through hole and is received in the cavity through the opening.
results.owner: Hon Hai Prec Ind Co Ltd

results.title: Subject wearable electronic memory card and reading device and / or scruttura associated data.
results.abstract: Wearable object (100), which can be worn by a user and comprising at least one surface (105) which may not appear to be observable when said wearable object is worn by said user; the said wearable object (100) comprises an electronic card (20) which can be read by a reading and / or writing device (40) of electronic cards and capable of storing a plurality of digital data therein; the said wearable object comprises joining means (60) of a first type capable of coupling with respective joining means of a second type present on the said reading and / or writing device (40) of electronic cards; the electronic board (20) is positioned in correspondence of said surface which may not appear to be observable.

results.title: Wearable electronic devices having an inward facing input device and methods of use thereof
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device is provided herein. The wearable electronic device includes a body defining an aperture therethrough. The aperture is sized and shaped to receive a finger of a user. The wearable electronic device further includes a computer processor and an input device at least partially extending from an inner surface of the body. The input device is movable between a first position and a second position. Movement of the input device between the first position and second position provides an input to the processor. The electronic wearable device also includes a transmitter coupled to the computer processor and configured to send electronic transmissions to an external electronic device. The electronic transmissions correspond to the input. The electronic wearable device also includes a power source for providing power to the computer processor, the input device and the transmitter.

results.title: Waterproof wearable device
results.abstract: The patent of the present invention discloses a waterproof wearable device, which includes a wearable body, and a body connecting portion is respectively provided at opposite ends of the wearable device. Each body connecting part is detachably assembled with a fixing band. The fixing belt is provided with a joint, and the connecting part of the body is provided with a card slot which is butted with the joint. The fixing belt is provided with a power transmission part extending to the joint. The card slot is provided with an interface which is communicated with the inside of the wearable body. The interface is configured to allow the power transmission part to pass through when the connector and the card slot are butted, so as to be electrically connected to the wearable body. The connector is provided with a waterproof part for sealing the interface to isolate the card slot from the inside of the wearing body; and the connector is provided with a locking part for locking the connector inside the card slot. In this patent, the waterproof part seals the gap at the edge of the interface, which can greatly improve the waterproof performance between the fixing belt and the wearable body. By arranging the locking part, the connector is locked inside the card slot, so as to realize the tightness of the connection between the fixing belt and the wearing body.
results.owner: 广东小天才科技有限公司

results.title: A kind of antenna of wearable device and wearable device
results.abstract: An antenna for a wearable device and the wearable device. In this antenna, the metal bottom case (3) of the wearable device is used as the antenna radiation body, the printed circuit board (7) is used as the ground plane, and the connection between the metal bottom case (3) and the communication circuit module on the printed circuit board (7) is are connected through the antenna feeder (9); the metal middle case (1) and the metal bottom case (3) are connected through the second connection line (2), the metal middle case (1), the metal bottom case (3) and the metal middle case The gap between the case (1) and the metal bottom case (3) forms a slot antenna. By using the metal bottom case (3) as the antenna radiation body, the printed circuit board (7) as the ground plane, and connecting the two through the antenna feeder (9) to form an antenna, when the wearable device is worn, the arms and the radiation When the metal bottom shell (3) of the main body is in contact, the effect of improving the impedance of the antenna by the arm is greater than that of absorbing it, so the radiation efficiency of the antenna when placed on the arm is better than that in free space, thereby improving the radiation effect of the antenna of the entire wearable device.

results.title: A wearable input device, host, input method and electronic system
results.abstract: The invention discloses a wearable input device, a host, an input method and an electronic system. The wearable input device includes a body, a detection module, a positioning module, a communication module and a processor located on the body; wherein the detection module is used for Detect whether the main body performs a tapping action on the operation plane, and send the detection result to the processor; the positioning module is used to determine the current position of the main body on the operation plane, and send the current position to the processor; the processor is used to When the main body performs a tapping action, the current position or the key value calculated according to the current position is sent to the host through the communication module. Since only four components including a detection module, a positioning module, a communication module and a processor are arranged on the main body, the input operation can be realized in cooperation with the host, and the structure is simple and the operation is convenient.
results.owner: 京东方科技集团股份有限公司

results.title: A smart wearable device
results.abstract: A smart wearable device, comprising a casing and electronic devices housed in the casing, the casing includes a middle frame, and a face case and a bottom case respectively connected to both sides of the middle frame, and the electronic device includes a A circuit board, a battery module and a functional module connected to the circuit board, the battery module and the functional module are respectively arranged on both sides of the circuit board, a sealing ring is interposed between the surface case and the middle frame, and the bottom case A sealing ring is placed between the middle frame to effectively ensure the sealing of the casing, effectively prevent water vapor from entering the casing, and ensure the electrical safety and service life of the equipment.
results.owner: 深圳市多美达数码科技有限公司

results.title: Control components and wearable devices
results.abstract: The present application relates to the field of wearable devices, in particular to a control structure and wearable devices. Wherein, the control structure includes a fixing part and an operating part which is insulated and isolated from the fixing part; a through hole is opened on the fixing part, and the operating part is passed through the through hole, at least a section of the inner peripheral surface of the through hole opposite to the operating part and/or the operating part The outer peripheral surface opposite to the inner peripheral surface of this section is coated with an insulating layer; and/or, the contact surface of the operating member against the outer edge of the through hole along the penetrating direction and/or the outer edge of the through hole is opposite to the contact surface An insulating layer is coated on the surface; the insulating isolation between the fixing part and the operating part is realized through the insulating layer. The control component can not only avoid the problem of poor insulation effect caused by aging of plastic parts or water ingress when using plastic parts for insulation, but also simplify the structure of wearable devices such as smart watches, thereby reducing the production cost of smart watches.

results.title: Method and electronic device for obtaining bio signals
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device is provided that includes a housing, a battery disposed in the housing, and a coupling member, connected to the housing, for detachably coupling the electronic device to a part of a user's body. The wearable electronic device also includes a conductive member exposed on a side of the housing or on a side of the coupling member and electrically connected to the battery. The conductive member includes one or more contacts. The wearable electronic device further includes at least one sensor electrically connected to the conductive member, and a circuit electrically connected to the battery, the conductive member, and the at least one sensor. The circuit monitors a voltage and an amount of current received via the one or more contacts, and charges the battery with the current or operates the at least one sensor, based on at least one of the voltage and the amount of current.

results.title: Integrated circuit insertable structure and wearable device comprising the same
results.abstract: There is provided a structure in which an IC chip is insertable, including a mounting portion provided with a guide portion formed so that the IC chip is insertably mountable, a mounting surface in which a PCB electrically connected to the IC chip is arranged, and a fastening portion fastened to at least a part of the electronic device . The structure in which the IC chip can be inserted can be configured as a part of the wearable device and does not require a separate socket structure to fix the IC chip and to realize the electrical connection with the PCB.

results.title: wearable battery
results.abstract: The present application relates to the field of battery technology, in particular to a wearable battery, including: a housing, a battery cell, a BMS circuit board and a HUB circuit board. A mounting ring is arranged on the outer wall of the housing, and the mounting ring is used for the strap to penetrate. The electric core is arranged in the casing. The BMS circuit board is arranged in the casing, and the BMS circuit board is connected with the electric core. The HUB circuit board is arranged in the casing, the HUB circuit board is connected with the discharge interface, the casing is provided with a discharge hole for the discharge interface to be inserted, and the HUB circuit board can be electrically connected with the BMS circuit board. The wearable battery can be worn to provide power for the electric wearable device, and a longer battery life can be obtained by wearing multiple wearable batteries. When the electric wearable device is updated, only the main body of the electric wearable device needs to be upgraded without replacing the wearable battery, which reduces the cost of product upgrade and replacement.
results.owner: 北京动思创新科技有限公司

results.title: Wearable electronic equipment with magnetic socket
results.abstract: The utility model discloses wearable electronic equipment with a magnetic socket. The wearable electronic equipment comprises a hollow casing, the magnetic socket arranged on the casing and a circuit board arranged in the casing and connected with the magnetic socket. The magnetic socket comprises at least two holes, at least two magnetic electrodes and at least two magnets, wherein the holes are arranged in the casing, and communicated with the internal of the casing; the magnetic electrodes are arranged in the casing in correspondence with the holes, the lateral surfaces of the magnetic electrodes are fixedly connected to the circuit board, and one bottom surface of each magnetic electrode is used for attracting and being electrically connected with a magnetic plug which is inserted into the hole; and the magnets are attracted by the magnetic electrodes, arranged in the casing, and respectively positioned at the other bottom surfaces of the magnetic electrodes. The wearable electronic equipment is simple in structure, the wearable electronic equipment and the corresponding magnetic plugs can be rapidly assembled and disassembled, and the application performance of the wearable electronic equipment is improved.

results.title: Fingerprint Sensors and Electronics
results.abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of fingerprint sensors, and discloses a fingerprint sensor and electronic equipment. The fingerprint sensor includes a sensing part, a chip part and a cover plate; the sensing part includes a fingerprint sensing area and a non-sensing area, the chip part is arranged in the non-sensing area, and the chip part and the sensing part are connected through a conductive The circuit is electrically connected; the cover plate includes a cover plate body, and a mounting hole for accommodating and protecting the chip part is opened on the cover plate body, and the cover plate body is covered on the sensing part, and the mounting hole The opening faces the sensing part. The fingerprint sensor provided by the utility model has excellent corrosion resistance, high temperature resistance and wear resistance, and avoids deformation during subsequent reliability tests.
results.owner: 广东绿展科技有限公司

results.title: Ring-type wearable terminal
results.abstract: A ring-type wearable terminal that is easy to adjust in size to a user is provided.   A ring-type wearable terminal includes a ring provided with a communication unit that communicates with an external device, and an inner diameter correction member attached to the inside of the ring. The user can adjust the inner diameter of the ring-type wearable terminal 10 to his / her finger by attaching the inner diameter correction member 16 to the ring 12. Thus, a single ring 12 can handle various sizes.   [Selection] Figure 2

results.title: A wearable electronic device
results.abstract: The invention discloses a wearable electronic device, which comprises a casing, wherein a PCB board is arranged in the casing, function buttons are arranged in cooperation with the PCB board, a plastic upper casing is arranged on the upper end of the casing, and the A metal upper case is arranged above the plastic upper case, and the function keys are arranged under the plastic upper case. By pressing the part of the metal upper case corresponding to the function keys, the pressing operation of the function keys is realized. After pressing, the metal The upper shell is elastically recoverable. In the present invention, the upper surface adopts a metal shell with elastic deformation function, wherein the mechanical function buttons are arranged under the metal shell, so the outer surface of the product is very simple, and the metal shell is not easy to deform after long-term use; wearable electronic devices also have The key movement space is reserved, and the pressing change of the key is very obvious, which improves the operation accuracy.

results.title: Intelligent wearable device
results.abstract: The utility model discloses an intelligent wearable device, which belongs to the technical field of wearable devices and comprises a shell, wherein the end part of the shell is provided with an inserting part, and the inserting part and the shell are of an integrated structure; a PCB assembly located within the housing; the conductive elastic sheet is positioned in the shell, and one end of the conductive elastic sheet is electrically connected with the PCB assembly; the USB metal sheet group is fixed on the inserting part and is electrically connected with the other end of the conductive elastic sheet; the plug part is configured to be inserted into a power converter with a USB socket, and when the plug part is inserted into the power converter, the USB metal sheet group can be electrically connected with a conductive structure in the power converter. The utility model discloses can be convenient for charge of intelligent wearing equipment, have better commonality.
results.owner: 昆山联滔电子有限公司

results.title: Integrated circuit device having an opening exposing the integrated circuit die and related methods
results.abstract: An integrated circuit device, such as a fingerprint sensing device, includes an integrated circuit die, a body of encapsulating material surrounding the integrated circuit die and having an opening therein exposing a portion of the integrated circuit die, and an electrically conductive member or frame being mounted to the body of encapsulating material adjacent the opening therein. The electrically conductive member may preferably be positioned so as to define at least a portion of a frame for the opening in the body of encapsulating material.
