The electrically conductive member may be adhesively secured to the integrated circuit die. Accordingly, the adhesive and electrically conductive member may serve as a seal to the interface between the body of encapsulating material and the die. The electrically conductive member may define a frame that surrounds a body of removable material during an intermediate stage in manufacturing. More particularly, the body of removable material and its frame may be positioned on the integrated circuit die while plastic is injection molded to encapsulate the asembly.

results.title: Ring-shaped biometric signal sensing device
results.abstract: A ring-shaped biometric signal sensing device according to an embodiment of the present invention comprises: a first electrode ( 10 ), which is provided in a ring shape, is formed of conductors, and is fitted on a user's finger so as to make contract with the finger; a second electrode ( 20 ), which is assembled on the outside of the first electrode ( 10 ), is formed of conductors, and makes contact with the user's body; an insulation unit ( 30 ), which includes the first electrode ( 10 ) and is insert-injected so as to maintain insulation between the first electrode ( 10 ) and the second electrode ( 20 ); and a control unit ( 40 ), which is arranged in the insulation unit ( 30 ), includes a biometric sensor, and collects biometric signals when the second electrode ( 20 ) makes contact with the user's body.

results.title: Fingerprint sensing package module and its manufacturing method
results.abstract: A fingerprint sensing package module and a manufacturing method thereof. The fingerprint sensing package module includes a substrate, a fingerprint sensing chip, a plurality of metal wires, and an insulating package body. The substrate includes a mounting surface and a plurality of circuit contacts disposed on the mounting surface. The fingerprint sensing chip is disposed on the mounting surface of the substrate, and the fingerprint sensing chip has a first surface facing away from the mounting surface, a sensing area located on the first surface, and a plurality of sensors disposed on the first surface and Adjacent to the electrical contacts at the periphery of the sensing area, the distance between the electrical contacts and the sensing area is less than 300 microns. The metal wire is bridged between the circuit contact and the electrical contact. The insulating package covers the mounting surface of the substrate, the fingerprint sensing chip and the metal wire, and the insulating package is formed with a slot for exposing the sensing area. Therefore, the size of the fingerprint sensing chip can be prevented from being too large, thereby reducing the volume of the fingerprint sensing package module.
results.owner: 同欣电子工业股份有限公司

results.title: Finger ring
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a ring, which relates to the field of wearing products, and comprises a body, wherein an opening is arranged on the body, a floating part is arranged at the opening, the floating part comprises a shell, two ends of the shell are limited at the opening of the body, so that the shell is connected with the body into a ring, a floating gap is reserved between two sides of the shell and the opening of the body, and the floating part is arranged in the floating gap in a floating way through a supporting component; the portion that floats still detects the module including establishing at the inboard flexible circuit board of casing and rhythm of the heart, and the rhythm of the heart detects the module including just lens and the rhythm of the heart sensor to setting up, and the rhythm of the heart sensor is connected with the flexible circuit board electricity. The floating part is retracted or extended inwards to adjust the size of the body; the portion of floating is under the effect of supporting component and is laminated with the finger outer wall, avoids rhythm of the heart module light leak, has improved the accuracy that rhythm of the heart detected, still makes this ring have sufficient clamp force, and the order is worn firmly. Therefore the utility model discloses adaptable different crowds, the detectable rhythm of the heart has reduced cost and work load.

results.title: Ring-like wearable terminal
results.abstract: The utility model provides a kind of ring-like wearable terminal for being easy to that size is made to meet user.The ring-like wearable terminal (10) of the utility model has：Ring (12) is provided with the communication unit (14) communicated with external equipment；And internal diameter corrects component (16), is mounted on the inside of ring (12).User can make the internal diameter of ring-like wearable terminal (10) meet the finger of oneself by installing internal diameter amendment component (16) on ring (12).It so, it is possible to cope with sizes using a ring (12).

results.title: Case device and method providing charging function
results.abstract: In the case device providing a charging function according to various embodiments of the present disclosure, a housing including an internal space for accommodating a wearable device, a communication interface providing a wired or wireless connection with the wearable device, and accommodating the wearable device At least one accommodating groove formed in the inner space, at least one thermoelectric element partially exposed through the at least one accommodating groove, a heat radiating member arranged adjacent to the at least one thermoelectric element, a battery disposed inside the housing, the communication interface, the at least one thermoelectric element, the heat dissipation member, and at least one processor electrically connected to the battery, wherein the at least one processor includes state information of the wearable device may be obtained, and the at least one thermoelectric element may be controlled based on the state information of the wearable device.

results.title: Neck-worn device
results.abstract:
[Problem] To provide a neck-worn device in which a battery or other electronic component is disposed at an appropriate location. 
     [Solution] This neck-worn device is to be worn at the neckline of a wearer, wherein a body part  30  comprises: a battery  90 ; a circuit board  85  on which is installed an electronic component that is driven by receiving power supplied from the battery  90 ; and a body part casing  32  in which the battery  90  and the circuit board  85  are stored. The circuit board  85  is disposed inside the body part casing  32  so as to be positioned in between the battery  90  and the neckline of the wearer while the device is being worn. 
     [Effect] Heat generated from the battery  90  is not readily transmitted to the wearer, thus improving the fit of the neck-worn device.

results.title: A wearable smart ring
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a wearable smart ring. It includes a base and a chip assembly. The cross-section of the base is "C" shaped. There is a mounting groove on the top of the base. The chip assembly is installed in the mounting groove. The chip assembly includes an upper shell, a lower shell and a The chipset between them includes a display screen and a plurality of touch sensors. The lower shell and the base are provided with data collection holes for the sensors to contact with human fingers at corresponding positions, and the upper shell is made of transparent plastic. On the basis of the prior art, the utility model adopts a contact sensor instead of a traditional sensor, and a plurality of sensors for detecting blood pressure, heart rate and human body temperature and humidity are arranged on the chipset, and the accuracy of the data detected by the utility model is higher , and has functional diversity.
results.owner: 深圳市佰利德首饰有限公司

results.title: A kind of wearable device
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of wearable device.The utility model wearable device includes upper shell and lower casing and the wrist strap being connect with the lower casing, the lower casing are provided with temperature sensor；The plate outer side of the lower casing is provided with thermally conductive sheet, the thermally conductive sheet is connect with the temperature sensor.When using the wearable device, the bottom plate of the lower casing of the wearable device is contacted with human skin, because thermally conductive sheet is located at plate outer side, so thermally conductive sheet is also contacted with human skin, again because the thermally conductive sheet has good thermal conductivity, and the thermally conductive sheet is directly connect with the temperature sensor, ensure that the accuracy of monitors temperature；Due to temperature sensor discord direct skin contact, the service life of temperature sensor is also improved.

results.title: Wearable device including moisture permeable structure and method of manufacturing the same
results.abstract: A wearable device is provided. The wearable device, which is used by being attached to a user's skin, includes: a main body unit including a housing and a battery, the battery being arranged inside the housing; an electrode unit including a plurality of electrodes connected to the battery; and a patch unit including one or more conductive members, the one or more conductive members being configured to electrically connect the electrode unit to the user's skin, wherein the patch unit includes a plurality of stacked layers, and a layer in contact with the user's skin includes a plurality of ventilation holes.

results.title: Single electrode sharing in skin resistance and capacitance measurements
results.abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To measure one or more physiological parameters of a wearer.   Described herein is a wearable device that includes a housing and a mount configured to attach the housing to an outer surface of the wearer. The wearable device further includes first and second electrical contacts that protrude from the housing. The first and second electrical contacts are configured to be used to measure skin electrical resistance of the skin proximate to the electrical contact when the wearable device is attached to the outer surface of the wearer. The electrical contacts are further configured to measure a capacitance between the electrical contacts. The measured capacitance between the electrical contacts can be related to the capacitance of the skin proximate to the electrical contacts when the wearable device is attached to the outer surface of the wearer. The wearable device further includes an electronically switched capacitor connected between the electrical contacts operable to allow the skin electrical resistance and capacitance measurements described above.   [Selection] Figure 9

results.abstract: A wearable device is provided. The wearable device, which is used by being attached to a user's skin, includes a main body unit including a housing and a battery, the battery being arranged inside the housing, an electrode unit including a plurality of electrodes connected to the battery, and a patch unit including one or more conductive members, the one or more conductive members being configured to electrically connect the electrode unit to the user's skin. The patch unit further includes a plurality of stacked layers, and a layer in contact with the user's skin includes a plurality of ventilation holes.

results.title: Wearable electronic device including antenna
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device according to an embodiment of the present invention includes a housing including a front member, a rear member facing the front member, and a side member surrounding an internal space between the front member and the rear member; a circuit board disposed inside the housing and including at least one ground part; a speaker module disposed on one side of the rear member and connected to the circuit board; and a support member configured to support the speaker module and made of a conductive material, wherein the support member may be electrically connected to the ground portion of the circuit board. In addition to this, various embodiments identified through the specification may be possible.

results.title: Wearable electronic installation and its accessory
results.abstract: A kind of wearable electronic installation and its accessory, wearable electronic installation include electronics and electronic device accessory.Electronics include junction surface.Electronic device accessory includes wearing body, extension circuit plate and pogo pin connectors.Dress the detachably connected electronics of body.Extension circuit plate is arranged at wearing body.Pogo pin connectors are arranged at one end of wearing body and are electrically connected at extension circuit plate, and pogo pin connectors pressing contact junction surface makes extension circuit plate be electrically connected at electronics.Thus, flexiblely it is electrically connected between electronics and electronic device accessory, improves running stability.

results.title: Wearable electronic device assembly and wearable electronic device thereof
results.abstract: The present invention provides a wearable electronic device assembly, including a wearable electronic device and a disassembling tool. The wearable electronic device includes a body and at least one wearing portion. The body includes a housing, a circuit module, and a battery module. And a base, wherein the circuit module is fixed inside the outer casing, the battery module is disposed inside the base, and the outer casing and the base are detachably connected. The wearing part is connected to the base, and the disassembling tool comprises a hand piece and a plurality of protrusions.

results.title: Wearable electronic circuit, DIY manufacturing method thereof and DIY suite
results.abstract: The invention provides a wearable electronic circuit, a DIY manufacturing method thereof and a DIY suite, and relates to the technical field of electronic circuits. The wearable electronic circuit provided by the invention comprises: a liquid metal line on the skin; the power supply and the at least one element are connected with the liquid metal circuit, and the power supply, the liquid metal circuit and the at least one element form a closed loop; an encapsulation layer covering the liquid metal line, the power supply, and the at least one component. The technical scheme of the invention can simply manufacture the wearable electronic circuit, has strong operability and is beneficial to meeting the individual requirements of users on the wearable electronic device.

results.title: Wearable device and manufacturing method thereof
results.abstract: The invention discloses a wearable device and a manufacturing method thereof and belongs to the wearable technical field. The wearable device comprises a fixing belt and a wearable device body connected with the fixing belt; the fixing belt is used for generating electric energy when being stressed; the electric energy generated by the fixing belt can be transmitted to the wearable device body so as to supply power for the wearable device body; and the fixing belt and the wearable device body can enclose a sealed circular ring. With the wearable device adopted, the problems of poor power supply ability of a battery and high cost of an existing wearable device can be solved, and ability for supplying power for the wearable device body can be improved, and cost can be decreased.

results.title: Electronics module and assembly comprising electronics module and fabric article
results.abstract: A main body (101) of the electronics module (100) comprising a processor. A biosignal detection portion (103) is connected to the main body (101). The biological signal detection portion (103) comprises at least one sensing component (109, 111) for detecting a biosignal from a wearer of the assembly (1). The sensing component (109, 111) is communicatively coupled to the processor. The wearable article (200) comprises a fabric layer (201) having an outer surface (202) and an inner surface (204). At least one opening (203, 205) extends through the fabric layer (201) from the outer surface (202) to the inner surface (204). At least part of the biological signal detection portion (103) extends through the opening (203, 205) such that the sensing component (109, 111) is positioned on the inner surface (204) of the fabric layer (201). The electronics module (100) is held to the wearable article (200) via the openings (203, 205).

results.title: Shell structure of wearable device and wearable device
results.abstract: The present disclosure relates to the field of electronic technology, and proposes a casing structure of a wearable device and the wearable device. The casing structure includes a first casing member, a second casing member and a sealing member, and the first casing member includes a top plate portion and a second casing member. a side plate part, the first side plate part is disposed along the peripheral outer edge of the top plate part; the first shell part and the second shell part are connected to form between the first shell part and the second shell part the accommodating cavity, the second housing part includes a bottom plate part and a second side plate part, the second side plate part is arranged along the peripheral outer edge of the bottom plate part, and the first side plate part and the second side plate part are clamped together; At least part of the side plate part is located inside the second side plate part, and the seal is sandwiched between the first side plate part and the bottom plate part, or at least part of the second side plate part is located inside the first side plate part, The seal is sandwiched between the second side plate portion and the top plate portion.

results.title: WEAR RING AND WEAR RING ARRANGEMENT
results.abstract: WEAR RING AND WEAR RING ARRANGEMENT. The present invention relates to a wear ring (10) for guiding two machine components (30, 32) movable with respect to each other along/around a movement axis (34), which it is formed from a piece of plastic or reinforced plastic material and which is split so that it has two free ends (14). The wear ring (10) has a cross-sectional width W, which at least sectionally increases in a radial direction towards the rear side of the wear ring (10). The wear ring has one or more recesses (24) formed on its front side (16) and/or on its rear side (18) to increase its deformability and thus facilitate its mounting in a mounting groove of a machine element ( 30, 32). The invention further relates to a wear ring arrangement having a wear ring fitted into a mounting groove (54) of one of the machine components (30, 32) of the wear ring arrangement (100).

results.title: Novel structure for fixing main wearable device body
results.abstract: The invention discloses a novel structure for fixing a main wearable device body. A wear (1) in the structure is a soft object with an inner cavity and can be stretched; two sides of the inner cavity of the wear (1) are hollowed out; the periphery is closed; and a snap ring (2) is embedded into one side, is made of a hard material and cannot be stretched. The main device body (3) is enclosed into the cavity from the other side of the wear, and is clung to the snap ring (2); and the snap ring (2) clamps the main device body (3). When the novel structure is used, one side of the wear (1) is clung to a body of a user and the other side is clamped by the snap ring (2), so that the main device body (3) is not extruded from the wear (1) to lose when the wearable device is used. The relatively good and feasible embodiment of the invention does not limit the protection range of the invention. Various deformations or mechanical applications carried out according to the embodiment are within the protection range of the technical scheme. The wear structure disclosed by the invention is reasonable in design; the main device body can be fixed into the wear under the premises of not affecting the product appearance and not changing the advantages that the product is convenient to dismantle, the wear can be changed and the like; and the problem that the main wearable device body is easily extruded from the wear to lose in use is effectively solved.
results.owner: 南宁米布斯电子科技有限公司

results.title: Wear Sensor
results.abstract: -16 Abstract A wear sensor (10) for measuring surface wear of a wear plate arrangement (15) having at least two wear plates (14) arranged side-by-side with a gap (60) therebetween, the wear sensor (10) including a body (12) adapted to locate the wear sensor (10) in a fitted condition at least partially within the gap (60) between the at least two wear plates (14), the body (12) including a wearable material (16) arranged in the fitted condition to wear correspondingly to surface wear of one or more wear surfaces (24) of the at least two wear plates (14). The wearable material (16) of the body includes an electric circuit (18) having one or more resistive elements (20) arranged within the wearable material (16) such that as the wearable material (16) wears the one or more resistive elements (20) become electrically decoupled from the electric circuit (18) thereby providing a measurable change in resistance indicative of the surface wear of the one or more wear surfaces (24). results.title: fingerprint recognition sensor
results.abstract: The utility model relates to a fingerprint recognition sensor. The fingerprint identification sensor includes: a circuit board with opposite first and second surfaces, and a plurality of welding pads are arranged on the first surface; a fingerprint identification chip is arranged on the first surface of the circuit board and has a working surface and connection surface, the working surface is used for contacting with fingers, and the connection surface is provided with electrical connection points; a conductive adhesive is used to electrically connect the circuit board pads and the electrical connection points of the fingerprint recognition chip; The conductive adhesive is arranged on the first surface of the circuit board and is located around the fingerprint recognition chip, so that a closed space is formed between the fingerprint recognition chip and the circuit board. The above-mentioned fingerprint identification sensor has good sealing performance to the conductive adhesive.
results.owner: 深圳市欧菲投资控股有限公司

results.title: Electronic Devices and Wearable Electronic Devices
results.abstract: The present invention provides an electronic device and a wearable electronic device, which can ensure antenna performance in a limited space. The wearable electronic device includes: a housing, a wearing part, a circuit board and a metal extension unit; the wearing part is coupled to the shell body; the circuit board is disposed in the housing, the circuit board has a grounding area and an antenna, the antenna is disposed on the first side of the circuit board; the metal extension unit is disposed outside the housing, and the metal extension unit is coupled to The grounding area meanders back and forth along the second side of the circuit board.
results.owner: 苏州佳世达电通有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint module and electronic equipment provided with the same
results.abstract: The invention relates to a fingerprint module and an electronic device provided with the fingerprint module. The fingerprint module comprises: a circuit board; a chip packaging structure, which is arranged on one side of the circuit board; side; the chip package structure includes a package body and a chip main body, the chip main body includes a first surface and a second surface; the first surface is embedded with a pad, the second surface is provided with solder balls, and the chip main body is provided with a penetration through the first surface and a second surface. The connection holes on the two surfaces, the pads and the solder balls are electrically connected through the connection holes. In the above fingerprint module, the pads on the chip body are electrically connected to the solder balls through the connection holes, so that the chip body and the circuit board are electrically connected, and there is no need to reserve the wiring space for the conductive connecting wires, thereby reducing the size of the fingerprint module. thickness. In addition, since the first surface of the chip body is exposed to the package body, it has a stronger penetration capability and supports setting a thicker cover plate.
results.owner: 南昌欧菲生物识别技术有限公司

results.title: Intelligent ring device
results.abstract: The utility model discloses an intelligent ring device, which comprises a shell, a main control module, a power supply module, a touch key module and a metal elastic contact; the shell is used for installing and fixing a main control module, a power supply module, a touch key module and a metal elastic contact, the power supply module is connected with the main control module through a lead, and the metal elastic contact is connected with the main control module through a lead; the touch key module is connected with the main control module through the metal elastic contact. The utility model has the advantages of simple structure and reasonable design, simplified user's wearing process, through the ring structure that can dismantle the change, effectively solved the not wearing adaptation problem of different finger sizes, further improved the comfort level and the convenience of device.

results.title: Wearable device, control method and control device thereof, and readable storage medium
results.abstract: The present application discloses a wearable device, a control method and a control device thereof, and a readable storage medium. The disclosed wearable device can be electrically connected to an electrical connection plug, and the wearable device includes a main body part and a button, wherein: the main body part opens There is an installation hole, a first electrical connection part is arranged in the installation hole, and the button is movably arranged in the installation hole; the wearable device has a first state and a second state, and when the wearable device is in the first state, the button is at least partially located in the installation hole. in the installation hole; when the wearable device is in the second state, the button avoids the installation hole, the electrical connection plug is at least partially located in the installation hole, and the electrical connection plug is electrically connected to the first electrical connection part. The above solution can solve the problem of low sealing performance of the wearable device.
results.owner: 维沃移动通信有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint Recognition Module and Manufacturing Method of Fingerprint Recognition Module
results.abstract: The present invention provides a fingerprint recognition module (2) comprising a fingerprint sensor device (20) having a sensing array (21) arranged on a first side of the device. The fingerprint sensor device also includes a connection pad 24 and a fingerprint sensor device cover structure 30 for connecting the fingerprint sensor device to an external circuit, the cover structure having a first face 32 configured to be contacted with a finger. And a second face 34 facing the sensing array, wherein the cover structure comprises a conductive trace 35 disposed on the second face to electrically connect the fingerprint sensor module to an external circuit, The surface area of the cover structure is larger than the surface area of the sensor device. The fingerprint sensor device also includes wire bonds 40, 66 that electrically connect the connection pads of the fingerprint sensing device to the conductive traces of the cover structure.

results.title: Fingerprint module, method for its manufacture and mobile terminal
results.abstract: A fingerprint module (100) comprising: a fingerprint chip (10) comprising an identification surface (11) and a connection surface (12) opposite the identification surface (11), wherein the surface identification (11) is configured to identify the fingerprint of a user; a circuit board (20) coupled to the connection surface (12); and a sealing adhesive (30) positioned between the circuit board (20) and the fingerprint chip (10), wherein the circuit board (20) comprises a conductive surface (23) attached to the connection surface ( 12) of the fingerprint chip (10), and a peripheral side surface (24) connected to a peripheral edge of the conductive surface (23), wherein an orthographic projection of the conductive surface (23) is located on the surface of connection (12), characterized in that the sealing adhesive (30) is arranged between the connection surface (12) and the peripheral side surface (24); and the circuit board (20) comprises a connecting layer (25) attached to the connecting surface (12) of the fingerprint chip (10) and an extension layer (26) attached to a peripheral edge of the layer of connection (25), wherein the conductive surface (23) is arranged in the connection layer (25), and the spreading layer (26) passes through the sealing adhesive (30) located at the peripheral edge of the layer connector (25) for electrically connecting to an external member.
