results.title: Connections for replaceable wear parts
results.abstract: The invention describes a device for connecting a replaceable wear part (4) to the front edge (22) of a device (1), wherein a support surface (21) is formed on the front edge (22), the support surface (21) Arranged to receive and secure a wear part holder (3), one of the wear part holder (3) and the wear part (4) is formed with an attachment protrusion (31), and the wear part retains The other of the tool (3) and the wearing part (4) is formed with a corresponding socket (43), and the attachment tab (31) and the socket (43) are provided with corresponding, cooperating guides part (32, 431), the guide part (32) of the wear part holder (3) is formed as a guide surface (32a, 32c, 32e), and the guide surface (32a, 32c, 32e) faces the The support surface (21) is inclined downwardly in a direction away from the leading edge (22) and relative to said support surface (21).
results.owner: 格兰集团营运挪威股份有限公司

results.title: Ring and method of use thereof
results.abstract: The present invention provides a ring, which includes a ring and a ring face. The outer surface of the ring is fixedly connected with an outer shell with an opening, and the lower surface of the ring face is fixedly connected with a cover matching the outer shell. The cover covers the outer shell. The opening is detachably connected with the outer casing. The ring surface of this ring can be disassembled from the ring to replace other styles of ring surfaces. If the wearer likes another ring surface, there is no need to buy a new complete ring, just use this ring surface. Save consumption.

results.title: A multifunctional smart wearable device
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a multifunctional intelligent wearable device. The ring body is composed of a protective layer, a device layer and a sweat-absorbing layer. The protective layer is arranged on the outer layer of the ring body, and the sweat-absorbing layer is arranged on the outer layer of the ring body. In the inner layer, the equipment layer is installed between the protective layer and the sweat-absorbing layer, the Bluetooth communication module is arranged at the bottom of the equipment layer, the GPS positioning device is installed on the right side of the Bluetooth communication module, and the three-axis acceleration sensor is arranged On the left side of the Bluetooth communication module, the environmental quality detector is installed in the middle of the left side of the ring body, the display screen is installed on the surface of the protective layer, the switch button is arranged on the right side of the display screen, and the three-axis The acceleration sensor, the environmental quality detector, the vibration sensor and the display screen are all electrically connected to the power supply through connecting wires. The multifunctional intelligent wearable device can effectively prolong the service life of the wearable device, and can be widely used.

results.title: A fingerprint sensor module including a fingerprint sensor device and a substrate connected to the sensor device
results.abstract: A fingerprint sensor module is provided that includes a fingerprint sensor device including a plurality of sensing elements for acquiring an image of a finger placed on a sensing surface of the sensor module. The sensor device includes trenches at the edges of the fingerprint sensor device, the trenches including conductive connection pads for connecting the sensor device to an external circuit. The module also includes a substrate including conductive traces and electrical components disposed on the substrate and in electrical contact with the conductive traces. The substrate is electrically and mechanically connected to the edge trench such that electrical connections are made between the sensor device and the electrical components of the substrate via the conductive traces. A method for manufacturing the described module is also provided.

results.title: Wearable device and how to use it
results.abstract: The present application relates to a wearable device and a method of using the same. The wearable device includes a main body, a processing circuit, a first electrode, and a second electrode; the first electrode and the second electrode are respectively electrically connected to the processing circuit, and the first electrode is electrically connected to the processing circuit. A measurement voltage is formed between the second electrode and the processing circuit to form a human electrocardiogram signal; the main body includes a casing structure to form an internal accommodation space, and a processing circuit is arranged in the accommodation space; the outer surface of the main body includes at least one first A detection area and a second detection area, the first electrode is arranged in contact with the first detection area, the second electrode is arranged in contact with the second detection area, and the first detection area and the second detection area are arranged in contact with each other. The detection area is electrically insulated, and the first detection area and the second detection area are separated by at least one housing structure. Through the isolation structure, the embodiment of the present invention can effectively avoid the problem of finger-arm contact during measurement, and effectively avoid the failure of measurement.
results.owner: 广东高驰运动科技有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint sensing packaging module
results.abstract: fingerprint sensing package module comprises a substrate, a fingerprint sensing chip, multiple metal wires, and an insulating package, wherein the substrate comprises a mounting surface and multiple circuit contacts arranged on the mounting surface, the fingerprint sensing chip is arranged on the mounting surface of the substrate, the fingerprint sensing chip has a  th surface back to the mounting surface, a sensing area located on the  th surface, and multiple electrical contacts arranged on the  th surface and adjacent to the periphery of the sensing area, the distance between the electrical contacts and the sensing area is less than 300 μm, the metal wires are bridged between the circuit contacts and the electrical contacts, the insulating package covers the mounting surface of the substrate, the fingerprint sensing chip and the metal wires, and the insulating package forms a slot for exposing the sensing area.
results.owner: 同欣电子工业股份有限公司

results.title: An electronic wearable device
results.abstract: The utility model discloses an electronic wearable device, which is composed of a body and a ring belt. The body is composed of a mobile communication circuit, a user identification circuit, a processor circuit, a monitor circuit and a power supply circuit. The mobile communication circuit, user identification The circuit and the monitor circuit are connected to the processor circuit, and the mobile communication circuit, user identification circuit, processor circuit and monitor circuit are connected to the power supply circuit. Compared with the prior art, the electronic wearable device provided by the utility model can provide the geographic location information of the electronic wearable device, can provide the wearing information of the user of the electronic wearable device, and can Send out alarm prompts and provide location information to win valuable time for finding users.

results.title: Electronic and wearable device
results.abstract: The present disclosure provides an electronic device (100) and a wearable device (10) with an elastomeric member (150). The electronic device includes a housing (110), a key (140) connected to the housing (110) and movable relative to the housing (110) when pressed, a circuit board (180) connected to the housing (110), a trigger structure (170) electrically connected to the circuit board (180).The elastomeric member includes a first connection (151) electrically connected to the circuit board (180) and a second connection (153) abutted on the key (140). The key (140), the first connection (151), and the second connection (153) are conductive to the circuit board (180). When the key (140) is pressed, the elastomeric member (150) can generate two level of deformation and causing the second connection (153) to switch from a state spaced apart from the trigger structure (170) to a state contacting the trigger structure (170).
results.owner: Guangdong Oppo Mobile Telecommunications Corp., Ltd.

results.title: Wear assembly for earth moving machine
results.abstract:
Wear assembly (1) comprising a wear tooth (2) comprising a wall (4) that defines a pocket (6) and at least one through hole (8, 8') communicating with the pocket, an adapter (10) with a connection point (12) inserted into the pocket (6) in a removable manner and defining a pin cavity (14) aligned with the through hole (8, 8'), a blocking pin (16) between the tooth (2) and adapter (10), inserted in the through hole (8, 8') and in the pin cavity (14) rotatably and comprising at least a first blocking element (18), and a second blocking element (20, 20') associated to the wear tooth (2) or to the adapter (10). 
     The elements (18, 20, 20') are mutually arranged in such a way that, through rotation of the blocking pin (16) in a direction, the first blocking element (18) intercepts the second (20, 20') to block the pin in the pin cavity (14). In addition, one of said elements (20, 20') is deformable so that, through a further rotation in the same direction, this element disengages from the other element (18) allowing the extraction of the pin from the cavity.

results.title: WEAR ASSEMBLY
results.abstract: A wearable assembly for use in various types of equipment for working on floors that includes a base with a support portion, a wearable element with a cavity in which the support portion is received, and a lock to ensure with ability to disengage the wearable element to the base. The support portion is formed with upper and lower recesses that receive complementary projections of the wear element. These recesses and projections include holes aligned to receive and locate the lock centrally within the wear assembly and away from the wear surface. The hole in the wear element is defined by a wall that includes a retention structure provided with an upper support surface and a lower support surface to make contact with the lock and retain the lock against up and down movements in the hole. The lock includes a mounting component that defines a threaded opening to receive a threaded bolt that is used to retain, with the possibility of releasing, the wear element to the base. The separate mounting component can be easily manufactured and secured within the wearable element at a lower cost and with higher quality than if the threads were formed directly on the wear element.

results.title: A kind of intelligent wearable device
results.abstract: The utility model provides a kind of intelligent wearable device, belongs to field of intelligent wear.The utility model includes object wearing device, the object wearing device is intended to be worn in hand, the object wearing device includes front end portion, middle section and rear end part, the front end portion two sides are respectively equipped with the first detection device, the middle section is equipped with the contained structure for chip placement, the rear end part is equipped with second detection device, first detection device, second detection device is connected with the chip respectively, first detection device, second detection device is ring structure, first detection device is intended to be worn on finger, the second detection device is intended to be worn in wrist, the intelligent wearable device of the utility model, structure is simple, it can be convenient the detection to vital sign.
results.owner: 武汉融卡智能信息科技有限公司

results.title: External case for a wearable medical device
results.abstract: A case for a wearable medical device is provided. The wearable medical device includes internal circuitry enclosed within an external housing. The case includes a first part sized to surround a first portion of the external housing and a second part sized to surround a second portion of the external housing. The first part includes an inner surface with contours configured to receive corresponding contours of the external housing. The first part is connected to the second to form a parting line around the external housing. An assembly including a wearable medical device and an external case is also provided.

results.title: A wearable device for monitoring human body signs
results.abstract: The invention provides a wearable device for monitoring human body signs, which belongs to the field of human health. In particular, it relates to a wearable device worn on the body for monitoring signs. It includes a wearable component and a monitor. The monitor is correspondingly screwed and placed in the wearable component. The monitor includes a ring-shaped housing. The housing is equipped with a sign collection component and a wireless transmission module. The sign collection component installed inside the housing passes through the wireless transmission module and The mobile terminal is connected to form data interaction, which is characterized in that: the annular shell and the wearable component are connected by threads, the lithium battery is embedded in the annular shell, and the wearable component includes a mounting ring, a connecting belt, a waist guard, a connecting buckle, an elastic Belt, the installation ring is a ring structure, and the inner wall is provided with a thread structure, the outer wall of the installation ring is provided with a plurality of fitting planes, and the fitting planes are provided with snap-in slots, the snap-in slots are open slots, and the connecting buckles correspond to snap-in slots. The buckle is placed in the card slot, which can be quickly put on and installed through multi-point connections to improve the comfort of transmission.
results.owner: 河南建保盒子科技发展有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint sensor module and method for manufacturing a fingerprint sensor module
results.abstract: There is provided a fingerprint sensor module (102) comprising a fingerprint sensor device (200) comprising a sensing array (204) and at least one connection pad (206) for electrically connecting the fingerprint sensor device to external circuitry, the sensing array and connection pad being located on a first side of the fingerprint sensing device; at least one electrically conductive via connection (302) arranged adjacent to the fingerprint sensor device and in electrical contact with the connection pad via at least one conductive trace (304) located in the same plane as the connection pad; a mold layer (306) arranged to cover a backside (308) of the fingerprint sensor device and to fill a volume between the fingerprint sensor device and the via connection, wherein an end portion (310) of the via connection is exposed for connecting the fingerprint sensor module to external circuitry. There is also provided a method for manufacturing such a fingerprint sensor module.

results.title: Wearable computing device having a multi-band slot antenna and a grounded parasitic element
results.abstract: A wearable computing device is provided. The wearable computing device includes a printed circuit board and a conductive housing. The wearable computing device further includes a slot antenna defined by a gap between the printed circuit board and the conductive housing. The slot antenna is operable at a plurality of different frequency bands. The plurality of different frequency bands include one or more global position system frequency bands. The wearable computing device includes a parasitic element. The parasitic element is electrically grounded to the printed circuit board at a plurality of different locations.

results.title: Wearable device including structure for preventing noise caused by static electricity
results.abstract: A wearable device is provided. The wearable device, which is used by being attached to a user's skin, includes: a main body unit including a housing and a substrate, the substrate being arranged inside the housing; an electrode unit including a sensing electrode connected to the main body unit; and a patch unit including one or more conductive members, the one or more conductive members being configured to electrically connect the electrode unit to the user's skin, wherein the electrode unit includes a shielding layer not to be electrically connected to the main body unit, the shielding layer being conductive and floating.

results.title: A wearable electronic device comprising an antenna
results.abstract: Disclosed is a wearable electronic device. A wearable electronic device according to an embodiment includes a display, a metal frame surrounding the display and forming at least a part of a side surface of the wearable electronic device, a battery, a conductive support member disposed under the display and supporting the battery, a PCB, A conductive fastening member for coupling the conductive support member and the PCB, a wireless communication circuit, and a switch circuit electrically connected to the wireless communication circuit, wherein the PCB is a first ground electrically connected to the metal frame, the A second ground spaced apart from the first ground, and a non-conductive region surrounding the second ground, the conductive fastening member electrically contacting the second ground of the PCB, and the switch circuit comprises the first ground and It is electrically connected to the second ground, and the wireless communication circuit may control the switch circuit to change a connection state. Other embodiments are possible.

results.title: Fingerprint identification device and manufacturing method of fingerprint identification device
results.abstract: The present application provides a fingerprint identification device, which includes: a fingerprint sensing module, including a substrate, a sensing portion and a binding portion located on the same side of the substrate, and the binding portion is electrically connected to the sensing portion; a circuit board, which is arranged on the side of the substrate where the binding part is arranged, and the circuit board includes circuit wiring; an adhesive layer is arranged between the fingerprint sensing module and the circuit board and is completely Covering the surface of the fingerprint sensing module facing the circuit board, the adhesive layer includes an anisotropic conductive area and a non-conductive area, and the anisotropic conductive area covers the binding portion for making the the binding part is electrically connected to the circuit trace; and a processor is disposed on the side of the circuit board away from the adhesive layer, the processor is electrically connected to the circuit trace, so that the processing The device is electrically connected to the fingerprint sensing module for driving the fingerprint sensing module. The present application also provides a manufacturing method of a fingerprint identification device.
results.owner: 业成科技（成都）有限公司

results.title: Wearable electronic equipment
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a wearable electronic device, which comprises a shell, an electrode and a main board, wherein the shell is provided with a through hole; the electrode is provided with a conductive column and an electrode main body, the electrode main body is attached to the outer surface of the shell, and the conductive column extends into the shell from the through hole; the mainboard sets up in the casing, be provided with on the mainboard with lead electrically conductive hole of electrical pillar assorted, electrically conductive hole with circuit formation electricity in the mainboard is connected, it inserts to lead electrically conductive downthehole so that the electrode with the mainboard electricity is connected. The utility model discloses a wearable electronic equipment leads electrical pillar through setting up on the electrode to set up on the mainboard and lead the electrical conductivity hole that the electrical conductivity post phase-match and can electrically conduct, directly with the electrically conductive downthehole electrically conductive that can realize electrode and mainboard on the mainboard of electrode is pegged graft, easy operation is convenient and connect accurate reliable.
results.owner: 青岛歌尔智能传感器有限公司

results.title: A ring based on ergonomics
results.abstract: The utility model is a finger ring based on ergonomics, which comprises: a box body, which is hollow inside, for accommodating a circuit board; a first button is arranged on one side of the box body, and is connected with the circuit board inside the box body to sending out electric signals; the second button is arranged on the other side of the box body and is connected with the inner circuit board of the box body to send out electric signals. The utility model is convenient for fingers to control the finger ring through the cooperation of the first button and the second button.
results.owner: 北京行云时空科技有限公司

results.title: Manufacturing method of fingerprint sensing package module
results.abstract: A fingerprint sensing package module includes a substrate, a fingerprint sensing chip, a plurality of metal wires, and an insulating package body. The substrate includes a mounting surface and a plurality of circuit contacts arranged on the mounting surface. The fingerprint sensor chip is arranged on the mounting surface of the substrate, and the fingerprint sensor chip has a first surface opposite to the mounting surface, a sensing area located on the first surface, and a plurality of sensors arranged on the first surface and Adjacent to the electrical contacts at the periphery of the sensing area, the distance between the electrical contacts and the sensing area is less than 300 microns. The metal wires are connected across the circuit contacts and the electrical contacts. The insulating packaging body covers the mounting surface of the substrate, the fingerprint sensing chip and the metal wires, and the insulating packaging body is formed with a slot for exposing the sensing area.
results.owner: 同欣電子工業股份有限公司

results.title: Wearable device and its storage case
results.abstract: The present disclosure relates to a wearable device and a storage box thereof. The wearable device is internally provided with a non-contact inductive matching element, and the non-contact inductive matching element can be used when the wearable device is placed in the storage box. , sense the non-contact sensing element disposed in the storage box; wherein, when the wearable device is determined to be placed in the storage box, it switches from a normal working state to a sleep state; and, the wearable device When it is determined that the device is taken out from the storage box, the device switches from the sleep state to the normal working state. Through the technical solution of the present disclosure, the wearable device can automatically work in different cycles to reduce power consumption, thereby achieving the purpose of power saving; meanwhile, the reliability of the switch control of the wearable device can be improved, and user misoperation can be avoided. In addition, it can improve the system robustness of the wearable device.
results.owner: 北京小米移动软件有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint sensing module and smart card
results.abstract: A fingerprint sensing module and a smart card are provided. A fingerprint sensing module comprising a fingerprint sensor arrangement having a sensing array arranged on a first side of the fingerprint sensor arrangement is provided. The fingerprint sensor device further includes connection pads for connecting the fingerprint sensor device to external circuitry and a fingerprint sensor device cover structure having a first side configured to be touched by a finger and a second side facing the sensing array, wherein The covering structure includes conductive traces arranged on the second side for electrically connecting the fingerprint sensing module to an external circuit, and wherein a surface area of the covering structure is larger than a surface area of the sensor device. Furthermore, the fingerprint sensor device includes wire bonds electrically connecting the connection pads of the fingerprint sensor device to the conductive traces of the overlying structure.

results.title: Portable Wearable Input Apparatus
results.abstract: A portable wearable input apparatus and method are provided for furnishing input to one or more devices. The portable wearable input apparatus comprises a wearable unit, for example, a mitten, a finger band, etc., configured to conform to a wearer's body part, keystroke registering units detachably disposed on the wearable unit, a mounting unit, and removable electrical connectors. The chamber accommodates the wearer's body part, for example, the wearer's hand. A thumb opening is disposed alongside the chamber of the wearable unit for passing the wearer's thumb. The keystroke registering units enable the wearer to register keystrokes on activation. The mounting unit is in electric communication with the keystroke registering units. The mounting unit mechanically supports the keystroke registering units and transmits the registered keystrokes to the devices. The removable electrical connectors are in electric communication with the mounting unit for transmitting the registered keystrokes as input to the devices.

results.title: Electronic Device and Wearable Device with Elastomeric Member
results.abstract: The present disclosure relates to an electronic device and a wearable device with an elastomeric member. The electronic device includes a housing, a key, a circuit board, a trigger structure and the elastomeric member. The key is connected to the housing and movable relative to the housing when pressed. The circuit board is connected to the housing. The trigger structure is electrically connected to the circuit board. The elastomeric member includes a first connection and a second connection, the first connection being electrically connected to the circuit board, the second connection being abutted on the key. The key, the first connection, and the second connection are conductive to the circuit board. When the key is pressed, the elastomeric member is capable of generating two level of deformation and causing the second connection to switch from a state spaced apart from the trigger structure to a state contacting the trigger structure.
results.owner: Guangdong Oppo Mobile Telecommunications Corp., Ltd.

results.title: Fingerprint sensing module and method
results.abstract: A fingerprint sensing module (2) is provided comprising a fingerprint sensing device (20) having a sensing array (21) located on a first side (22) of the fingerprint sensing device. The fingerprint sensing device includes a connection pad (24) for connecting the fingerprint sensing device to an external circuit and a fingerprint sensing device cover structure (30), wherein the cover structure is configured to be touched by a finger, It has a first side (32) thereby forming the sensing surface of the fingerprint sensing module and a second side (34) facing the sensing array, wherein the cover structure externalizes the fingerprint sensing module. A conductive trace (35) is provided on the second side of the cover structure for electrically connecting to a circuit. Also, the surface area of the cover structure is larger than the surface area of the fingerprint sensing device. The fingerprint sensing device also includes wire bonds (40, 66) for electrically connecting the connection pads of the fingerprint sensing device to the conductive traces of the cover structure.   [Selection diagram] FIG.
results.owner: フィンガープリント カーズ アクティエボラーグ

results.title: Wearables and Headphones
results.abstract: A wearable device includes a body, a detection module and a controller. The detection module is arranged on the body, and includes an upper shell and a lower shell opposite to each other and a distance sensor. The lower case has elastic material. The distance sensor is disposed on the upper casing to measure the distance from the distance sensor to the elastic material. The controller is electrically connected to the detection module. The elastic material has a contact surface for the user to contact when wearing the wearable device, so as to switch the active mode and the standby mode of the wearable device. The present disclosure further includes an earphone.
results.owner: 美律电子(深圳)有限公司

results.title: A kind of touch circuit board and wearable device
results.abstract: The invention discloses a touch circuit board and a wearable device. Wherein, the touch circuit board includes at least one touch key, an antenna, at least one first connection terminal and two second connection terminals; the touch key is arranged on the touch plane of the touch circuit board; the The first connection terminal and the second connection terminal are arranged in the connection area of the touch circuit board, and the first connection terminal is electrically connected to the touch key, and the two second connection terminals are connected to the touch key. Both ends of the antenna are electrically connected. The invention solves the problem that two discrete components occupy a lot of space by integrating the antenna into the touch circuit board, and realizes the effect of reducing space occupation.
results.owner: 北京大明五洲科技有限公司

results.title: A multifunctional finger wearable device capable of simulating a mouse
results.abstract: A multifunctional finger wearable device capable of simulating a mouse, including three independent finger wearable devices that can be worn on the fingertips or in the fingers; the finger wearable device has two wearing methods, namely, wearing on the fingertips and wearing The way in the middle of the finger; the device includes a device main body and a wearing fixing part, wherein each device includes: a single-chip microcomputer, located in the device main body; a hook and loop fastener, located between the device main body and the wearing fixing part and connected Both; the pressure sensor group, located on the Velcro tape of the inner test; the gravity sensor, located in the cuboid of the wearing and fixing part; the wireless communication module and the cursor moving module, located inside the main body of the device; the groove for disassembling and installing the battery is located in the main body of the device Internally; when simulating a mouse, each of the devices is worn on selected three fingers in a certain wearing manner, and each finger triggers a mouse button and operates the device with shaking.

results.title: Fingerprint sensor module and portable electronic device with the module
results.abstract: A fingerprint sensor module and a portable electronic device having the same are provided, the fingerprint sensor module includes: a fingerprint sensor master material, the fingerprint sensor and a metal pad separated from the fingerprint sensor are mounted on the upper part of the substrate; a first conductive A filler bonded to a lower surface of the metal pad; a metal connection portion bonded to a lower portion of the first conductive filler; and a solder ball bonded to an end portion of the metal connection portion.
results.owner: 韩国科泰高科株式会社

results.title: Comprehensive wearable vital signs monitor
results.abstract: A finger wearable device for monitoring vital signs at a finger includes a housing, a finger cuff, a plurality of vital sign sensors, and an electrocardiogram (ECG) sensor. The housing includes an interface surface for pressing against the finger. The finger cuff attaches to the housing and has a size and a shape to secure the housing to the finger and force the interface surface against the finger when the finger cuff is worn around the finger. The vital sign sensors are disposed in or on the housing and orientated to measure the vital signs from the finger of a wearer. The ECG sensor is disposed in or on the housing and coupled to first and second electrodes to measure ECG signals. The second electrode is disposed on the interface surface.

results.title: Oximeter and storage box
results.abstract: The invention discloses an oximeter and a storage box, comprising: the ring, the controller and the sensor; the finger ring comprises a first part and a second part, wherein the first part is of an annular structure and is provided with a notch, the second part is matched with the notch, and the first part and the second part are detachably connected to form an annular accommodating cavity for accommodating a finger; the sensor is arranged on the inner side of the first part and is used for collecting human health data; the controller is arranged in the first part and used for receiving the human health data acquired by the sensor and determining the blood oxygen value of the human body according to the human health data. According to the technical scheme, the size of the second part of the ring can be flexibly selected, and the oximeter can be effectively worn on fingers with different thicknesses through the combination of the first part of the ring and the second parts with different sizes, so that the possibility of over-tightening wearing is reduced, the oximeter is prevented from falling off in the measurement process, the use of a wearer is facilitated, and the experience of the wearer is improved.
results.owner: 心核心科技(北京)有限公司

results.title: Multi-sided PCB for contact sensing
results.abstract: A wearable monitoring device can include an electronics module containing a printed circuit board (PCB) to which one or more sensors are coupled. The one or more sensors can include one or more contacting sensors and/or one or more non-contacting sensors. In some cases, the wearable monitoring device can include an onboard power supply (e.g., a battery) and a wireless communication antenna. The PCB can be constructed to specifically include the one or more sensors on a first side facing the skin of the user when the wearable monitoring device is being worn, allowing one or more processors, memory, and other components to be included on the opposite side facing away from the user. Certain components, such as the power supply and wireless communication antenna, can be spaced apart from the PCB and located opposite the PCB from the one or more sensors.

results.title: Ring-shaped bio-signal detection device
results.abstract: A ring-shaped biosignal sensing device according to an embodiment of the present invention includes: a first electrode 10 provided in a ring shape, made of a conductor, and fitted into a user's finger to make contact with the finger; a second electrode 20 assembled on the outside of the first electrode 10 and made of a conductor and in contact with the user's body; an insulating unit 30 including the first electrode 10 and insert-injected to maintain insulation between the first electrode 10 and the second electrode 20; and a control unit 40 disposed on the insulating unit 30, including a biometric sensor, and collecting biosignals when the second electrode 20 comes into contact with the user's body.

results.title: A kind of novel bone conduction finger ring
results.abstract: A kind of novel bone conduction finger ring comprising finger ring ontology and first communication device have a notch on the finger ring ontology, and two ends of the notch are provided with clamping protrusion, and the finger ring ontology is integrally in C font；First communication device bottom forms lug, the inside of lug has the clamping groove for the finger ring ontology that is cooperatively connected with the clamping protrusion, the first communication device includes shell, display unit, switch element, circuit board and a conductive gel, the circuit board is provided with bluetooth-communication unit, pickup unit and bone conduction vibrator, and the upper end of the conductive gel and the bone conduction vibrator fit, lower end is prominent from the bottom of the shell across the receiving hole of housing bottom.The damage to ear-drum can be greatly reduced using the osteoacusis finger ring, and can be used in the occasion of inconvenient operating handset.In addition, its element structure is simple, it is easily worked.
results.owner: 深圳中盾联投科技有限公司

results.title: Abstract pattern messaging wearable electronic device for wireless communication
results.abstract: Exemplary embodiments described herein include electronic bracelets (which may include any type of multiple components, elements, electrical circuits, etc.), circuit boards, etc. coupled to multiple electronic components A wearable electronic device is provided. One particular implementation of the wearable electronic device includes at least one electronic bead including a touch input device configured to receive a first touch input from a first user associated with the wearable electronic device, and at least one And a communication module in communication with one electronic bead. The communication module receives a first touch input from at least one electronic bead and includes a first message including first information indicating the first touch input and a first device identifier associated with the at least one electronic bead. Including a processor configured to transmit to the electronic device associated with the second user.
results.owner: インテル・コーポレーション

results.title: A wearable power bank
results.abstract: A wearable mobile power supply, comprising: a ring-shaped body, which is ring-shaped and has an opening, and at least one end thereof is provided with a receiving groove; a circuit board is accommodated in the receiving groove and has a power supply receiving space and an output port and an input port are respectively arranged at two ends of the annular body and electrically connected to the circuit board. To sum up, the wearable mobile power bank can not only be worn on the user's body, but also save space and be easy to carry, and is not easy to lose.

results.title: Wear-on type input device
results.abstract: This invention relates to a wear-on type input device, which includes a machine body. The machine body is connected with a battery membrane to form a ring-shaped area, which is fitted around the hand part of user through the battery membrane piece. Electric power is supplied by the battery membrane piece to a trace sensor and a wireless transmitter inside the machine body for enabling the trace sensor to sense the movement of an object (such as finger) acted on the machine body, thereby allowing the trace sensor to generate a control signal corresponding to the moving position of the object. The signal is then transmitted to the computer host through the wireless transmitter for performing the control of the cursor on the operation system window of the computer host.

results.title: Combined multi-band antenna of wearable wireless device
results.abstract: A wearable wireless device is disclosed. One embodiment of a wearable wireless device includes a circuit board, a housing body having a front surface and a rear surface configured to be closer to the user than the front surface when worn, a housing body accommodating the circuit board, a housing body electrically connected to the circuit board, A first antenna element, and a second antenna element electrically connected to the circuit board and positioned on a front surface of the housing body.

results.title: Fingerprint sensor component, electronic equipment and mobile phone
results.abstract: The utility model relates to a fingerprint sensor part, electronic equipment and mobile phone. A fingerprint sensor component, comprising: a substrate including a substrate top surface having a top surface conductor pattern, a substrate bottom surface having a bottom surface conductor pattern, and a via hole electrically connecting the top surface conductor pattern and the bottom surface conductor pattern; a fingerprint sensor die having die attach pads, a die top surface having a sensing surface, a die bottom surface, and side surfaces connecting the die top surface and the die bottom surface, wherein the die bottom surface of the fingerprint sensor die is bonded to the substrate top surface of the substrate, and the die attach pads are electrically connected to the top surface conductor patterns of the substrate; and a molding material covering the sensing surface and the side surfaces of the fingerprint sensor die and a portion of the base top surface of the base not covered by the fingerprint sensor die, the molding material exhibiting a convex shape on the sensing surface of the fingerprint sensor die.

results.title: A wearable positioning terminal
results.abstract: The present invention relates to the technical field of positioning terminals, in particular to a wearable positioning terminal, comprising a positioning terminal main body, a first wearing ring is arranged on the bottom left of the positioning terminal main body, and a first wearing ring is arranged on the bottom right side of the positioning terminal main body. Two wearing rings, the first wearing ring is connected to the second wearing ring through a wearing clip, an integrated circuit board is installed inside the circuit board installation cavity, and the inside of the circuit board installation cavity is located on the integrated circuit board A module board is arranged on the side, a control display screen is arranged on the inner upper side of the positioning terminal main body, and a main body protective cover is arranged on the upper side of the positioning terminal main body. The first wearing ring and the second wearing ring adopt a magnetic suction type. The method is connected with the wearing ferrule, so that the wearing and installation of the positioning terminal body is simple and convenient.
results.owner: 深圳市鸿怡科技有限公司

results.title: A wearable device with replaceable casing
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a wearable device with a replaceable casing. The device includes a casing, a movement box, a connecting pipe and a battery accommodating part, the casing is set on the upper part of the movement box, and the movement The box is connected to one end of the connecting pipe, the other end of the connecting pipe is connected to the battery container, a movement is arranged in the movement box, a battery is arranged in the battery container, and the battery Electrically connected with the movement. The movement box is detachably connected to the shell, and can be replaced in time when the shell is damaged or broken, and the shell can be designed in a variety of styles and colors. When the wearer needs to change the appearance of the wearable device, there is no need to replace it The host chip can ensure that the shell can be replaced at will under the premise that the device data remains continuous. At the same time, since the host chip does not need to be replaced, the cost of changing the appearance of the product is also greatly reduced.

results.title: Wearable device and its control method and control device
results.abstract: The present application discloses a wearable device, comprising a main body part, a connection belt and a detachable module, the connection belt is connected with the main body part, the main body part includes a functional module and a first battery, the detachable module and the main body part are detachable connected, the detachable module includes a second battery; among the main body and the detachable module, one is provided with a movable operation part, the other is provided with a plug hole, and the operation part includes an operation button and an operation button Connected plug-in rod, the plug-in rod can move between the first position and the second position with the operation button, and when the plug-in rod is in the first position, the detachable module and the main body are connected with each other through the plug-in rod. The plug-in holes of the plug-in holes are connected with each other, and the second battery is electrically connected with the function module; when the plug-in rod is in the second position, the plug-in rod and the plug-in hole are separated, and the first battery and the function module are connected. electrical connection. The above solution can solve the problem that the current wearable device cannot work continuously for a long time.
results.owner: 维沃移动通信有限公司

results.title: A kind of fingerprint sensor, fingerprint sensing module and electronic equipment
results.abstract: The present invention provides a fingerprint sensor, comprising a capacitive sensing unit, the front of the capacitive sensing unit is provided with at least one through hole, a groove or a boss, and the projection of the groove in the vertical direction is on the surface of the concave In the opening of the groove, or the projection of the boss in the vertical direction is in the contact surface between the boss and the capacitive sensing unit. In addition, the present invention also provides a fingerprint sensing module and an electronic device, wherein the fingerprint sensing module includes the above-mentioned fingerprint sensor and a device for encapsulating the fingerprint sensor in the cavity. The package body, the insulating cover plate covering the package body, the circuit board, and the circuit connection end of the fingerprint sensor pass through the package body and are connected to the circuit board. By setting through holes, grooves or bosses on the front of the capacitance sensing unit, the existing two-dimensional induction electric field is changed into a three-dimensional induction electric field, which increases the effective area of the capacitance sensing unit to receive the electric field and improves the intensity of the induction electric field .

results.title: Wearable electronic device and core module thereof
results.abstract: The invention provides a core module of a wearable electronic device, which includes a frame, a battery unit and a circuit board. The frame defines an accommodating space and includes a plurality of first engaging parts. The battery unit is fixed in the accommodation space. The circuit board includes a communication module and a plurality of second engaging parts. The accommodating space is facing the circuit board, and the first engaging part is respectively engaged with the second engaging part to fix the frame on the circuit board and fix the battery unit between the frame and the circuit board. Meanwhile, the present invention provides a wearable electronic device using the core module. The invention can effectively simplify the assembly efficiency of the core module, and the modular core module can be easily fitted into various covers of wearable electronic devices, thus improving the versatility of the core module.

results.title: ring
results.abstract: An embodiment of the present disclosure provides a finger ring, the finger ring includes: a circuit part, the circuit part is in the shape of a sleeve and is sleeved on a conductive ring body; the circuit part includes: a conductive wall body and a circuit module; the circuit module is arranged inside the conductive wall body and is electrically connected with the conductive wall body; conductive ring body, the conductive ring body is annular and is electrically connected with the circuit module; the connection part, the connection part is respectively connected with the circuit part and the conductive ring body; wherein, the circuit module, the conductive wall body and the conductive ring body The body forms an antenna circuit. The conductive wall body of the finger ring in the embodiment of the present disclosure is used as an antenna radiator, and no additional material is required, and the circuit module is covered by the conductive wall body, so that interference between signals can be prevented.
results.owner: 北京字节跳动网络技术有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint sensor module and method for manufacturing fingerprint sensor module
results.abstract: A fingerprint sensor module (102) is provided, comprising: a fingerprint sensor device (200) including a sensing array (204) and at least one connection pad (206) for electrically connecting the fingerprint sensor device to an external circuit, A sense array and connection pads are located on a first side of the fingerprint sensing device; at least one conductive via connection (302) arranged adjacent to the fingerprint sensor device and connected via and At least one conductive trace (304) with pads in the same plane in electrical contact with the connection pads; a molding layer (306) arranged to cover the backside of the fingerprint sensor device (308) and fill the fingerprint sensor device with vias The space between the connections where the ends (310) of the via connections are exposed for connecting the fingerprint sensor module to an external circuit. A method for manufacturing such a fingerprint sensor module is also provided.

results.title: A fingerprint sensor, packaging method and application thereof
results.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of fingerprint sensor packaging, and discloses a fingerprint sensor, a packaging method and an application thereof. The fingerprint sensor includes a sensing part, a chip part and a cover plate; the sensing part includes a fingerprint sensing area and a non-sensing area, the chip part is arranged in the non-sensing area, and the chip part and the sensing part are connected through a conductive The circuit is electrically connected; the cover plate includes a cover plate body, and a mounting hole for accommodating and protecting the chip part is opened on the cover plate body, and the cover plate body is covered on the sensing part, and the mounting hole The opening faces the sensing part. The fingerprint sensor provided by the invention has excellent corrosion resistance, high temperature resistance and wear resistance, and avoids deformation during subsequent reliability tests.
results.owner: 广东绿展科技有限公司

results.title: A smart wearable device and its SIP packaging module
results.abstract: The utility model discloses an intelligent wearable device and a SIP packaging module thereof. The substrate of the SIP packaging module has an A connection surface and a B connection surface arranged opposite to each other, and a B connection surface packaging part is arranged on the B connection surface. There are two adapters connected, one adapter is connected to the A connection surface, and the other adapter is connected to the B connection surface. The two adapters are respectively welded on the A connection surface and the B connection surface of the substrate, which not only ensures the normal realization of the function of the SIP package module of the present invention, but also effectively reduces the size of the SIP package module. It can meet the space requirements of the product.
results.owner: 歌尔微电子股份有限公司

results.title: GLOVE FOR ACTIVATING A CAPACITIVE TYPE TOUCH DEVICE
results.abstract: 1. A glove containing a part covering the palm of the wearer and at least one compartment (1) covering at least one finger of the specified owner, and at least one compartment (1) for the finger has an inner lining (2), in which it is assumed to place the finger, the tab (3) surrounding the specified inner lining, and the outer shell (4) surrounding the specified tab, while the specified compartment also has a part for attaching the tab between the specified lining and the shell, and the specified fastener has a proximal edge connected with a lining (2), and a distal edge connected to the sheath (4), while the tab (3) is connected to the fastener between its proximal and distal edges, said glove being characterized in that the fastener has a proximal extension (12), passing inside the lining (2) to be in contact with the finger, and a distal extension (13) located on the outer surface of the shell (4), wherein The fastener provides electrical conductivity between the indicated proximal and distal extenders in order to actuate a capacitive type sensor device by bringing the distal extension (13) into contact with it using a finger in contact with the proximal extension (12) .2. A glove according to claim 1, characterized in that the tab (3) contains at least one impermeable and breathable membrane. A glove according to claim 1, characterized in that the distal extension (13) extends along at least a portion of the distal end of the finger compartment (1). The glove according to any one of claims 1 to 3, characterized in that the lining (2) contains

results.title: Wearable device made with silicone rubber and electronic components
results.abstract: A wearable device includes a wearable device structure at least partially made of a silicone rubber. A support member is at least partially positioned in the wearable device structure. ID circuitry is at least partially positioned and coupled to the support. One or more batteries coupled to the ID circuitry.

results.title: A fingerprint sensor module and electronic equipment
results.abstract: The invention discloses a fingerprint sensor module and electronic equipment. The fingerprint sensor module includes an FPC, a frame, a sensor chip, and a cover plate, wherein the frame is a hollow ring structure inside; the bottom of the frame is bonded The agent is bonded to the FPC to form a storage space inside the frame; the cover plate is located in the upper part of the storage space, and the sensor chip is located in the lower part of the storage space; the sensor chip The bottom surface of the sensor chip is bonded to the FPC through a conductive adhesive, and the top surface of the sensor chip is bonded to the cover plate through a non-conductive adhesive; the fingerprint sensor module is provided with a cover plate on the top of the sensor chip, thus It can be used for a long time, avoids wear and tear, has high surface hardness, high recognition accuracy and reliability, and good appearance.

results.title: Ring-type wearable terminal and manufacturing method thereof
results.abstract: A ring-type wearable terminal with improved strength is provided.   A ring-type wearable terminal is housed in a recess, a first ring having a recess formed on a side surface, a second ring bonded to the first ring and covering the recess. And a communication unit 26. The recess 16 is filled with an adhesive 24. The adhesive 24 filled in the recess 16 joins the first ring 12 and the second ring 14, and fixes the communication unit 26 to the recess 16 to protect it. Thereby, the intensity | strength of the ring-type wearable terminal 10 improves.   [Selection] Figure 4

results.title: Fingerprint module, manufacturing method and mobile terminal that carries it
results.abstract: A fingerprint module (100), comprising: a cover plate (10) comprising an inner surface (11); an adhesive (30); a fingerprint chip (20) pressed with heat on the inner surface (11) by the adhesive (30), the adhesive (30) making contact with the cover plate (10) and the fingerprint chip (20); a circuit board (40) coupled to one side of the fingerprint chip (20) opposite the cover plate (10), wherein the circuit board (40) is electrically coupled to the fingerprint chip (20); characterized in that the fingerprint module (100) further comprises: a board-to-board connector (60) to electrically couple the circuit board (40) to the fingerprint chip (20), comprising the board-to-board connector ( 60): a socket (61) welded on the fingerprint chip (20); and a plug (62) soldered on the circuit board (40) and which is electrically connected to the socket (61).
results.owner: Guangdong Oppo Mobile Telecommunications Corp Ltd

results.title: Wearable Manual Healthcare Device
results.abstract: The utility model is composed of a wearable element and a host. The wearing element defines a space that can be worn by the user, and further defines the space wall as an inner surface, and the other side opposite to the inner surface is an outer surface, so that the wearing element is respectively provided with penetrating The marking holes on the outer surface and the inner surface; the host is connected with a number of connecting wires capable of outputting microcurrent, and the free end of the connecting wires has a plug whose outer diameter is smaller than that of the marking hole, so that it can be combined with the required marking The hole enables the host to stimulate the corresponding acupoints of the human body with a micro-current through the connecting line, so that it has a health care effect, and has the function of saving time and labor and improving the convenience of operation.

results.title: Fingerprint module and electronic equipment equipped with the fingerprint module
results.abstract: The utility model relates to a fingerprint module and electronic equipment provided with the fingerprint module. The fingerprint module includes: a circuit board; a chip packaging structure arranged on one side of the circuit board; a cover plate covering the chip packaging structure away from the circuit board One side; the chip packaging structure includes a package body and a chip body, the chip body includes a first surface and a second surface; the first surface is embedded with a pad, the second surface is provided with a solder ball, and the chip body is opened with a hole that penetrates the first surface and the second surface. The connection hole on the second surface, the pad and the solder ball are electrically connected through the connection hole. In the above-mentioned fingerprint module, the pads on the chip main body are electrically connected to the solder balls through the connection holes, so that the chip main body is electrically connected to the circuit board without reserving a wiring space for conductive connecting wires, thereby reducing the footprint of the fingerprint module. thickness. In addition, since the first surface of the chip main body exposes the package body, it has a stronger penetrating ability and supports a thicker cover plate.
results.owner: 南昌欧菲生物识别技术有限公司

results.title: Wearable Body Temperature Monitoring Device and Method Thereof
results.abstract: The present disclosure illustrates a wearable body temperature monitoring device and a method thereof. The wearable body temperature monitoring device includes a hollow shell member and a circuit board. The hollow shell member includes a sensing surface and an outer surface opposite to each other, and the sensing surface is provided with hole. The circuit board is accommodated in the hollow shell member and includes a first side surface corresponding to the sensing surface and a second side surface corresponding to the outer surface. The circuit board is provided with a non-contact temperature sensor, a wireless transmission module, a processing unit, and a battery, and the non-contact temperature sensor is disposed at the first side surface and aligned with the hole of the sensing surface. The wearable body temperature monitoring device can respond the variation of the body temperature in real time when being attached on clothes.

results.title: Thumb-controllable finger-wearable computing devices
results.abstract: A finger-wearable computing device comprises a ring base configured to be worn on a finger of a wearer's hand, and a track pad supported by the ring base and configured to detect a location of engagement between a marker point on a thumb of the wearer's hand and the track pad. The finger-wearable computing device is configured to generate a command signal indicative of the location of engagement for controlling a component of the finger-wearable computing device or for controlling a remote electronic device.

results.title: Wearable mouse
results.abstract: The invention discloses a wearable mouse. The wearable mouse includes a mouse main body and a circuit module sets in the mouse main body. The mouse main body is used to fixed the wearable mouse on hand, it includes a fixing portion, a contain portion fixed on the fixing portion and a first finger ring, a second finger ring and a third finger ring. The wearable mouse fixed on the hand by the fixing portion. The contain portion contain the circuit module. Raising up the first finger ring to realize a first function. Raising up the second finger ring to realize a second function. Raising up the first finger ring and make the third finger ring away from the first finger ring to realize a third function. Raising up the first finger ring and make the third finger ring close to the first finger ring to realize a forth function.

results.title: Wearable device, control method and control device of wearable device
results.abstract: The application discloses a wearable device, a control method of the wearable device and a control device of the wearable device. The disclosed wearable device comprises a main body part, a connecting belt and a detachable module, wherein the connecting belt is connected with the main body part, the main body part comprises a functional module and a first battery, and the detachable module comprises a second battery; the detachable module can be installed in the installation groove through the port and is detachably connected with the main body part; under the condition that the detachable module is connected with the main body part, the detachable module is in spacing fit with the main body part in the direction of the port of the mounting groove, the second battery is electrically connected with the functional module, and under the condition that the detachable module is separated from the main body part, the first battery is electrically connected with the functional module. The wearable equipment in the background art can not carry out the problem of the continuous work of long time can be solved to above-mentioned scheme.
results.owner: 维沃移动通信有限公司

results.title: Wearables and their storage cases
results.abstract: The present disclosure relates to a wearable device and its storage box. The wearable device is provided with a non-contact inductive matching element inside, and the non-contact inductive matching element can be used when the wearable device is put into the storage box. , sensing a non-contact sensing element arranged in the storage box; wherein, when the wearable device is determined to be placed in the storage box, it switches from a normal working state to a sleep state; and, the wearable device When the device is determined to be taken out of the storage box, it switches from the sleep state to the normal working state. Through the technical solution of the present disclosure, the wearable device can automatically work in different cycles to reduce power consumption, thereby achieving the purpose of power saving; at the same time, the reliability of switch control of the wearable device can be improved, and user misoperation can be avoided. In addition, the system robustness of wearable devices can be improved.
results.owner: 北京小米移动软件有限公司

results.title: Input system and wearable electrical device for the system
results.abstract: The invention relates to an input system and a wearable electrical device used in the system. A wearable input device (1) is worn on a user's finger to detect contact and separation of the finger with another body part of the user, respectively, and also to measure the motion of the finger. In the wearable input device (1), the signal supply unit (15) supplies electric signals to the signal electrode pair (11a, 11b) worn on the user's finger, and the current sensor (13) detects the current flowing between the signal electrodes . Contact and separation are detected based on the detected current. In addition, a three-axis acceleration sensor (18) detects finger movements. User input is determined by extracting only motion traces of a finger detected when the finger is in contact with another body part.

results.title: Wearable accessory and circuit protection module provided therein
results.abstract: A wearable accessory according to the present invention comprises: a device mounting part formed to be coupled to a device; and a body binding part extending in a longitudinal direction from the device mounting part, wherein the body binding part comprises: a flexible cell including an electrode assembly, an exterior member for accommodating the electrode assembly, and a cell terminal connected to the electrode assembly and protruding from an opposite side of a side adjacent to the device mounting part; a connection circuit extending in connection with a main circuit module formed in the device or the device mounting part; and a protection circuit module configured to connect the cell terminal and the connection circuit to each other, and to cut off electrical connection of the cell terminal and the connection circuit in the case of damage by an external force.

results.title: Contact pad
results.abstract: A contact pad 103 as might be part of an electronics module (100, figures 4-5) for a wearable article. The contact pad 103 is shaped to accommodate an electronics component, preferably in the form of a recess 171 for receiving the component. The component might be a sensor such as a temperature sensor. The pad might comprise a conductive, elastomeric material, and surface of the pad may be ribbed (155, figure 18), to enable connection with connectors on the wearable article (211, 215, figures 1-2); so the pad may be used to connect an electronics module to sensors integrated into a so-called ‘smart garment’ (10, figure 1). The pad may comprise a protrusion 173 for interfacing with the electronics of the module (figures 7-8). Also claimed is an electronics module comprising such a pad and a wearable article comprising such an electronic module.

results.title: A ring cover structure suitable for fingers of different thicknesses and its application method
results.abstract: A ring cover structure suitable for fingers of different thicknesses, comprising a ring, a support seat, a spring, and a signal receiver; it is characterized in that the ring is provided with through holes, decorative grooves and openings; one end of the ring is connected to the support seat fixed together, the support seat is provided with a rotating shaft seat, the rotating shaft seat is provided with a rotating shaft, a slot is arranged in the middle of the rotating shaft, the top of the rotating shaft is barb-shaped, and the rotating shaft is provided with a symmetrical pin surface; one end of the spring A limiting ring is provided, and the spring can be set on the finger ring; the signal receiver is provided with a USB plug, and the size of the USB plug matches the size of the through hole. The invention solves the problem that rings need to be paired according to the size of the fingers, improves the adaptability of the wearable device, and can meet the needs of fingers of different thicknesses to be worn and used.
results.owner: 重庆市炙热科技发展有限公司

results.title: Wearable assembly (divisional application 97-2014)
results.abstract: <p> A WEARABLE ASSEMBLY FOR USE IN VARIOUS TYPES OF EQUIPMENT TO WORK IN SOILS THAT INCLUDES A BASE WITH A SUPPORT PORTION, A WEARABLE ELEMENT WITH A CAVITY IN WHICH THE SUPPORT PORTION IS RECEIVED, AND A WORK TO ENSURE WITH CAPACITY OF DISASSEMBLY THE WEAR-BASED ELEMENT. THE SUPPORT PORTION IS FORMED WITH UPPER AND LOWER BREAKS RECEIVING COMPLEMENTARY PROJECTIONS FROM THE WEARABLE ELEMENT. THESE BREAKS AND PROJECTIONS INCLUDE ALIGNED HOLES TO RECEIVE AND LOCATE THE WORK CENTRALLY INSIDE THE WEAR AND DISTANCED ASSEMBLY OF THE WEAR SURFACE. THE HOLE IN THE WEARABLE ELEMENT IS DEFINED BY A WALL THAT INCLUDES A RETENTION STRUCTURE PROVIDED WITH A SUPERIOR SUPPORT SURFACE AND A LOWER SUPPORT SURFACE TO CONTACT THE WORK AND RETAIN THE WORK AGAINST THE MOVING TOWARDS HOLE. THE WORK INCLUDES A MOUNTING COMPONENT THAT DEFINES A THREADED OPENING TO RECEIVE A THREADED BOLT THAT IS USED TO RETAIN, WITH THE POSSIBILITY OF RELEASING, THE WEAR-BASED ELEMENT. THE SEPARATE ASSEMBLY COMPONENT CAN BE MANUFACTURED EASILY AND INSURED WITHIN THE WEARABLE ELEMENT AT A LOWER COST AND WITH GREATER QUALITY THAT THREADS SHOULD BE FORMED DIRECTLY IN THE WEARABLE ELEMENT. </p>

results.title: Wearable Electronic Devices with Glass Housings
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device may include a display and a housing. The housing may include a housing defining a first portion of a rear exterior surface of the wearable electronic device, a first portion of a side exterior surface of the wearable electronic device, and an inner wall. The housing may also include a glass housing defining: a front wall positioned above the display and defining a front exterior surface of the wearable electronic device; and a side wall extending from the front wall And overlapping with the inner wall, the side wall defines a second portion of the side outer surface of the wearable electronic device. The wearable electronic device may also include a touch sensing system located within the housing and configured to detect touch input applied to the front exterior surface of the wearable electronic device.

results.title: Fingerprint module and mobile terminal
results.abstract: A fingerprint module (100) comprises a circuit board (1), a fingerprint chip (2), and a metal ring (3). The circuit board (1) comprises a conductive portion (11) and an isolation portion (12) surrounding around the conductive portion (11), and is used for isolating static electricity. The fingerprint chip (2) is disposed on the circuit board (1) and is electrically connected to the conductive portion (11). The metal ring (3) is sleeved on the peripheral side of the fingerprint chip (2). Also provided is a mobile terminal (200) using the fingerprint module.
results.owner: 广东欧珀移动通信有限公司

results.title: Case ring, cover plate assembly and electronic installation
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of case ring, cover plate assembly and electronic installation.Case ring includes basic ring, and basic ring has centre bore；The support chip to be extended internally with the medial surface from centre bore, the upper surface of support chip are provided with multiple projections, circumferentially-spaced distribution of multiple projections around basic ring.In the case ring of the utility model embodiment, cover plate assembly and electronic installation, fingerprint identification module can be housed in centre bore, and it is supported on multiple projections, projection can ensure the thickness of the viscose glue between the upper surface of support chip and fingerprint identification module, so that fingerprint identification module is Nian Jie with case ring firmly, so as to prevent fingerprint identification module from being come off from case ring.
results.owner: 广东欧珀移动通信有限公司

results.title: Wearable electronic device including band
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device may include: a housing including a front plate, a rear plate, and a side member surrounding an inner space between the front plate and the rear plate, wherein the side member includes at least one portion including an external opening and an inner channel connecting between the inner space and the external opening: an insulating structure inserted into the inner channel; a conductive path partially embedded in the insulating structure, wherein the conductive path includes a first end exposed to the inner space and a second end exposed to the external opening; at least one printed circuit board positioned in the inner space and electrically connected to the first end of the conductive path; a display exposed through the front plate; and a band structure connected to the portion of the housing and configured to be mounted on a portion of a human body. The band structure may include a conductive rod movably inserted into the external opening and electrically connected to the second end of the conductive path, and an electronic component at least partially embedded in the band structure and electrically connected to the conductive rod. Other various embodiments may also exist.

results.title: Wearable device with wireless communication device
results.abstract: The invention discloses a wearable device with a wireless communication device. The wearable device includes a dial part and a strap part; a circuit board and a battery are arranged in the dial part; the wireless communication device includes a grounding module and an antenna, and the grounding module is located at the circuit board and the dial part The grounding module is electrically connected to the main board of the circuit between the bottoms of the bottoms; the antenna is arranged on the dial part or the strap part, and the antenna is electrically connected to the main board of the circuit. The embodiment of the present invention provides a wearable device with a wireless communication device. By adding a grounding module, the grounding module is used to increase the main ground unit of the circuit board, so that the main ground unit of the circuit board itself can be compensated for by the reduction in the length of the circuit board. Defects that cannot meet the performance requirements of the antenna; in addition, using the grounding module to reduce the gap between the circuit board and the wearer's arm increases the current on the circuit board and the induced current between the arm, which is equivalent to extending the main ground of the whole machine. It is beneficial to improve the performance of the antenna.
results.owner: 广东小天才科技有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint module and electronic equipment provided with fingerprint module
results.abstract: The invention relates to a fingerprint module and an electronic device provided with the fingerprint module. The fingerprint module includes a circuit substrate and a chip. One side of the circuit substrate is provided with a connecting surface, and a part of the connecting surface is recessed to form an accommodating space with a bottom. The accommodating space The bottom of the fingerprint sensor is formed with a conductive surface facing the connection surface, the conductive surface is provided with a conductive structure, one end of the chip is accommodated in the accommodating space, and the other end of the chip protrudes out of the connection surface; the fingerprint module also includes a first sealant, the first sealant Filled between the inner sidewall of the accommodating space and the chip. In the above fingerprint module, the gap between the chip and the inner sidewall of the accommodating space is filled by the first sealant. Since the first sealant has a large filling space, the surrounding space of the part of the chip located in the accommodating space can be completely filled , to achieve high waterproof performance. Moreover, since the chip part is accommodated in the circuit substrate, the thickness of the fingerprint module is reduced, which is beneficial to the lightness and thinness of the electronic device provided with the fingerprint module.
results.owner: 南昌欧菲生物识别技术有限公司

results.title: Case and wearable device that can directly conduct charging current for wearable device
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a casing of a wearable device that can directly conduct charging current and the wearable device, wherein the casing of the wearable device that can directly conduct charging current comprises: a casing body; Electroless plating on the sidewall of the shell body, the conductive structure has an electrical connection area and a conductive area, the electrical connection area is configured to be connected or abutted with a charging power source, and the conductive area is configured to be connected to the wearable device circuit board connection or abutment. The technical scheme of the utility model is conducive to simplifying the internal structure of the wearable device and improving the compactness and reliability of the device, thereby greatly simplifying the production process of the wearable device and improving the production efficiency of the wearable device; at the same time, it is also conducive to the miniaturization and lightness of the wearable device. to improve user experience.
results.owner: 云伴网络科技(深圳)有限公司

results.title: Intelligent finger ring
results.abstract: The utility model discloses an intelligent finger ring, including the ring main part, the ring main part is two section upper and lower detachable assembled fitting modes the latter half of ring main part embeds has removable battery, be provided with adjustable regulation valve block and fixing device groove of wearing big small -size in the ring main part, the regulation valve block is aimed at fixing device groove press -fit connection, built -in among the intelligent finger ring have the battery, changes with regard to the dismountable when the battery uses up, and the battery continuation of the journey problem of product obtains solving like this, and the while still is provided with the adjustable regulation valve block of wearing big small -size, leaves the fixing device groove in the ring main part, impresses the fixing device groove of the regulation valve block alignment main part of suitable size hard and adorn, can adjust out not unidimensional ring, and the different accessories of just so having realized packing into in the same main part of ring become the function that the size was worn to the difference.
results.owner: 深圳市优诺斯科技有限公司

results.title: A portable ring U disk
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a portable finger ring U disk, which comprises a ring holder, the surface center of the ring holder is provided with a through hole; The part passes through the through hole and is detachably connected by the elastic piece. The elastic piece prevents the connecting part from breaking away from the through hole. There is a gap on the surface of the ring body. , the movable block is detachably installed with a data transmission module; the band, the bottom of the ring support is detachably connected with the band, since a through hole is opened on the surface of the ring support, the ring body is inserted through the connecting part, and the connecting part is blocked by an elastic piece When the ring body needs to be removed, press both sides of the ring body to pull up the ring body. During the disassembly process, the elastic part deforms and passes through the through hole, so that the ring and the ring body are detachable and can be worn The ring body can also be disassembled when the ring is used, and the data transmission module can be plugged into the USB interface by turning it.
results.owner: 深圳市优闪科技有限公司

results.title: Combined multiband antenna for wearable wireless devices
results.abstract: A wearable wireless device is disclosed. In one embodiment, a wearable wireless device includes a circuit board, a housing body that houses the circuit board, a housing body having a front surface and a back surface, and a back surface configured to be closer to the user than the front surface when mounted. And a first antenna element electrically connected to the circuit board and positioned on the front surface of the housing body, and a second antenna element electrically connected to the circuit board and positioned on the front surface of the housing body.
