results.owner: ホアウェイ・テクノロジーズ・カンパニー・リミテッド

results.title: Wearable remote control device and terminal system
results.abstract: The application relates to the technical field of wearable equipment, and provides a wearable remote control device and a terminal system. Wherein, wearable remote control unit includes: remote control ring, remote control receiving assembly. The remote control ring includes: first communication chip, response subassembly, ring casing. The ring shell comprises an outer ring shell and an inner ring shell, and the outer ring shell is clamped with the inner ring shell to form an annular hollow shell. The induction component is arranged on the inner side of the outer ring shell and used for receiving control operation of a user. The first communication chip is arranged on the inner side of the inner ring shell, is electrically connected with the sensing assembly and is used for sending control information to the remote control receiving assembly according to control operation. The control receiving assembly is in communication connection with the terminal to be controlled and is used for controlling the terminal to be controlled according to the received control information. Adopt the wearable remote control device that this application provided, need not to contact with the terminal that treats the control, also can operate the terminal that treats the control. The probability of cross infection during the epidemic period is reduced, and the prevention and control of epidemic diseases are facilitated.
results.owner: 陕西科技大学镐京学院

results.title: An electronic ring with variable inner diameter
results.abstract: The utility model relates to an electronic finger ring with a variable inner diameter, which comprises: a ring-shaped shell, a side cover, a semi-cylindrical groove, an elastic connecting belt, and a connecting rod. The shell is a cavity structure, and the side of the shell is A side cover is provided on the wall, and a semi-cylindrical groove is provided on the housing, and a connecting rod is inserted into the semi-cylindrical groove, and an elastic connecting belt is sleeved on the connecting rod. The superior effect of the utility model is that, The electronic finger ring with variable inner diameter is provided with a connecting rod and an elastic connecting band, which can adjust the inner diameter of the ring according to the thickness of the user's fingers, so as to adapt to users with different finger thicknesses wearing the electronic finger ring.

results.title: Wearable device comprising at least one electrode for measuring biometric information
results.abstract: Disclosed is a wearable device, comprising: a housing including a first surface facing a first direction, a second surface facing a second direction opposite to the first direction, and a third surface at least partially enclosing a space between the first surface and the second surface; a printed circuit board disposed between the first surface and the second surface; a speaker device disposed in a space defined by the third surface between the first surface and the second surface; a flexible printed circuit board that is disposed to surround at least a portion of the speaker device, connects the speaker device and the printed circuit board, and contains a conductive connector in a first area facing the third surface; and at least one first electrode that is connected to the conductive connector to be connected to the flexible printed circuit board, wherein the third surface comprises at least one first opening formed in a second area corresponding to the position of the speaker device and a second opening formed in a third area spaced apart from the second area, and at least a portion of the at least one first electrode is exposed to the outside of the third surface of the housing through the second opening while being connected to the conductive connector.

results.title: Mobile phone fingerprint ring elastic sheet
results.abstract: The utility model relates to a cell-phone fingerprint ring shell fragment relates to fingerprint touch-control technical field, the utility model discloses a strutting arrangement, drive arrangement, detection device, assembly quality and sealing device, strutting arrangement are including installation base and touch pad support ring, a touch pad support ring one end and an installation base surface connection, drive arrangement includes drive plate circuit and winding displacement, the installation base passes through the winding displacement both ends with the drive plate circuit and is connected, detection device includes pressure film and electric capacity film, a pressure film one end and an installation base surface connection, an electric capacity film one end and a touch pad support ring surface connection. The utility model discloses an adopt the sensor seal ring to reach better water-proof effects, avoided leading to the malfunctioning condition of fingerprint detection to take place because of the finger is moist, through setting up the ultra-thin overlapping technique of touch shell fragment, pressure film and electric capacity film, reduced the volume that the module occupy, more spaces remain.
results.owner: 东莞市珈弘五金制品有限公司

results.title: A stem cutter of the crops
results.abstract: In the present invention, there is provided a wearable body having a detection insertion hole into which the index finger is inserted and a stop insertion hole into which the stop is inserted and which is perforated in the left and right direction, and a communication space is formed between the index insertion hole and the stop insertion hole A finger attaching portion is provided at a portion of the wearer body where the communication space is formed, the fastening bolt passing through the fastening bolt in the forward and backward directions to be screwed so that the inner and outer diameters of the index insertion hole and the stop insertion hole are adjusted, And a front end of the mounting body protrudes a predetermined length outward from the front of the body of the wearer and a blade is inserted and mounted inside the front of the body of the wearer. A blade insertion groove is formed and a front center portion of the mounting body is provided with a blade protruding groove It is formed to the front of the inserted blade mounted in the blade groove of the knife for cutting crops tap, characterized in that it consists of the blade mounting portion adapted to be exposed to the outside a predetermined length.

results.title: Padded, flexible encasing for body monitoring systems in fabrics
results.abstract: A wearable monitoring device includes printed circuit board having a first side and a second side opposite the first side, wherein the printed circuit board is configured to couple to at least one sensor configured to monitor a physiological condition; at least a first padding layer coupled to the printed circuit board proximate the first side; at least a second padding layer coupled to the printed circuit board proximate the second side; a first protective layer coupled to the first padding layer opposite the printed circuit board; a second protective layer coupled to the second padding layer opposite the printed circuit board; at least one additional layer between the first protective layer opposite the printed circuit board; the first protective layer and the second protective layer seal together and enclose the first and second padding and the printed circuit board; and a power source coupled to the printed circuit board.

results.title: Electronic device comprising antenna
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device according to various embodiments of the present disclosure may comprise: a housing; a conductive patch; a PCB located in the housing; a wireless communication circuit located on the PCB; and a first touch sensing circuit, wherein the housing may comprise a first housing facing away from the body wearing the electronic device, and a second housing facing toward the body, the wireless communication circuit may supply power to a first point spaced apart from an edge of the conductive patch by a predetermined distance or more and receive an RF signal of a first frequency band, and the first touch sensing circuit may sense a touch input with respect to the conductive patch.

results.title: Wearable sensor
results.abstract:
The invention proposes a wearable sensing device (100) comprising a sensing element (180) to sense physiological signs of a user wearing the device, electrical circuitry (170-172), air- or oxygen-dependent battery(ies) (110) comprising an air-inlet surface (111). The wearable sensing device further comprises a housing (130) of the sensing element (180), the circuitry (170-172) and the at least one battery (110), all functionally electrically arranged together. 
     The housing (130) comprises casing elements (131, 131') arranged to lock the at least one battery (110) in a predetermined locking position. The housing (130) further comprises a base (136) and a cover (135) mounted to the base (136) in a manner and in such a way that an internal gap (132) extends between said battery air-inlet surface (111) and the cover (135). The base (136) and the cover (135) are further arranged such that said air-inlet surface (111) has an access to ambient air. 
     The invention further proposes a wearable sensing device (100') arranged before use with sealing tabs (140) to protect said air-inlet surfaces (111) from air contact.

results.title: MULTI-PIECE WEAR ASSEMBLY.
results.abstract: A multi-piece wear assembly that includes an adapter and a wear part. The adapter has a front portion with a first predetermined configuration. The wear part is assembled to the front portion of the adapter by relative longitudinal movement and defines a concealed cavity opening at its rear. The hidden cavity of the wear part has a second predetermined configuration. The second predetermined configuration defined by the hidden cavity is larger than the first predetermined configuration defined by the front portion of the adapter, such that a relief is provided between the front portion of the adapter and the hidden cavity when the adapter and the wear part they are placed in an operable combination with each other. A locking structure is provided on the front portion of the adapter to keep the wear portion and the front portion of the adapter in an operable combination. In one form, a modular locking member extends generally perpendicular to a longitudinal axis of the tooth assembly with a portion of the locking member filling the relief defined between the opposing surfaces in the concealed cavity and the front portion of the adapter.

results.title: position tracking ring
results.abstract: The utility model provides a position tracking ring, comprising a ring body, a battery and a control circuit board mounted on the ring body, wherein the ring body comprises a fixedly connected first half ring and a second half ring, The first half ring is provided with a receiving compartment, the receiving compartment includes a fixedly connected groove body and a cover plate, and the control circuit board and the battery are connected in the groove body; the battery and the control circuit The board is electrically connected and tightly connected with the control circuit board through a cable tie; the control circuit board is provided with a GPS signal transmitter, a microcontroller and a communication module, and the GPS signal transmitter is used to transmit GPS signals to A user terminal, wherein the microcontroller is configured to send the serial number corresponding to the GPS signal transmitter to the user terminal through the communication module. The position tracking ring provided by the utility model can obtain the position information of the wearer in real time through the user terminal, without the need for the wearer to report regularly, saving time and effort.
results.owner: 中科星图(深圳)数字技术产业研发中心有限公司

results.title: Electrical connection structures and wearable devices
results.abstract: An electrical connection structure and a wearable device, the structure comprising: a body end connection device (2) and a watchband end connection device (3), wherein the body end connection device (2) includes a first metal connection terminal (2a) disposed on the The first frame body (2b) is used for electrical connection with the main board of the wearable device; the first sealing device (6) is used for sealing between the first frame body (2b) and the wearable device; the strap end is connected The second frame body (3b) included in the device (3) is used for connecting with the watch band (4) of the wearable device, and the second metal connection terminal (3a) is arranged on the second frame body (3b) and is connected to the wearable device. The strap (4) of the wearable device is electrically connected, and when the strap (4) of the wearable device is connected to the body (1), the first metal connection terminal (2a) is electrically connected with the second metal connection terminal (3a), and the first frame body (2b) is engaged with the second frame body (3b), and the second sealing device (3c) is used to seal the first frame body (2b) and the second frame body (3b), effectively preventing the wearable device from being damaged. The electronic components inside the watch band (4) and the main body (1) are damaged by liquid immersion.

results.title: A smart wearable device that can display a pointer-driven structure
results.abstract: The present invention relates to the field of smart wearable devices, in particular to a smart wearable device capable of displaying a pointer driving structure, including a housing, a pointer driving structure and a pointer arranged on the pointer driving structure, the pointer driving structure is located in the middle area of the housing, The inside of the housing is provided with a power circuit module, the power circuit module is located around the pointer driving structure, and is vertically arranged along the inner wall of the housing, and all or part of the pointer driving structure is not covered by the power circuit module in the vertical direction. Covering; the housing has at least one straight edge, and the power circuit module includes a circuit board and/or power supply arranged vertically along the inner wall of the straight edge. The smart wearable device disclosed by the present invention enables the traditional wearable device to realize the interconnection and intercommunication function with the smart phone while taking into account the aesthetic feeling of the mechanical watch.
results.owner: 深圳智能表芯科技有限公司

results.title: Combined camera and wearable ring for holding a camera
results.abstract: A wearable device, such as a ring, is used to be worn on at least one part of a human body. A wearable device includes a body having a bottom surface and a top surface, an opening defined between the top surface and the bottom surface. The opening is used to receive therethrough and hold the at least one part of the human body. A pocket is defined in the body between the opening and the top surface for holding the camera presenting an activation button to turn on and turn off the camera. The body includes a membrane defined in the top surface of the body.

results.title: Wearables, charging bases and electronic products
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a wearable device, a charging stand and an electronic product, wherein the wearable device comprises a main body casing, a main circuit board is arranged inside the main body casing, and the main body casing has side walls and a bottom wall. The side wall is provided with a charging post, and the side of the main circuit board facing the charging post is provided with a contact elastic sheet, and the contact elastic sheet is in contact with the charging post. The charging base includes a charging shell, and the charging shell is provided with a charging slot and a charging interface, the charging slot is used for installing a wearable device, and the charging interface is used for connecting an external circuit. A charging circuit board is arranged inside the charging shell, the charging circuit board is electrically connected with the charging interface, one end of the charging connecting piece is connected with the charging circuit board, and the other end is used for connecting the charging column to charge the wearable device. The technical scheme of the utility model can reduce the external dimension of the product while ensuring the appearance integrity of the product.
results.owner: 深圳市佳润鑫通信技术有限公司

results.title: Electronic device including heat dissipation structure
results.abstract: According to an embodiment of the disclosure, a wearable electronic device may include a housing, a first printed circuit board (PCB), a second PCB disposed in parallel with the first PCB, a first interposer, and a second interposer, and the housing may include at least one first opening formed on a first portion, and the first interposer and the second interposer may be disposed between the first PCB and the second PCB, the first interposer and the second interposer may be disposed to have a first end of the first interposer and a second end of the second interposer facing the first end, spaced apart by a designated distance, and a first space between the first end and the second end may be connected to the at least one first opening of the housing. Various other embodiments are possible.

results.title: Abstract pattern messaging wearable electronics for wireless communication
results.abstract: Exemplary embodiments described herein provide a wearable electronic device, such as an electronic bracelet, that includes a circuit board coupled with a plurality of electronic components (which may include any type of components, elements, circuitry, etc.). A particular implementation of a wearable electronic device includes: at least one electronic bead including a touch input device configured to receive a first touch input from a first user associated with the wearable electronic device; and communicating with the at least one electronic bead communication module. The communication module includes a processor configured to receive a first touch input from the at least one electronic bead, and to send a first message to an electronic device associated with the second user, the first message including instructions indicating the first First information of the touch input and a first device identifier associated with at least one electronic bead.

results.title: Coupled multi-bands antennas in wearable wireless devices
results.abstract: A wearable wireless device is disclosed. In one embodiment the wearable wireless device includes a circuit board, a housing body housing the circuit board, the housing body having a front side and a back side, the back side configured to be closer to the user when worn than the front side, a first antenna element electrically connected to the circuit board and located at the front side of the housing body and a second antenna element electrically connected to the circuit board and located at the front side of the housing body. 150 125 118 116 d2 d2 117 14 125 P'118 'l i 116 di

results.title: WEAR PLATE ASSEMBLY WITH TWO PART KEY ASSEMBLY.
results.abstract: A wear plate (10) assembly includes a base (11) having a groove (25) with an enlarged opening (34), and a wear plate (12) having a wear surface (74) and a support (81) recessed under the wear surface (74). The wear plate (12) moves between a free condition and an applied condition that covers the base (11). The assembly (10) includes a nut (13) and a key (14). The nut (13) has a hole (54) to receive the key (14), and is applicable through the opening (34) in the slot (25). The nut (13) moves between a first position registered in the opening (34) and a second position displaced from the opening (34) in which the nut (13) is captured under the base (11). In the applied condition of the wear plate (12) and the second position of the nut (13), the hole (54) registers with the slot (25) and the bracket (81) to define a keyway (86), and the key (14) is applicable to the keyway (86) to engage with the nut (13) to secure the wear plate (12) on the base (11).

results.title: Wearable electronic equipment and electronic equipment
results.abstract: The present disclosure relates to a wearable electronic device and an electronic device. The wearable electronic device includes: the body comprises a display module, and a display area of the display module is positioned on the surface of the body and used for outputting display contents; the connecting piece is provided with a first containing position, and when the body is fixed with the connecting piece, the body is positioned in the first containing position; a connector capable of forming a wearable ring; when the first accommodating position is vacant, the body is separated from the connecting piece; the body is internally provided with a first communication module used for the communication between the body and external equipment; the connecting piece is internally provided with a second communication module independent of the first communication module and used for the communication between the connecting piece and external equipment. Even if the body and the connecting piece are separated, the normal wearing of the connecting piece can be ensured, and the normal work of the body and the connecting piece can be ensured; the user can carry body and/or connecting piece according to the application scene decision of difference, can improve wearable electronic equipment's flexibility, and then promotes user experience and feels.
results.owner: 北京小米移动软件有限公司

results.title: A charging device suitable for wearable communication equipment
results.abstract: The utility model relates to a charging device suitable for wearable communication equipment. Sealed butt joint with the lower case of the watch holder to form a waterproof accommodation space, the upper case of the watch holder is provided with a spring pin circuit board and a contact circuit board, the spring pin circuit board and the contact circuit board are connected, and the contact circuit board is connected to the circuit The board forms a detachable connection; the overall structure of the charging device suitable for wearable communication devices is divided into upper and lower parts, the upper part is the watch holder, and the lower part is the base, and the watch holder and the base are detachably connected. Replace different table holders at any time to adapt to different products, so as to meet the needs of different users at any time; while solving the user experience, it can make the product safer and more practical; connect the table holder and the base through the bend Connections are made for concealed wiring.
results.owner: 郑州联睿电子科技有限公司

results.title: Wearable electric circuit integrated molded product
results.abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a wearable electric circuit integrated molded product which is suitable for mass production, has high waterproofness, and is compact and lightweight.  A molded body 20 is molded into a three-dimensional predetermined shape. The protective film 30 covers at least a part of the surface of the molded product 20. The circuit film 40 is integrally molded with the molded body 20. The electric circuit 50 is installed in the circuit film 40 and causes a physical change outside the molded product 10 or generates an electric signal in response to the physical change outside the molded product 10. The protective film 30 or the circuit film 40 has a contact region Ar1 arranged on the surface of the contact portion Pa1. The molded body 20 contains a hot melt adhesive which is arranged on the surface of the molded body 20 on the opposite side of the contact region Ar1 from the skin and defines the three-dimensional shape of the contact region Ar1 in a predetermined shape. The hot melt adhesive covers at least a portion of the circuit film 40.  [Selection diagram] Fig. 2

results.title: Wearable electronic device with glass shell
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device may include a display and a housing. The housing may include a chassis defining a first portion of a rear exterior surface of the wearable electronic device, a first portion of a side exterior surface of the wearable electronic device, and an internal wall. The housing may also include a glass shell defining a front wall positioned over the display and defining a front exterior surface of the wearable electronic device and a side wall extending from the front wall and overlapping the internal wall, the side wall defining a second portion of the side exterior surface of the wearable electronic device. The wearable electronic device may also include a touch sensing system within the housing and configured to detect a touch input applied to the front exterior surface of the wearable electronic device.

results.title: Wearable electronic device comprising antenna
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device according to an embodiment may comprise: a housing which includes a front member, a rear member opposite to the front member, and a side member surrounding the inner space between the front member and the rear member; a circuit board which is disposed in the housing and includes at least one ground portion; a speaker module which is disposed at one side of the rear member and connected to the circuit board; and a support member which is configured to support the speaker module and made of a conductive material, wherein the support member is electrically connected to the ground portion of the circuit board. Various other embodiments understood through the specification may also be possible.

results.title: Wearable device and method of making thereof
results.abstract:
FIELD: personal usage items. 
     SUBSTANCE: invention relates to wearable device and method of its production, relating to "smart" objects for wearing, in particular wearable electronics. Housing of wearable device comprises front body part, lower body part and electronic components. Front body part is connected to lower body part in upward-downward direction. Front body part and lower body part confine space, forming watertight cavity. Body includes electronic components located in cavity. Electronic components contain printed circuit board and battery, which are electrically connected. Printed circuit board has wireless data transmission unit and at least one type of sensors. Lower body part has two contacts for charging, formed on outer side of body part and electrically connected with electronic components. 
     EFFECT: possibility to use of device in conditions of moisture and in contact with water is provided. 
     14 cl, 6 dwg

results.title: Smart wearable device with built-in charging structure
results.abstract: The invention discloses a smart wearable device, comprising: an upper cover, including a cover body, the surface of the cover body is concaved to form an accommodating groove, and at least one side of the surface of the cover body extends to form a socket; a charging piece, a charging piece One end of the charging sheet is arranged on the bottom surface of the receiving slot, and the other end of the charging piece passes through the socket part to be placed on the outer surface of the socket part; the bottom shell is set opposite to the containing tank, and the bottom shell and the cover body are fixed to The accommodating groove is closed; the circuit board is arranged on the surface of the bottom case facing the cover body, the circuit board includes the board body and a power supply part arranged on the surface of the board body facing the cover body, and the power supply part is in contact with one end of the charging sheet; The battery is arranged between the board body and the bottom case, and the battery is electrically connected to the power supply unit. In the present invention, by setting the charging piece in contact with the power supply unit, when the smart wearable device is charged, the smart wearable device can be plugged into a charger or the like for charging by removing the ring belt. Moreover, the structure is simple, the cost is low, and it also has strong waterproof performance.
results.owner: 捷开通讯(深圳)有限公司

results.title: Electrical connection structure and wearable equipment
results.abstract: An electrical connection structure and a wearable device, the structure comprising: the wearable device comprises a body end connecting device (2) and a watchband end connecting device (3), wherein a first metal connecting terminal (2a) included by the body end connecting device (2) is arranged on a first frame body (2b) and is used for being electrically connected with a mainboard of the wearable device; the first sealing device (6) is used for sealing the first frame body (2b) and the wearable equipment; the watch band end connecting device (3) comprises a second frame body (3b) used for being connected with a watch band (4) of the wearable device, a second metal connecting terminal (3a) is arranged on the second frame body (3b) and electrically connected with the watch band (4) of the wearable device, when the watch band (4) of the wearable device is connected with the body (1), a first metal connecting terminal (2a) is electrically connected with the second metal connecting terminal (3a), the first frame body (2b) is clamped with the second frame body (3b), and a second sealing device (3c) is used for sealing the first frame body (2b) and the second frame body (3b), so that the problem that electronic components inside the watch band (4) and the body (1) of the wearable device are soaked by liquid is effectively prevented.

results.title: A kind of finger ring set that different thicknesses finger can be worn
results.abstract: A kind of finger ring set that different thicknesses finger can be worn, including finger ring main body, steel wire ring, positioning seat, receiver；It is characterized in that, fluted and steel wire limiting slot is arranged in the outside of the finger ring main body；The centre of finger ring main body is provided with receptor hole, and the rear end of finger ring main body is provided with inner cavity, and the edge of inner cavity is provided with position-limited edge；The length and diameter of the steel wire ring, match with steel wire limiting slot；The front end of the positioning seat is provided with chimb, and rear end is provided with pedestal, annular groove and finger ring plug, prong is offered among the finger ring plug；The front end of the receiver is provided with USB plug, and the USB plug is inserted into receptor hole；The finger ring main body is made of flexible material, and the chimb of positioning seat can be inserted in inner cavity, position-limited edge package and fixed chimb, and finger ring main body and positioning seat is made to become an entirety, and finger ring main body is made of elastic rubber material.The utility model can be suitble to the finger of nearly all different thicknesses to dress.
results.owner: 重庆市炙热科技发展有限公司

results.title: Wear plate assembly with two-part key assembly
results.abstract: A wear plate assembly includes a base having a slot with an enlarged aperture, and a wear plate having a wear surface and a hold recessed below the wear surface. The wear plate moves between a free condition and an applied condition covering the base. The assembly includes a nut and a key. The nut has a bore to receive the key, and is applicable through the aperture into the slot. The nut moves between a first position registered in the aperture and a second position offset from the aperture where the nut is captured under the base. In the applied condition of the wear plate and the second position of the nut, the bore is registered with the slot and the hold to define a keyway, and the key is applicable to the keyway for engagement with the nut to secure the wear plate on the base.

results.title: Wearable Product
results.abstract: A wearable product includes a display system, a rear housing, a middle frame, a printed circuit board, and a conductive component). The rear housing is located on a non-light-emitting side of the display system. The middle frame is located between the display system and the rear housing, and is a hollow frame structure. The middle frame includes a metal frame and a plastic frame nested in the metal frame and connected to the metal frame. The plastic frame is connected to the display system) and the rear housing in a sealing manner to form an accommodation cavity. The printed circuit board is located in the accommodation cavity. A part of the conductive component is located in the accommodation cavity and electrically connected to the printed circuit board, and the other part of the conductive component passes through the plastic frame to be electrically connected to the metal frame.

results.title: Wearable device and method for manufacturing same
results.abstract: Provided is a wearable device and a method of manufacturing the same. The wearable device includes: a wearable flexible printed circuit board having a circuit pattern formed on a base substrate having flexibility, air-permeability, and waterproofness; and a functional module mounted on the wearable flexible printed circuit board.

results.title: Fingerprint Sensor Module
results.abstract: The present disclosure provides a fingerprint sensor module, including: a substrate; a fingerprint sensing device mounted on a first surface of the substrate; at least one connection pad arranged on the substrate and configured to electrically connect the fingerprint sensor module to external parts; and a conductive layer, which is arranged on the second face of the substrate opposite to the first face and forming the back side of the fingerprint sensing module, wherein the conductive layer is connected to the fingerprint sensor module for controlling contact with the conductive layer The control circuit of the potential of the finger. The present disclosure also provides a smart card including a fingerprint sensor module.

results.title: A fingerprint module
results.abstract: The invention discloses a fingerprint module, which includes a cover plate, a fingerprint sensing module and a substrate, wherein the fingerprint sensing module includes a fingerprint identification chip and a circuit board, and the fingerprint identification chip is located between the cover plate and the circuit board. Between and electrically connected with the circuit board; the cover plate includes a cover plate body, a non-conductive ink layer arranged on the inner side of the cover plate body and capable of covering the fingerprint identification chip, and a non-conductive ink layer arranged on the non-conductive The conductive ink layer on the lower edge of the ink layer is electrically connected with the circuit board; the substrate supports the circuit board. The fingerprint film set of the present invention sets the cover plate into a laminated structure, that is, the upper layer is the cover plate body, the middle is a non-conductive ink layer, and the bottom edge is a conductive ink layer to form a cover plate with a capacitive structure, which can replace the metal ring. To realize the trigger function or discharge static electricity, the material selection of the ring is not limited by metal.
results.owner: 江苏凯尔生物识别科技有限公司

results.title: Coupled Multiband Antennas in Wearable Wireless Devices
results.abstract: The invention discloses a wearable wireless device. In one embodiment, the wearable wireless device includes: a circuit board; a housing for accommodating the circuit board, the housing has a front and a back, and when worn, the back is arranged closer to the front than the front a user; a first antenna element electrically connected to the circuit board and located on the front surface of the housing; and a second antenna element electrically connected to the circuit board and located on the front surface of the housing.

results.title: Receptacle connector for a wearable article
results.abstract: A receptacle connector is provided for a wearable article. The receptacle connector includes a housing having a receptacle configured to receive a complementary plug connector therein. The housing is configured to be mounted to the wearable article. A printed circuit board is held by the housing. The printed circuit board includes mating contacts for mating with the plug connector. The printed circuit board includes mounting contacts that are configured to terminate conductors of a flat cable of the wearable article or an e-textile of the wearable article.

results.title: Electrical connection structure and wearable apparatus
results.abstract: Disclosed are an electrical connection structure and a wearable apparatus. The structure comprises: a body end connecting device (2) and a watch strap end connecting device (3). A first metal connection terminal (2a) comprised by the body end connecting device (2) is arranged on a first frame body (2b) and is used for electrically connecting to a mainboard of a wearable apparatus. A first sealing device (6) is used for sealing between the first frame body (2b) and the wearable apparatus. A second frame body (3b) comprised by the watch strap end connecting device (3) is used for connecting to a watch strap (4) of the wearable apparatus. A second metal connection terminal (3a) is arranged on the second frame body (3b) and is electrically connected to the watch strap (4) of the wearable apparatus. When the watch strap (4) of the wearable apparatus is connected to a body (1), the first metal connection terminal (2a) is electrically connected to the second metal connection terminal (3a), the first frame body (2b) and the second frame body (3b) are clamped, and a second sealing device (3c) is used for sealing between the first frame body (2b) and the second frame body (3b), thereby effectively preventing the watch strap (4) of the wearable apparatus and electronic components inside the body (1) from being immersed in a liquid and thus having becoming faulty.

results.title: Ring type healthcare device
results.abstract: The present invention provides a ring type healthcare device solving a problem to ensure a space. According to the present invention, the ring type healthcare device worn on a finger to be used comprises: a ring shaped main body including a motion sensor and a biological sensor; and a ring shape auxiliary power supply unit to be able to be separated from the main body and to supply power to the main body.

results.title: Fingerprint module for electronic product
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a fingerprint module for electronic product, its characterized in that: including surface protective layer, fingerprint chip, base ring, circuit substrate and silicone gasket, surface protective layer is located directly over the fingerprint chip, surface protective layer and fingerprint chip install in the through -hole of base ring, the silicone gasket is located the circuit substrate below, and the inside area territory and the circuit substrate of this silicone gasket pass through the bonding of glue layer to be connected, and a FPC soft arranging wire is connected to the bottom of circuit substrate. The utility model discloses two liang of sealed laminatings between cell -phone casing, silica gel pad and base plate and the base ring, with cell -phone inside and outside isolated, can be effectively waterproof dustproof, also make key pressing hand feeling better.
results.owner: 江苏凯尔生物识别科技有限公司

results.title: Finger wearable touch sensor, control system using same, and method thereof
results.abstract: A finger wearable touch sensor, a system using the same, and a control method are disclosed. A system including a finger wearable touch sensor according to an embodiment of the present invention is a wearable part formed of an elastomer material and worn on a user's finger end. At least one electrode formed on one side of the wearing part. and circuit lines for transmitting electrical signals of each electrode.

results.title: An easy-to-wear finger cot machine and its disposable finger cot consumables
results.abstract: The utility model relates to an easy-to-wear finger cot machine and its disposable finger cot consumables. The finger cot machine includes a finger cot machine host, and the finger cot machine host is a box body with at least one finger on its upper surface. Insertion holes, and the side is provided with the tearing outlet corresponding to the finger insertion hole one by one, the upper end of the tearing outlet is connected with the finger insertion hole; the main body of the finger sleeve machine is provided with the finger insertion hole Corresponding to the finger cot hanging mechanism, the pull-out end of the finger cot hanger of the finger cot hanging mechanism passes below the finger insertion hole, and extends to the tearing outlet, and the wearing station is located directly below the finger insertion hole. In this way, the user can easily, conveniently and quickly put on the finger cot through the finger cot machine, without any contact with the outer surface of the finger cot during the whole wearing process, which is hygienic and safe, and has a simple and ingenious structure, easy processing, and low production cost , Strong market competitiveness, conducive to market development.

results.title: A fingerprint identification module
results.abstract: The utility model provides a fingerprint identification module, comprising: a circuit board, a fingerprint identification chip and a metal frame; the fingerprint identification chip is located in the metal frame and electrically connected to the circuit board; The bottom has a contact surface attached to the circuit board, and an adhesive layer is provided on the part of the circuit board corresponding to the contact surface to paste the metal frame on the circuit board, and the circuit board corresponds to the contact surface The remaining area is provided with a conductive layer to electrically connect the metal frame with the circuit board. The fingerprint identification module sets an adhesive layer and a conductive layer on the area where the circuit board is in contact with the metal frame, which not only can firmly fix the metal frame on the circuit board, is not easy to fall off, but also has excellent electrical conductivity.

results.title: A wearable patch for measuring temperature and electrical signals
results.abstract: The invention discloses a wearable patch. The wearable patch includes: a retractable and breathable substrate with an opening; a temperature sensing unit disposed on the substrate, the temperature sensing unit comprising a A temperature sensor for measuring the temperature of the user's skin; a plurality of electrodes attached to the stretchable and breathable substrate; and a circuit board with a circuit. The electrode includes a bottom surface capable of contacting the user's skin for obtaining electrical signals from the user's body. A semiconductor chip is disposed on the circuit layer. The semiconductor chip can receive a first electrical signal from the temperature sensor, and the first electrical signal reflects the temperature of the user's skin measured by the temperature sensor. The semiconductor chip is also capable of receiving a second electrical signal from the electrode, the second electrical signal reflecting the electrical signal obtained from the user's body. The wearable patch can quickly and accurately measure the user's body temperature and body electrical signals.

results.title: Waterproof biological fingerprint identification module
results.abstract: The utility model relates to a fingerprint identification module technical field specifically is a waterproof biological fingerprint identification module, including apron and fingerprint identification module, the fingerprint identification module includes the base ring, and the circumference outer wall of base ring and the position that is located the bottom edge are equipped with first collar, and the top of base ring inner wall is outwards opened and is equipped with the ring channel, and the bottom of base ring bonds and has the circuit substrate, and the inner wall of base ring and the position that is located well lower part are equipped with waterproof ring, and the inner wall of waterproof ring is equipped with the fingerprint identification chip, and the top of waterproof ring is equipped with the coating. This waterproof biological fingerprint identification module, annular lug through waterproof ring is pegged graft with the third annular groove of base ring, can prevent that vapor from entering into the fingerprint identification chip from the gap department of coating and base ring to protect the fingerprint identification chip, scribble in the first annular groove of base ring and the second annular groove and can bond with apron and circuit substrate after the viscose, make circuit substrate's circuit parcel in the base ring, thereby prevent that vapor from entering into circuit substrate.
results.owner: 浙江凯迪仕实业有限公司

results.title: Wearable device and detection system
results.abstract: A wearable device (100) which a subject can wear and, comprises: a base part (130); a first arm (111) that extends from the base part; a second arm (112) that extends from the base part; a first wiring (141) that is disposed along the first arm; a first sensor (101) that has one end of the first wiring (141) connected thereto and is attached to the body of the subject with the subject wearing the wearable device (100) so as to detect body data of the subject; and a signal processing device that is connected to the other end of the first wiring (141) and processes a detection signal from the first sensor (101). The signal processing device is attached to the base part (130).

results.title: Circuit board capable of being packaged on wearables and packaging method
results.abstract: The invention relates to a circuit board that can be packaged on a wearable object, which is characterized in that it includes a circuit board arranged on the body of the wearable object, and the circuit board includes several circuit board modules arranged in a matrix, two adjacent There is also a soft conduit for passing connecting wires between the circuit board modules, so that the circuit board modules and the conduits are interwoven into a mesh structure; any two circuit board modules can pass through the connecting wires in the conduit. The connection is realized; the outer casing of the circuit board module is provided with the conduit connection as a whole. Beneficial effects of the present invention: the present invention can make the traditional circuit board be packaged in the wearables like the cloth of the wearables, which makes people feel comfortable, and has low cost, low technical difficulty, easy realization, convenient disassembly and assembly, and is convenient for wearables. cleaning.
results.owner: 福州领头虎软件有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint sensor module, has this portable electronic equipment
results.abstract: The utility model relates to a fingerprint sensor module, has this portable electronic equipment who has good sensing sensitivity. According to the utility model discloses an embodiment provides a fingerprint sensor module, includes: fingerprint sensor, have utilize the conductor and formed at the sensing portion of base plate and with the sensor circuit portion that sensing portion electricity is connected, the support is acceptd sensing portion settles fingerprint sensor, the post -treatment layer, with the mode of the upper surface subtend of sensing portion is located formation and is in on the contact surface of support, wherein, the upper surface of sensing portion with the thickness of the supporting layer between the contact surface with the thickness sum on post -treatment layer is 0.04-0.06mm.
results.owner: 韩国科泰高科株式会社

results.title: Wearable data line
results.abstract: A wearable data line comprises two device connecting parts (1,2) and a connecting line (3) which connects with two device connecting parts; the upper end surface of the first device connecting part (1) is fixed to or integrally formed with a locating connecting piece (11); the locating connecting piece (11) is provided with a receiving groove (110); the second device connecting part (2) has a convex part (210) matched with the receiving groove (110); a hand ring structure is formed through connecting the convex part (210) and the receiving groove (110) of the locating piece. The wearable data line realizes two device connecting parts of data line to be connected and the hand ring to be formed through the locating connecting piece and a guide limit groove. When in carry, the wearable data has the portability by sliding joint to the wrist or other satchel and so on; A data chip and a data port are hidden in groove bodies to prevent the data port from being damaged because of external force and provide a protective effect.

results.title: Wearable devices
results.abstract:
A wearable device. One embodiment of the wearable device (10) is configured to interface plurality groups of skin-mounted sensor pads (130) over a body part (140) of a wearer, and comprises: a modular brace (110) structurally separated from the sensor pads, and a plurality of sensor modules (120). The modular bracing is provided with a plurality groups of orienting slots (111) arranged thereon configured to maintain intra- group orientation between the sensor pads, and is configured to allow inter-group distance adjustment between the groups of the sensor pads over the body part of the wearer. The plurality of sensor modules is configured to be detachably coupled to the groups of sensor pads through the orienting slots in the modular bracing member. The 
sensor modules are provided with physiological sensing circuits wirelessly communicative with the intelligent health system.

results.title: Packing
results.abstract: The present invention has a conventional wear ring function as a packing that is accommodated in a groove on a peripheral surface of a partition member that slides in an axial direction in a cylindrical housing and seals between the cylindrical housing. A packing made of a single rubber elastic material is provided.   A packing housed in a groove on a circumferential surface of a partition member that slides in an axial direction in a cylindrical housing is placed on the outer circumferential surface of a packing body housed in the groove. When the sealing projection 3 is crushed by a load in a direction perpendicular to the axial direction acting on the partition member 12, the sealing projection 3 is elastically contacted with the sealing projection 3. A receiving surface 4 is provided which contacts the cylindrical housing and prevents the cylindrical housing and the partition member from coming into contact with each other, and is formed by integrally forming them with a rubber elastic material.   [Selection] Figure 1

results.title: Wearable assembly comprising a wearable article and an electronics module
results.abstract: The wearable article (200) comprises a sensing component. The electronics module (100) is removably coupled to the wearable article (200). The electronics module comprises a housing and a processor disposed within the housing (101). An interface element (121, 123) interfaces with the sensing component so as to receive signals from the sensing component and provide the same to the processor. A sensor (105) is disposed within the housing (101). The sensor (105) monitors a property of the environment external to the electronics module (100) through the housing (101). The housing (101) is constructed such that the sensor (105) has line of sight through the housing (101).

results.title: Disposable sensor array wearable device sleeve system and method
results.abstract: A removable wearable device sleeve includes a sleeve body, one or more sensors, and an interface for operative communication with the wearable device. A removable sleeve includes a sleeve body having a front element having a first aperture, a back element having a second aperture, a tubular element having a first end and a second end with a third aperture, and one or more back elements define a cavity to encase an earpiece, an interface, and a sensor, wherein the sensor communicates sensor readings to the wearable device through the interface. A method of placing a sensor configured to communicate with a wearable device onto the wearable device includes providing a removable sleeve and inserting the wearable device through the first aperture of the front element into the cavity of the removable sleeve to provide a removable wearable device sleeve.

results.title: Wearable items with positioning function and their applications
results.abstract: The invention discloses a wearable article with a positioning function and an application thereof. Wherein, the wearable article includes a wearing body, a base detachably connected to the wearing body, a decoration embedded on the base, and a circuit module arranged inside the base; the circuit module includes a rechargeable power supply , power detection circuit, communication circuit, GPS circuit and processing circuit; the power detection circuit, communication circuit and GPS circuit are connected to the processing circuit; the rechargeable power supply is used to supply power to the communication circuit, GPS circuit and processing circuit; the A charging interface connected to a rechargeable power source is arranged on the outer wall of the base. Therefore, the wearable item has a positioning function; the present invention communicates the wearable item with the user system through the network server, which can facilitate the user to track and manage the wearer's range of activities and avoid the wearer from getting lost.
results.owner: 浙江萌宠日记信息科技股份有限公司

results.title: Wearable electronic device with band
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device according to various embodiments of the present disclosure is a housing including a front plate, a rear plate, and a side member surrounding an inner space between the front plate and the back plate, wherein the side member includes an external opening and a housing including at least one part including an inner channel connecting between the inner space and the opening; an insulating structure inserted into the inner channel; a conductive path partially inserted into the insulating structure, the conductive path including a first end exposed to the inner space and a second end exposed to the external opening; at least one printed circuit board located in the inner space and electrically connected to a first end of the conductive path; a display exposed through the front plate; and a band structure connected to the part of the housing and formed to be mounted on a part of the body, wherein the band structure is movably inserted into the opening and electrically connected to the second end of the conductive path. conductive rod; and an electronic component that is at least partially inserted into the band structure and electrically connected to the conductive bar. In addition, various embodiments may be possible.

results.title: Wearable device and method of generating signal for controlling operation of electronic device
results.abstract: A wearable device is provided. The wearable device includes a ring-shaped body having a hole, an image display unit surrounding an outer circumferential surface of the ring-shaped body, a first ring-shaped bezel and a second ring-shaped bezel respectively provided on a first side surface and a second side surface of the image display unit to be independently rotatable about the hole, a sensor configured to measure a motion, a processor configured to control a first region of the image display unit to have a touch sensing function, and control a second region that is different from the first region not to have the touch sensing function, and a transceiver unit configured to transmit, to an external electronic device, a control signal generated by the processor according to an input signal by a touch on the image display unit or an input signal by rotation of at least one of the first ring-shaped bezel or the second ring-shaped bezel.

results.title: Method, apparatus and computer program for measuring biological signals
results.abstract: The wearable device mounted on the user's ear according to an embodiment of the present invention is a second material that is at least partially conductive based on the elastic first material-the first material and the second material are integrally formed and are not separated -It is formed of, and further includes a magnetic third material, is in close contact with the user's skin through the first material, collects electrical bio signals through the second material, and uses the elasticity of the first material Ear tips attached to the body; A circuit for acquiring an electrical biosignal and the ear tip are physically attached, and a first coupling portion including a fourth material forming a magnetic attraction with the third material, wherein the circuit includes the first coupling portion When the ear tip is attached, it characterized in that it comprises a body that is electrically connected to the second material.

results.title: Wearable accessories and circuit protection modules provided therein
results.abstract: A wearable accessory according to the present invention includes: a device mounting member formed to couple with a device; and a body coupling member extending lengthwise from the device mounting member, wherein the body coupling member includes: a flexible member including an electrode assembly Cells for accommodating external members of an electrode assembly, and cell terminals connected to the electrode assembly and protruding from the side opposite to the side adjacent to a device mounting part; a connecting circuit, which is connected to the device or the device mounting part and a protection circuit module configured to connect the cell terminals and the connection circuit to each other, and to cut off the electrical connection of the cell terminals and the connection circuit in case of external force damage.

results.title: Wearable bioelectric signal detector and wearing method thereof
results.abstract: A wearable bioelectric signal detector and a wearing method thereof. The bioelectric signal detector includes a storage unit and a signal collection sheet, the storage unit includes a casing and a microprocessor, the microprocessor in the casing has a pair of electrode columns, and the casing The bottom surface has a pressing plate; the signal collection sheet is a flexible body, which includes a graphite layer and a surface layer, the outer side of the graphite layer has a conductive adhesive layer, and the surface layer has electrode through holes; Between the pressing plates and the two sides of the signal collecting sheet are exposed, the electrode column is electrically connected to the graphite layer through the electrode through hole. The invention integrates the signal acquisition sheet with the storage unit, without the need for data lines, improves the signal-to-noise ratio, and collects data more accurately; the structure is simple and ingenious, the signal acquisition sheet is firmly fixed, the electrical connection is stable, and the assembly and wearing are convenient and quick; The collection piece and the storage unit can be packaged separately, occupying a small space; remote interconnection can be realized through the wireless transmitting module.

results.title: Wearing Unit For Finger Movement Measuring Apparatus
results.abstract: Wearing unit for a finger motion measurement device according to the present invention,  A hand wearing part having a shape corresponding to the back of the hand, and a finger wearing part extending and formed in the back of the hand wearing part and having a shape corresponding to the wearer's finger, wherein the finger wearing part is located at the first joint of the finger. Consisting of an elastic extension part whose length is elastically deformed according to the slow motion of the finger, a joint wearing part that is worn on the joint between the first and second nodes of the finger, and a wearing ring formed downward to be worn by inserting the finger And, it characterized in that the back of the hand wearing portion and the finger wearing portion is integrally formed of a synthetic resin material having elasticity.

results.title: Wearable electrocardiogram equipment
results.abstract: The invention provides wearable electrocardio equipment which can effectively, reliably and waterproof, is fast and convenient to connect with an electrocardioelectrode and a data line and is stable and reliable in connection. The electrode plate comprises a battery and a circuit board, wherein the circuit board is arranged on the upper surface or the lower surface of the battery, the battery is electrically connected with the circuit board, the two sides of the circuit board are respectively connected with electrode female buckles on the two external sides through leads, an electrode male buckle positioning hole is formed in the center of each electrode female buckle, the outer edge of each electrode female buckle is wrapped in a soft rubber main body, the soft rubber main body is wrapped on the upper surface area and the lower surface area of a space corresponding to the battery, the circuit board and the leads, an electrode male buckle with a corresponding size is arranged on an electrode plate main body matched with the soft rubber main body, and the electrode male buckle is arranged outside the.
results.owner: 山东正心医疗科技有限公司

results.title: Wireless communication device
results.abstract: A wearable wireless communication device is provided, including a behind-the-ear main electronics enclosure housing wireless communication electronics, a main electronics enclosure mount engaging the behind-the-ear main electronics enclosure, an ear mount fitting the main electronics enclosure mount, and a decorative mount including a speaker. The decorative mount attaches to the ear mount which is configured to fit over an ear of a wearer. Signals are transmitted from the main electronics enclosure to the main electronics enclosure mount, to the ear mount, and to the speaker in the decorative mount. Audio from the speaker is provided to the ear of the user. Pierced ear and non-pierced ear versions are provided, wherein the ear mount for the non-pierced ear version includes a clip that clips to the wearer's ear lobe. The pierced ear version includes a conductive post that passes through a piercing in the wearer's ear.

results.title: Fingerprint sensor module comprising a fingerprint sensor device and a substrate connected to the sensor device
results.abstract: There is provided a fingerprint sensor module comprising: a fingerprint sensor device comprising a plurality of sensing elements for acquiring an image of a finger placed on a sensing surface of the sensor module. The sensor device comprises a trench at an edge of the fingerprint sensor device, the trench comprising electrically conductive connection pads for connecting the sensor device to external circuitry. The module further comprises a substrate comprising an electrically conductive trace and an electric component arranged on the substrate and in electrical contact with the conductive trace. The substrate is electrically and mechanically connected to the edge trench such that an electrical connection is formed between the sensor device and the electrical component of the substrate via the conductive trace. There is also provided a method for manufacturing the described module.

results.title: Smart ring for sensing bio signal
results.abstract: The smart ring according to the present invention includes an inner ring at least partially made of a conductive material, an outer ring coupled to the outside of the inner ring and at least a portion made of a conductive material, interposed between the inner ring and the outer ring, and the inner ring A PCB assembly to which the sensor unit is attached to the lower surface facing the PCB assembly, an outer electrode contact member attached to the upper surface facing the outer ring of the PCB assembly and electrically connecting between the PCB assembly and the outer ring, and attached to the lower surface of the PCB assembly an inner electrode contact member electrically connecting the PCB assembly and the inner ring, an outer conductive elastic layer surrounding the outer contact member and interposed between the top surface of the PCB assembly and the inner surface of the outer ring, and the inner surface of the outer ring. An inner conductive elastic layer surrounding the contact member and interposed between the lower surface of the PCB assembly and the outer surface of the inner ring, and an outer insulating adhesive layer filling between the upper surface of the PCB assembly and the inner surface of the outer ring, and the PCB assembly and an inner insulating adhesive layer filling between the lower surface and the outer surface of the inner ring, wherein at least one of the outer ring and the inner ring is at least partially formed by injection molding.

results.title: Glove with a particularized electro-conductivity feature
results.abstract: A hand covering that may be in the form of a glove includes at least one finger receptacle having a sheath wall with an external surface and an internal surface, an outer strand having a metallic component and an inner strand. The outer strand includes a portion that extends into the sheath wall of the receptacle such that the portion of the outer strand does not cross the interior surface of the sheath wall of the receptacle. The outer strand and the inner strand are associated with one another such that, when a finger of a user is accommodated in the at least one receptacle, an electrical conductivity path exists that includes the finger of the user, the inner strand, and the outer strand.

results.title: Multipurpose contacts for delivering electro-haptic feedback to a wearer
results.abstract: Wearable devices are described herein including a housing and a mount configured to mount the housing to an external surface of a wearer. The wearable devices further include first and second electrical contacts protruding from the housing and configured such that the electrical contacts can be used to measure a Galvanic skin resistance of skin proximate to the electrical contacts when the wearable device is mounted to the external surface of the wearer. The electrical contacts are additionally configured to deliver an electro-haptic stimulus to skin proximate to the electrical contacts when the wearable device is mounted to the external surface of the wearer. Electro-haptic stimulus could be delivered to a wearer to indicate information to the wearer, including information about a health or activity state of the wearer, about communications received by the wearable device, and about alerts generated by the wearable device.

results.title: Fingerprint module, manufacturing method of fingerprint module, and electronic device
results.abstract: The application discloses a fingerprint module, a manufacturing method of the fingerprint module and an electronic device, wherein the fingerprint module includes: a circuit board; a chip, the chip is located on one side of the circuit board, and the chip is connected to the circuit board; a metal ring, a metal The ring is hollow cylindrical, the metal ring is sleeved outside the chip, and one end of the metal ring is connected to the circuit board; the cover plate is arranged on the metal ring, and the cover plate is located on the side of the chip away from the circuit board. According to the fingerprint module of the present application, by making the metal ring into a hollow cylindrical shape, the skirt structure of the metal ring can be eliminated, the thickness of the electronic device is reduced, the size of the fingerprint module is reduced, and the electronic device is miniaturized. In addition, during assembly, the height difference between the cover plate and the metal ring can be effectively controlled, thereby reducing the assembly error between the cover plate and the metal ring.
results.owner: 广东欧珀移动通信有限公司

results.title: Micro circuit board for intelligent wearing equipment
results.abstract: The invention discloses a micro circuit board for intelligent wearing equipment. The micro circuit board for the intelligent wearing equipment comprises a circuit board body, the circuit board body comprises a top layer, core plates and a bottom layer which are distributed in sequence from top to bottom, and PP insulating layers are arranged between the top layer and the core plates and between the core plates and the bottom layer respectively; the circuit board body is provided with through holes penetrating through the whole circuit board body, a surface mount component is fixedly installed on the surface of the top layer, a pin type component is installed on the upper portion of the top layer, and component pins are connected to the two ends of the pin type component respectively; the circuit board body is provided with a blind hole which penetrates through the core plates, the PP insulating layers and the bottom layer. According to the micro circuit board for the intelligent wearing equipment, the structure is simple, design is reasonable, operation is convenient, the top layer, the core plates and the bottom layer have a stable inter-layer interconnection relationship, the contact face of the upper core plate and the lower core plate is sawtooth wave-shaped contact area, the structure of the circuit board is more compact, the degree of precision is higher, and the requirements of the current market on a PCB are completely met.
results.owner: 昆山市华涛电子有限公司

results.title: a ring controller
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a finger ring controller; comprising a finger ring body for wearing on a finger, a PCB circuit board is encapsulated on the top of the finger ring body, an MCU main control module is integrated on the PCB circuit board, and is electrically connected with the MCU main control module The 5-way button, and an induction module that is electrically connected to the MCU main control module and used to sense the contact or proximity of fingers; the top surface of the ring body is provided with a key cap for operating the 5-way key; the MCU main control module is used to transmit according to the induction module. The inductive signal of the device determines the wearing direction of the ring body, and is used to correct the key value of the key transmitted by the five-way key according to the determination result and generate corresponding control instructions. The utility model can automatically judge the wearing direction and correct the key value, avoids the problem of repeated wearing, and is convenient for operation and use.
results.owner: 潍坊歌尔电子有限公司

results.title: Elastic wearable flexible substrate and elastic wearable composite module
results.abstract: A highly reliable composite module having a simple structure, excellent stretchability and impact resistance that can be applied to a wearable terminal or the like is provided. A wearable housing made of an elastomer, a wiring layer disposed on a main surface of the wearable housing, a conductive pad electrically connected to the wiring layer, and the conductive pad on the conductive pad An interlayer connection body having rubber elasticity and conductivity disposed; and a wiring board on which an electronic component is mounted on a main surface side, the wiring board being pressed against the interlayer connection body, and the wearable housing An elastic wearable composite module is manufactured by electrically connecting the wiring layer and the wiring board. results.title: Fingerstall Oximeter
results.abstract: Disclosed is a fingerstall oximeter including a soft gum coat and a case, a display screen for displaying measurement results is provided on the upper part of the case and an open corresponding to the display screen is provided on the soft gum coat. The soft gum coat is slipped over the outside of the case, the case is used to accommodate and protect a circuit board, and a chamber for accommodating finger is formed and rounded by the upper part of the case and the bottom of the soft gum coat, for accommodating a finger to be measured. A first measurement module is provided on the bottom of the soft gum coat and a second measurement module is provided within the case at a position corresponding to the first measurement module.

results.abstract: Part including a surface that is subject to wear by the conductive wear facing surface (50). The component comprises a substrate (10), one or more material layers (32) on the substrate (10), a wear surface layer (16) on the one or more material layers (32), a substrate (10), 1 A spaced apart electrically open first wear sensor conductor pair (12/14) and first conductor pair (12/14) disposed on the material layer (32) or wear surface layer (16). A first wear warning electrical circuit (68/69/70/74) in communication with the first wear warning electrical circuit (68/69/70/74), wherein the wear facing surface (50) with the upper layer worn is a first wear warning electrical circuit (68/69/70/74). results.title: Smart wearable device and device body
results.abstract: The utility model provides an intelligent wearable device and a device main body. The intelligent wearable device includes a main body and a belt body with a connecting end surface. The connecting end surface is protruded with a connecting component. The main body includes a bottom shell with a first shell side surface and a The middle frame is annularly attached to the outer peripheral portion of the bottom case, the side of the first case is provided with a first connection groove, the middle frame has a side of the first frame corresponding to the side of the first case, and the side of the first frame is provided with a connection to the first frame. A through hole corresponding to the slot, the cross-sectional area of the through hole is larger than the cross-sectional area of the first connection slot, a concave accommodating area is formed between the through hole and the slot of the first connection slot, and the connecting component passes through the through hole and is inserted In the first connecting groove, the end of the belt body is accommodated in the accommodating area, and the connecting end face of the belt body covers the first connecting groove. The bottom case is completely covered, thereby improving the aesthetics of the main body after the belt body is installed.

results.title: Wearable computer and wearable buckle
results.abstract: The utility model relates to a wearable computer and a wearable buckle. The wearable computer includes a computer body and a wearable shell, the computer body is arranged in the wearable shell; the wearable shell is provided with a wearing hole, and the wearing hole is used for detachable connection with the wearing buckle. The wearing buckle includes a first connecting part, a second connecting part and an intermediate connecting part; the first connecting part is used to connect with the wearing hole of the wearable computer, the second connecting part is used to connect with the wearing object, and the intermediate connecting part is fixedly connected to the first connection part and the second connecting part. The above-mentioned wearable computer and the wearable buckle, the wearable shell of the wearable computer is provided with a wearing hole that can be detachably connected with the wearable buckle, and the wearable computer can be conveniently worn on the wearing object through the wearable buckle. The wearable computer provided by the present invention has the advantages of convenience, Advantages of efficient donning.

results.title: Wearable device including mutli-band antenna
results.abstract: A wearable device including an outer housing including first, second, and side surfaces, wherein a metal frame is formed on at least a portion of the side surface, a display, a printed circuit board (PCB), a communication circuit disposed on the PCB, and a ground area provided in the PCB, wherein a metal frame is electrically connected to the communication circuit at a first point of the metal frame and is selectively connected to the ground area at a second point of the metal frame, and wherein the communication circuit is configured to transmit and/or receive a signal in a first frequency band by a first electrical path formed if the second point is not connected to the ground area, and transmit and/or receive a signal in a second frequency band by a second electrical path formed if the second point is connected to the ground area.

The utility model discloses in fingerprint sensing module install on the base plate through the pin of buckling, fingerprint sensing module and base plate keep the distance of one centimetre, guaranteed good thermal diffusivity, increase fingerprint sensing module's life; the utility model discloses well fingerprint sensing module periphery is provided with insulating plastics baffle, has good guard action, avoids touching when installation and maintenance and causes the pin fracture, has increased fingerprint sensing module's life.

results.title: Wearable electronic device movement, shell and wearable electronic device
results.abstract: Embodiments of the present application provide a wearable electronic device core, a casing, and the wearable electronic device, which relate to the field of electronic devices and can reduce the interference of the wearable electronic device's casing on the antenna signal of the core. The core of the wearable electronic device includes a metal middle frame and a printed circuit board PCB arranged on the metal middle frame; a controller is arranged on the PCB; at least one grounding point is arranged on the metal middle frame, and the grounding point is connected to the grounding point on the PCB. end coupling; at least one feed point is provided on the metal middle frame, and the feed point is coupled to the radio frequency circuit on the PCB; wherein, a first switch is coupled between the ground point and the ground end, and/or, the feed point is connected to the radio frequency circuit A second switch is coupled between the circuits; when the core of the wearable electronic device is installed in the installation space of the housing, the controller is configured to obtain a switch control signal; the controller is configured to control at least one first switch according to the switch control signal. Conduction state of a switch and/or at least one second switch.

results.title: Electronic device ring and electronic device protective case
results.abstract: The utility model discloses an electronic device finger ring and an electronic device protective shell comprising the electronic device finger ring.
