The electronic device finger ring includes a fixing piece and an annular elastic sleeve arranged on the fixing piece, the back of the fixing piece is used for connecting with an electronic equipment casing or an electronic equipment protective shell, and a part of the annular elastic sleeve is located on the fixing piece The front side of the ring-shaped elastic sleeve is located on the back side of the fixing piece. After the back of the fixing part of the electronic device ring is connected with the electronic device shell or the electronic device protective shell, the user can insert his finger into the annular elastic sleeve, and form a ring through the elastic deformation of the annular elastic sleeve, thereby assisting in holding effect.
results.owner: 深圳张拉创新科技有限公司

results.title: Finger cot oximeter
results.abstract: A finger cot oximeter includes a soft gel casing (5) and a box body (4) for containing and protecting a circuit board; a display screen (1) for displaying measurement results is provided on the top of the box body (4), and an opening (54) corresponding to the display screen (1) is provided on the soft gel casing (5); the soft gel casing (5) is placed around the box body (4); a finger chamber (8) for containing a measured finger is formed between the lower portion of the box body (4) and the bottom of the soft gel casing (5); a first measuring module is provided on the bottom of the soft gel casing (5), and a second measuring module is provided at a position in the box body (4) corresponding to the position of a first measuring element. The finger cot oximeter has advantages of easy assembly, small volume, firmness, long service life.
results.owner: 北京超思电子技术有限责任公司

results.title: Smart ring for sensing bio-signals
results.abstract: A smart ring according to the present invention comprises: an inner ring at least partially made of a conductive material; an outer ring coupled to the outer side of the inner ring and at least partially made of a conductive material; a PCB assembly interposed between the inner ring and the outer ring and having a sensor unit attached to a lower surface thereof facing the inner ring; an outer electrode contact member attached to an upper surface of the PCB assembly facing the outer ring to electrically connect the PCB assembly and the outer ring, and an inner electrode contact member attached to the lower surface of the PCB assembly to electrically connect the PCB assembly and the inner ring; an outer conductive elastic layer surrounding the outer contact member and interposed between the upper surface of the PCB assembly and the inner surface of the outer ring, and an inner conductive elastic layer surrounding the inner contact member and interposed between the lower surface of the PCB assembly and the outer surface of the inner ring; and an outer insulating adhesive layer filling the space between the upper surface of the PCB assembly and the inner surface of the outer ring, and an inner insulating adhesive layer filling the space between the lower surface of the PCB assembly and the outer surface of the inner ring.

results.title: Wearable electronic device and strap arrangement with charging ports for charging ear-worn electronic devices
results.abstract: A wearable apparatus includes a wearable electronic device comprising a rechargeable power source, charging circuitry, a processor, and a display. A strap arrangement is connected to the wearable electronic device and comprises one or more charge ports. Each charge port is electrically coupled to the wearable electronic device and comprises a volume of resilient material comprising a through-hole dimensioned to receive one of the electronic devices. The volume of resilient material is configured to stretch and generate a retentive force sufficient to retain the electronic device within the through-hole. Electrical contacts are disposed on a wall of the volume of resilient material and recessed within a thickness of the volume of resilient material. The electrical contacts are configured to electrically communicate with corresponding electrical contacts of the electronic device. The charging circuitry of the wearable electronic device is configured to charge rechargeable power sources of the electronic devices.

results.title: Wearable communication device
results.abstract: The invention provides a wearable communication device, which comprises a carrier capable of being worn at a preset part of a human body, wherein the carrier is respectively provided with a dialing module, a display module, a loudspeaker, a microphone and a driving module, the driving module is respectively and electrically connected with the dialing module, the display module, the loudspeaker and the microphone, the driving module comprises a communication unit, the carrier is provided with a touch area for arranging the dialing module, and different positions, corresponding to the dialing module, on the touch area are respectively provided with a conductive key capable of detecting a parasitic capacitor of the human body. The wearable communication device provided by the invention has the characteristics of novelty, portability and wearability.
results.owner: 珠海格力电器股份有限公司

results.title: Wearable Ring Control Device
results.abstract: A wearable ring control device is an apparatus to control the functionality of wirelessly connective devices. The wearable ring control device includes an annular housing, a wireless transceiver, an annular dial at least one ergonomic button, and a central processing unit (CPU). The annular housing fits over a finger of the user. The dial is engaged with the adjacent fingers, and the movement data activates and executes commands to relay to another device, wirelessly. The at least one ergonomic button and the annular dial are externally integrated within the annular housing. The user interfaces with the annular dial with adjacent fingers, and the at least one ergonomic button which when actuated communicate a signal through the CPU and subsequently through the wireless transceiver in order to be received and translated by a wireless communication device to control a functionality of the wireless communication device.

results.title: A wearable device and its charging terminal
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a wearable device, comprising a device main body and a belt body. Both ends of the device main body are provided with connecting parts, the connecting parts are connected to the belt body, and the connecting parts are integrally formed with a charging terminal. The charging terminal includes an insulator and a metal sheet. The metal sheet It is integrally formed with the insulator. The head and tail of the metal sheet are exposed from the insulator. The insulator is provided with perforations exposing the metal sheets. Exposed sheet metal. The utility model also discloses a charging terminal. The wearable device and the charging terminal have good waterproof performance and good stability.
results.owner: 深圳市爱都科技有限公司

results.title: Wearable Sensing Devices
results.abstract: Embodiments of the present disclosure relate to a wearable sensing device. A wearable sensing device includes a connector base provided with contact pads connectable to sensing electrodes for sensing bioelectrical signals. The supply module is provided with a battery housed in a first housing configured for reversible coupling with the connector socket. The control module is housed in a second housing different from the first housing and is configured for coupling with the supply module and with the connector receptacle. The control module is equipped with a processing unit configured to process bioelectrical signals detectable through the contact pads. A mechanical connection member couples the supply module to the connector housing. Electrical connection members other than mechanical connection members are configured to connect the battery and the contact pads to the control module.
results.owner: 意法半导体股份有限公司

results.title: Wearable electric-circuit-integrated molded article
results.abstract: [Problem] To provide a wearable electric-circuit-integrated molded article which is suited to mass production, highly waterproof, and compact/lightweight. [Solution] A molded body 20 is molded into a three-dimensional prescribed shape. A protective film 30 covers at least a portion of a surface of the molded body 20. A circuit film 40 is integrally molded with the molded body 20. An electric circuit 50 is installed in the circuit film 40 and causes a physical change outside of a molded article 10 or causes an electric signal to be generated in accordance with a physical change outside of the molded article 10. The protective film 30 or the circuit film 40 has a contact area Ar1 disposed on the surface of a contact portion Pa1. The molded body 20 includes a hot melt adhesive: which is disposed on the surface of the molded body 20 which is opposite skin, with the the contact area Ar1 therebetween; and which defines a three-dimensional shape of the contact area Ar1 within the prescribed shape. The hot melt adhesive covers at least a portion of the circuit film 40.

results.title: Fingerprint sensing module and lectronic device comprising the same
results.abstract: A fingerprint recognition module according to an embodiment includes a substrate; A conductive pattern portion disposed on the substrate; A protective layer partially disposed in one region on the conductive pattern portion; A first connecting portion disposed on the first conductive pattern portion exposed through the first open area of the protective layer; A first chip disposed on the first connection portion; And a protective pattern part disposed on the substrate exposed through the first open area of the protective layer, wherein the first chip includes a fingerprint sensor, and the protective pattern part includes an upper surface of the substrate and the first material. It is disposed in the vibration space of the fingerprint recognition sensor between one chip.

results.title: Wearable device and its working method, wearable system
results.abstract: The invention discloses a wearable device, its working method, and a wearable system. The wearable device includes a casing, an induction coil and an application unit, and the induction coil and the application unit are arranged inside the casing. The induction coil is connected to the application unit; the induction coil is used to receive a specific non-contact signal; and the application unit is used to execute a corresponding application when the non-contact signal meets a preset condition. The wearable device provided by the present invention can not only meet the needs of people who pursue personalization and differentiation today, but also can realize financial payment functions and other industry application functions.

results.title: Fingerprint Recognition Module
results.abstract: The invention relates to a fingerprint recognition module, which includes a fingerprint recognition sensing element, a coating layer and a circuit board. The fingerprint identification sensing element is arranged on the circuit board, and the coating layer is arranged on the fingerprint identification sensing element. The insulating adhesive layer of the coating layer is arranged on the upper surface of the fingerprint identification sensing element to prevent electrostatic charge from entering into the fingerprint identification sensing element. In other words, the fingerprint identification module of the present invention replaces the traditional metal ring with a coating layer to prevent electrostatic effects, which not only saves the material cost of the fingerprint identification module, but also reduces the thickness of the fingerprint identification module.
results.owner: 致伸科技股份有限公司

results.title: Wearable sound box apparatus
results.abstract: A wearable sound box apparatus is disclosed. In one embodiment, the disclosed sound box apparatus may include a wearable element having both ends thereof extended to form two sound box accommodating areas. The wearable element may be structurally hollow, allowing for a printed circuit board (PCB), a battery, and a reflection tube to be placed therein. A sound unit placed within each of the sound box accommodating areas may be electrically connected to the PCB through a signal line. When the sound unit operates, sound waves from the sound unit are reflected within the wearable element and corresponding inverted sound waves are transmitted out of the wearable element by the reflection tube.

results.title: Wearable electrode
results.abstract: A wearable electrode includes: a garment (10) including an outer member (11) and a backing member (12) configured to cover at least a part of an inner surface of the outer member (11); and an electrode unit (20) configured to come into contact with a living body (P) clothed in the garment (10) to acquire a biological signal emitted by the living body (P) and attached to an opposite side of the backing member (12) from the outer member (11), and a core wire (40) which can be inserted into an accommodation section (27) formed in the electrode unit (20). The outer member (11) and the backing member (12) are connected to a part (15) other than a part of the backing member (12), to which the electrode unit (20) is attached.

results.title: Smartwatch
results.abstract: A wearable smart device (22) is enclosed in a water tight casing (32), whereby the water tight casing further comprises an internal rechargeable battery (38), the water tight casing further comprising a first metal contact (33) connected to a first pole of the internal rechargeable battery (38) and isolated from the water tight casing (32), and a pusher button (36a), configured such to function both as a user interface button, and a second contact to a second pole of the rechargeable battery (38), when it is pressed towards the water tight casing (32). An absence of contact between the pusher button and the second pole of the internal rechargeable battery (38), when the pusher button is not pressed contributes to the water resistance of the wearable smart device and the water tight casing (32).

results.title: Fingerprint sensor trim ring assembly and method of use
results.abstract: A fingerprint sensor trim ring assembly and method of use thereof. Wherein, the decorative ring assembly of the fingerprint sensor includes: an outer cover plate, the outer cover plate has a decorative hole; the fingerprint sensor has a protective cover plate, and the protective cover plate is assembled in the decorative hole; an insulating decorative ring is set between the protection cover and the decoration hole, so as to fix the protection cover in the decoration hole; and at least one capacitive touch electrode located under the insulating decoration ring. The fingerprint sensor decoration ring assembly can realize the touch function.
results.owner: 上海箩箕技术有限公司

results.title: An electrical conduction structure and wearable device
results.abstract: The invention discloses an electrical conduction structure and a wearable device. Wherein, the electrical conduction structure includes a lower case and a circuit board, the lower case is provided with an electrode, the upper surface of the electrode is provided with a first groove, the conductive elastic member is placed in the first groove, and the circuit When the board is fixed on the upper part of the lower shell, the conductive elastic member is compressed, one end of the conductive elastic member abuts against the bottom of the first groove, and the opposite end against the circuit board, and the electrode passes through the bottom of the first groove. The conductive elastic member realizes electrical conduction with the circuit board. By adopting the electrical conduction structure of the present invention, the number of parts to be arranged can be reduced, the product structure is simple and reliable, the assembly and disassembly are convenient, and the overall height of the electrical conduction structure can be reduced, and the size of the product can be made very thin, which is convenient in a narrow space. Install.

results.title: Wearable device and method of assembling the same
results.abstract: Embodiments of the present application provide a wearable device and an assembling method thereof. The wearable device includes: a shell assembly; a main board, which is accommodated in the shell assembly; and a temple assembly, including: a temple shell, the front end of the temple shell is connected to a side of the shell assembly, and the temples The rear end of the shell is provided with an opening; the interface is fixed in the temple shell and is located at the opening of the temple shell; and the flexible circuit board includes a front part and a rear part, and the front part is located in the temple shell. Externally, the front end of the front part is electrically connected with the main board through a connector, the rear part is fixedly installed in the temple shell, and the rear end of the rear part is connected with the interface. The wearable device and the assembling method thereof according to the embodiments of the present application can improve the wearability of the wearable device and facilitate the assembly of the wearable device.
results.owner: Oppo广东移动通信有限公司

results.title: WEAR DETECTOR SENSOR FROM PCB
results.abstract: It is an object to provide a wear detection sensor of a printed circuit board in which the detection accuracy is improved. A wear detection sensor 5 of a printed circuit board 2 is a circuit board vertically provided on a printed board 2 and soldered on the printed board 2 with a soldering portion 51 at the lower end. The wear detection sensor 5 includes a detection surface 52 for detecting a foreign matter. The detection surface 52 forms a cutting surface that intersects the planar direction of the printed circuit board 2. In the wear detection sensor 5 as described above, a wiring 521 in the surface direction 52 is interrupted, and thus the foreign matter is detected.

results.title: ring buckle
results.abstract: The utility model relates to a finger-ring buckle, comprising a finger-ring buckle body, a circuit board, a memory card holder and an interface module; the finger-ring buckle body is provided with a cavity, and the circuit board and the memory card holder are all arranged in the cavity; A socket is opened on one side, the socket is communicated with the cavity, the memory card holder is connected with the side wall of the socket, and the memory card holder is electrically connected with the circuit board; the interface module is electrically connected with the memory card holder through the circuit board, and the interface module is used for connecting electronic equipment. In the finger-ring buckle of the present invention, a circuit board and a memory card holder are arranged in the finger-ring buckle body, and the memory card holder is electrically connected with the circuit board, and then the circuit board in the finger-ring buckle is connected with electronic equipment such as a mobile phone through an interface module. When a memory card is inserted into the memory card holder, an electronic device such as a mobile phone can access the space capacity in the memory card, thereby solving the problem of expanding the storage space of the electronic device such as a mobile phone.

results.title: Ring bracket structure
results.abstract: A finger ring structure suitable for a handheld electronic device, the ring support structure comprising a plate body, a ring assembly, and a ring cymbal. The board body includes a top surface and a bottom surface on opposite sides, and the bottom surface is adapted to be mounted on the handheld electronic device. The ring assembly is disposed on the top surface of the board body, the ring assembly includes a ring body through which a user's finger passes, a pivoting member connected to the ring body, and a pivoting member A rotating base is provided which is rotatable on the top surface of the plate body according to its own axis. The annular bead is disposed between the top surface of the plate body and the rotating base, and the annular ring is adapted to prevent friction between the plate body and the annular assembly.

results.title: A fingerprint identification module installation structure and mobile terminal
results.abstract: The utility model discloses an installation structure of a fingerprint identification module and a mobile terminal, wherein, the disclosed installation structure of the fingerprint identification module includes: a circuit board, a fingerprint module, a heat insulator and a support; The module is connected to the top of the support through the heat insulator, and the bottom of the support is connected to the circuit board. The disclosed mobile terminal includes a casing and the installation structure of the fingerprint recognition module; the installation structure of the fingerprint recognition module is arranged in the casing, and the fingerprint sensing part of the fingerprint module is connected to the The shell fits and fixes. In the utility model, the heat insulator is arranged between the fingerprint module and the support member, so that the circuit board can be effectively prevented from transferring heat to the fingerprint module, so that the fingerprint module does not become hot phenomenon, which in turn can improve the user's touch experience.

results.title: Wear sensing device having a housing
results.abstract: A wear sensing device is disclosed. The wear sensing device may have a wear sensor. The wear sensor may have plurality of wear members, a communication device, and a processing device. The processing device may be configured to generate a signal indicative of wear, based on a state of the plurality of wear members. The processing device may be further configured transmit the signal with the communication device. The wear sensing device may further have a housing. The housing may at least partially enclose the wear sensor and include a plurality of separate slots. The plurality of wear members may be positioned in the plurality of separate slots.

results.title: An input information processing device and method for processing input information
results.abstract: The present invention provides an input information processing device and a method for processing input information thereof, wherein the device includes: a wearable component, a power supply module, a detection processing module, a wireless communication module, at least one positive electrode and at least one negative electrode; the wearable The component is worn on the user's hand, so that each positive electrode and negative electrode are in contact with the hand; the power supply module provides an operating voltage to the hand through each positive electrode and the negative electrode; Each knuckle of the slave finger is used as an input unit respectively, and when an active finger of the hand is controlled to make contact with a target input unit, the current change information generated by the target input unit according to the working voltage provided by the power supply module is detected, and The corresponding input information is formed; the wireless communication module sends the input information formed by the detection processing module to an external electronic device. Through the technical solution of the invention, the user experience is better.

results.title: Fingerprint identification module
results.abstract: The invention provides a fingerprint identification module, wherein the fingerprint identification module (10) sequentially comprises a ceramic cover plate (12) and a fingerprint identification chip (13) from top to bottom; the outer edge of the upper surface of the ceramic cover plate (12) is integrally formed with an annular conductive part (121), and the annular conductive part (121) is connected with the fingerprint identification chip (13) through a lead (14). According to the fingerprint identification module, the outer edge of the upper surface of the ceramic cover plate is integrally formed into the annular conductive part with the conductive function, so that the conductive annular conductive part can replace a metal ring to realize the function of the metal ring, the problem of height difference caused by the existence of the metal ring is thoroughly solved, the problems of scratching fingers and dust dead angles at the protruded edge are avoided, structural components are reduced, the problem of assembly errors is avoided completely, the cost is saved, and the product precision is improved.
results.owner: 北京赛乐米克材料科技有限公司

results.title: Neck-mounted device
results.abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a neck-mounted device in which electronic parts such as a battery are arranged at an appropriate position.  SOLUTION: This is a neck-mounted device worn around the neck of a wearer, and is a circuit board 85 on which a battery 90, an electronic component driven by receiving electric power from the battery 90 is mounted, and a battery 90. A housing 32 for accommodating the circuit board 85 and the circuit board 85 is provided, and the circuit board 85 is arranged in the housing 32 so as to be located between the battery 90 and the wearer's neck when mounted. As a result, the heat generated from the battery 90 is transmitted to the wearer, so that the fit of the neck-mounted device is improved. [Selection diagram] FIG. 4

results.title: Wearable device protective case with operating hole
results.abstract: The present invention creates a wearable device protective case with an operation hole, which includes a main casing and a knob. The main casing includes a frame part and two edge parts. The two edge wrapping portions are respectively disposed on opposite two sides of the frame portion, and are bent downward and extended toward each other. The two wrapping edges have elasticity and extend more than half of the thickness of the wearing device. Two wear fitting grooves are respectively formed on the two lateral sides of each edging portion to correspond to the joints. An operation hole is formed on one of the edging parts, and the operation hole is used to correspond to the crown of the wearing device. In this way, the user only needs to apply force from above to the bottom to fasten the creation on the wearable device. This creation is easy to install, and can be installed when the wearable device is worn on the wrist, which can prevent accidental falling and breaking during the installation process.
results.owner: 迪摩凱斯國際股份有限公司

results.title: Device for communicating through the body, customisable with an accessory
results.abstract: The present invention   - a module (2) for communicating via the body, comprising a contact surface (3) for electrical contact with the skin of the wearer,   - a base (4, 14) comprising such a module,   Means (5A, 5B) for securing the device to a part of the body of the wearer in contact with the skin,   - relates to a portable electronic device (1) comprising means (6A, 6B) for attaching a personal accessory (7) or a watch case (8) to a device; The device is different in that it comprises means (6A, 6B) for attaching the base (4, 14) or the personal accessory (7) or watch case (8) arranged in such fixing means (5A, 5B).

results.title: Ring-shaped wearable terminal and flexible substrate
results.abstract: The present invention provides a ring-shaped wearable terminal and a flexible substrate capable of suppressing an increase in manufacturing cost and realizing deployment in various sizes. The ring-type wearable terminal of the present invention includes a ring and a communication unit accommodated in the ring. The communication unit includes a ring-shaped flexible substrate (30). The flexible substrate (30) includes a joint portion (38) configured to be capable of joining at a plurality of different positions in the longitudinal direction according to the size of the ring. The joining position of the joining portion (38) can be changed so that the diameter of the ring-shaped flexible substrate (30) matches the size of the ring. Thereby, since one flexible substrate (30) can be used for rings of various sizes, it is possible to suppress an increase in manufacturing cost in the case of deploying various sizes.

results.title: Wearable device and control method thereof
results.abstract: The application discloses wearable equipment and a control method thereof, and the wearable equipment comprises: the shell and set up and be in the inside main circuit of casing, the shell includes drain pan, elastic component and is used for detecting the sensor subassembly of user's physiological index, the elastic component inboard sets up around the sensor subassembly, the outside of elastic component with the drain pan is connected, the sensor subassembly is connected with the main circuit electricity, and when needs detect user's physiological index, the elastic component makes through elastic deformation the sensor subassembly is close to user's skin. Through set up elastic component on wearable equipment, when the user wore wearable equipment and measures the physiological index, elastic component deformation made the high automatic floating of sensor assembly, has filled the clearance between wearable equipment and the user skin, has reduced not hard up phenomenon such as rocking to improve measurement accuracy.

results.title: Wearable electrical connectors
results.abstract: An wearable electronic connection assembly including a circuit board connected to a garment. The connector of the assembly has, from top to bottom, a tack pin having a head, a shank, and clinch attachment means with an undercut for receiving the cold flow of metal. The head of the pin passes through a hole in the circuit board and is in contact with a top surf ace of the circuit board. The shank of the pin extends farther downward through a layer of fabric beneath the circuit board. A ring is disposed beneath the fabric layer into which the tack pin is clinched forcing material of the ring into the undercut. A wire is attached to the ring which is electrically connected to the circuit board through its connection to the electrically-conductive pin.

results.title: Wearable accessory and protection circuit module provided therein
results.abstract: A wearable accessory, comprising: a device mounting part configured to be coupled with a device; and a body-coupled part formed to extend from the device mounting part along a lengthwise direction, wherein the body-coupled part includes: a flexible cell equipped with an electrode assembly, a casing that accommodates therein the electrode assembly, and a cell terminal connected to the electrode assembly and protruding from an opposite side of a side adjacent to the device mounting part; a connection circuit extending by being connected to a main circuit module formed on the device or the device mounting part; and a protection circuit module configured to connect the cell terminal and the connection circuit to each other and block an electrical connection between the cell terminal and the connection circuit when damage of the protection circuit module occurs by external force.

results.title: Device for communicating through the body which can be personalised by accessories
results.abstract: The invention relates to an electronic portable device (1) comprising a communication module (2) through the body, said module comprising a contact surface (3) intended to electrically contact the skin of a wearer,   a base (4, 14) comprising said module,   - Securing means (5A, 5B) of the device to a part of the wearer's body, in contact with the skin   - Fastening means (6A, 6B) of a personal accessory (7) or a watch case (8) on the device.

results.title: Wearable device and method of manufacturing the same
results.abstract: The present invention relates to a wearable device and a method for manufacturing the wearable device, the wearable device including: a wearable flexible printed circuit board on which a circuit pattern is formed on a base substrate having flexibility, air permeability, and waterproof characteristics; And a functional module mounted on the wearable flexible printed circuit board.

results.title: A wearable device, charging device and electronic device
results.abstract: The present application provides a wearable device, a charging device and an electronic device, which relate to the technical field of electronic devices and solve the problem of poor charging experience of the wearable device. The wearable device provided by the present application includes at least one power receiving part, the power receiving part has a first conductive terminal and a second conductive terminal, the first conductive terminal has a first docking end, and the first docking end protrudes from the first housing , for electrical connection with the corresponding conductive terminal in the charging device, the second conductive terminal has a second butt end, and the second butt end protrudes from the first housing, and is used for electrical connection with the corresponding conductive terminal in the charging device, The first magnet is arranged in the accommodation cavity, and is located between the first conductive terminal and the second conductive terminal, and is used for engaging with the magnet in the charging device. The thinner and lighter design of the wearable device is facilitated by the two conductive terminals. In addition, disposing the first magnet between the two conductive terminals is also conducive to rational use of the internal space of the wearable device.

results.title: Wear sensor, monitoring system, bearing assembly, and planetary gearbox
results.abstract: The invention relates to a wear sensor (10) for a wear-prone component (20), which wear sensor comprises a plurality of contact layers (12, 12.1, 12.2, 12.3, 12.n) which are arranged to be sequentially wearable in order to detect a present state of wear, at least two contact layers (12, 12.1, 12.2, 12.3, 12.n) being arranged so as to be worn in part simultaneously, the at least two contact layers (12, 12.1, 12.2, 12.3, 12.n) being arranged offset from one another transverse to a wear direction (25) and in the wear direction (25), but positioned only partially overlapping one another as considered transverse to the wear direction (25). The invention also relates to a method (100) by means of which a state of wear at the wear-prone component (20) can be determined using a wear sensor (10) of this kind. The invention also relates to a monitoring system 70 with a corresponding wear sensor (10) and a bearing assembly (50), in which a wear sensor (10) of this kind is used. The invention also relates to a computer program product (80) for simulating an operating behaviour of a wear sensor (10) of this kind.

results.title: Wearable electronic device having contactless data communication function and contactless data communication system
results.abstract: Provided is a wearable electronic device having a non-contact data communication function, which can suppress a decrease in communication function even when a conductive member is used for a case body and other parts.   A movement 104 and a dial plate 107 are arranged inside a case portion 101. An annular magnetic member 108 is disposed on the outer peripheral side of the movement 104, and the magnetic member 1   A loop-shaped antenna 111 is disposed in the annular groove 108a of 08. Magnetic member 10   An insulating member 109 is disposed on the outer peripheral side of 8. The magnetic member 108 is made of a soft magnetic material having a higher magnetic permeability than the case portion 101. Thereby, even when the case part 101 is comprised with electroconductive materials, such as a metal, the fall of communication sensitivity and a communication distance can be suppressed.   [Selection] Figure 5

results.title: Wearable electronic device with an inductive user interface
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device comprises a housing, a pushbutton, a sensor, and a processing element. The housing includes a sealed internal cavity formed in part by a bottom wall and a side wall. The pushbutton is coupled to an outer surface of the side wall and includes a plunger configured to move in relation to the side wall when the pushbutton is pushed. The sensor is positioned in the internal cavity adjacent to an inner surface of the side wall and includes a conductive element through which an electronic signal is operable to flow. The sensor is configured to modify an electrical characteristic of the electronic signal according to a distance between the plunger and the conductive element. The processing element is configured to receive the electronic signal from the sensor and to process the electronic signal to determine when the pushbutton is pushed.

results.title: Wearable wireless device for monitoring, analyzing and communicating physiological status
results.abstract: A wearable compact, lightweight, noninvasive, wearable 'unified' device or system (10), that does not compromise a user's motion and flexibility, detects, processes, analyzes and reports predetermined physical states of a human body. The system includes at least one pair of sense electrodes (14) and one reference electrode (16), each configured to be adhesively attached to a surface of the body (30). An electronics module (12) is in electrical communication with each of the electrodes, includes a power source, and processes and analyzes signals provided by the electrodes. The plurality of electrodes and the electronics module are covered by a single adhesive membrane (20) that enables the wearable device to adhere to the surface of the body.

results.title: Wearable devices and detection systems
results.abstract: The present invention relates to a wearable device (100) that can be worn by a subject, comprising: a base (130); a first arm (111) extending from the base; a second arm (112) extending from the base; a first wiring (141), configured along the first arm; the first sensor (101), connected with one end of the first wiring (141), installed on the body of the subject when the subject wears the wearable device (100) on, detecting the body data of the subject; the signal processing device is connected to the other end of the first wiring (141) to process the detection signal from the first sensor (101), and the signal processing device is installed on the base (130).

results.title: Wearable article and method of making the same
results.abstract: A wearable article 100 comprising a plurality of connection interfaces 211a for coupling with an electronics module, and an attachment mechanism for releasably attaching the electronics module to the wearable article, the mechanism including a material layer 201 and a magnetic material 161 coupled to the material layer, the magnetic material being provided between a plurality of connection interfaces. Preferably a conductive pathway extends from the connection interfaces, the pathway being arranged to connect the connection interface to an electronic component 200a, 200b. The electronic component may comprise an electrode, and the connection interface may be provided on the material layer. The material layer may form a pocket space 217, with the magnetic material contained within the pocket space. Also claimed is a method of manufacturing such a wearable article.

results.title: PORTABLE SENSOR SYSTEM WITH GARMENT AND ELECTRONIC MODULE, GARMENT FOR PORTABLE SENSOR SYSTEM, AND ELECTRONIC MODULE FOR PORTABLE SENSOR SYSTEM
results.abstract: Wearable sensor system (10) comprising a garment and an electronic module (14), wherein the electronic module (14) comprises a housing (42), a printed circuit board provided in the housing (42) and at least one contact element (54) electrically connected to the printed circuit board, wherein the garment includes a glove (16), an electrical functional element and a mount (20) attached to the glove (16) for repeated toolless attachment of the electronic module (14 ) on the glove (16), wherein the frame (20) comprises a housing space for housing the electronic module (14), a bottom (24) which delimits the housing space towards the glove (16), at least one antagonist contact (26) electrically connected to the functional element and a guide, where the electronic module (14) can be inserted into the frame (20) of the garment in such a way that the electronic module (14) can occupy two positions, and in the first position, said at least one contact element (54) is shielded rté of the mount (20), and in the second position said at least one opposing contact (26) of the mount (20) and said at least one contact element (54) of the electronic module are in contact.

results.title: Case device and method for providing charging function
results.abstract: A case device for providing a charging function according to various embodiments of the present disclosure comprises: a housing including an inner space for receiving a wearable device; a communication interface providing a wired or wireless connection with the wearable device; at least one reception groove formed in the inner space for receiving the wearable device; at least one thermoelectric element disposed to be partially exposed through the at least one reception groove; a heat radiating member disposed adjacent to the at least one thermoelectric element; a battery disposed in the housing; and at least one processor electrically connected to the communication interface, the at least one thermoelectric element, the heat radiating member, and the battery, wherein the at least one processor may obtain state information of the wearable device and control the at least one thermoelectric element on the basis of the state information of the wearable device.

results.title: Wearable components and smart wearable devices
results.abstract: The wearing component of the smart wearable device includes: a wearing part, which is used to fix the device body of the smart wearable device in the wearing position, and a main control chip is arranged in the device body; the wearing part has a first module expansion interface, which is operably connected to the a main body expansion interface on the main body of the device, the main body expansion interface is connected to the main control chip; and at least one second module expansion interface, which is electrically connected with the first module expansion interface, and the second module expansion interface is operably connected and arranged on the additional function module The additional function module is provided with an additional function chip, and the function module interface is connected to the additional function chip; when the second module extension interface is connected to the function module interface, the main control chip is electrically connected to the additional function chip. With the smart wearable device wearing component provided by the present invention, the user can switch and expand the functions of the smart wearable device by replacing the additional function module, so as to form a hardware architecture conforming to his usage habits.

results.title: A safety and life-saving technical structure
results.abstract: The invention discloses a safety and lifesaving technical structure, which comprises a wearing body, a backing ring device arranged in the wearing body, a locking device connected with the wearing body, and a locking device fixedly arranged at the upper side end of the device body. The main body of the device and the floating device arranged in the main body of the device. The main body of the wearing device is a three-quarter ring-shaped ring body. The ring device is arranged in the main body of the wearing device. The ring device includes The ring cavity in the wearing body is provided with an opening groove on the inner wall of the ring cavity close to the center of the ring body, an air cushion ring is arranged in the ring cavity, and an air cushion ring inflation port is provided at the upper end of the air cushion ring. The outer surface of the inflation port of the air cushion ring is fixedly embedded in the inner wall of the side of the ring cavity close to the main body of the device.

results.title: Physiological data measurement components of wearable devices and wearable devices
results.abstract: The present disclosure relates to a physiological data measurement assembly of a wearable device and the wearable device, the physiological data measurement assembly comprising: a first electrode (1) for contacting a user's finger, and a second electrode (2) for Attached to the user's skin, the main board (4), and the first flexible circuit board (3), comprising: a first connection section (31) for connecting the first electrode (1) and the second electrode (2) Electrical connection, and a second connection segment (32) for electrically connecting the second electrode (2) with the main board (4). Through the above technical solutions, the physiological data measurement component of the wearable device and the wearable device provided by the present disclosure can solve the technical problem that the conduction path between the two electrodes is too long.
results.owner: 北京小米移动软件有限公司

results.title: Wearable electronic installation
results.abstract: The utility model relates to a kind of Wearable electronic installation.This Wearable electronic installation comprises a device body, a wearable unit, an Anneta module and a lead piece.Device body has a wireless communication module.Wearable unit jockey body, in order to be worn on it user.Anneta module is embedded in wearable unit completely.Lead piece part is embedded in wearable unit, and is electrically connected Anneta module and wireless communication module.Because Anneta module is positioned at outside device body, keep each other misplacing with device body, therefore Anneta module can be avoided being subject to the interference of device body or shielding and weaken the original antenna performance of Anneta module.
results.owner: 广达电脑股份有限公司

results.title: A ring used to detect the user's physiological information
results.abstract: The invention discloses a finger ring for detecting physiological information of a user, which includes a shell part and a detection combination. The shell has an inner space for accommodating a user's finger. The inner space includes an annular area and a recessed area. The depressed area has a first side, a lower belly and a second side connected in sequence. The first side and the second side are located on two sides of the recessed area and respectively connected to two sides of the annular area. The annular area covers the back of the user's finger. The lower belly of the concave area contacts the pulp of the user's finger, and the first side area and the second side area respectively contact the sides of the user's finger. The detection combination is arranged in the casing. The detection combination includes a first detection module and a second detection module respectively located on the first side and the second side. The user's finger will not rotate and deviate relative to the ring, ensuring that the detection combination of the ring can be accurately aligned with the lateral artery of the user's finger, so as to obtain the optimal blood oxygen saturation.
results.owner: 原相科技股份有限公司

results.title: Wearable equipment of wireless electrocardio monitoring front end
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a wearable equipment of wireless electrocardio monitoring front end belongs to medical field. The wearable device at the front end of the wireless electrocardiogram monitoring comprises a wearable body and a plurality of conductive fastener bodies, wherein conductive layers are arranged at different set positions on the outer surface of the wearable body, a plurality of through holes penetrating through the conductive layers are formed in the wearable body, and the through holes in each conductive layer are distributed in a cross shape; an annular guide groove is formed in the conductive fastener body, an annular conductive telescopic piece extending out of the annular guide groove is placed in the annular guide groove, an annular pressure spring is installed between the annular conductive telescopic piece and the bottom of the annular guide groove, an anti-falling bulge is arranged on the side wall, far away from the annular pressure spring, of the annular guide groove, and a conductive female buckle matched with the electrode plate connecting end is arranged on one side, close to the anti-falling bulge, of the conductive fastener body; the wearable type antenna is provided with an acquisition and processing module respectively connected with each conductive layer, and the acquisition and processing module is connected with a wireless communication module.

results.title: Wearable electronic circuit and DIY external member thereof
results.abstract: The utility model provides a wearable electronic circuit and DIY external member thereof relates to electronic circuit technical field. The utility model provides a wearable electronic circuit includes: a liquid metal line on the skin; the power supply and the at least one element are connected with the liquid metal circuit, and the power supply, the liquid metal circuit and the at least one element form a closed loop; an encapsulation layer covering the liquid metal line, the power supply, and the at least one component. The technical scheme of the utility model wearable electronic circuit can be makeed simply, and maneuverability is strong, helps satisfying the user to wearable electronic device's individualized demand.
results.owner: 北京梦之墨科技有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint chip packaging structure and fingerprint module provided with fingerprint chip packaging structure
results.abstract: The utility model relates to a fingerprint chip packaging structure and a fingerprint module provided with the fingerprint chip packaging structure. The fingerprint chip packaging structure includes: a fingerprint chip; a conductive part arranged on the fingerprint chip to electrically connect the fingerprint chip to an external structure The package is packaged and molded on the fingerprint chip and the conductive parts. The package has a top wall and a bottom wall opposite to the top wall. The package includes a first accommodation hole and a second accommodation hole. The first accommodation hole is located at the top Between the wall and the bottom wall, the second accommodating hole communicates with the first accommodating hole and the bottom wall, the fingerprint chip is located in the first accommodating hole, and the conductive element is located in the second accommodating hole. The above-mentioned fingerprint chip packaging structure, the fingerprint chip is electrically connected to the external structure through conductive parts, so there is no need to set up electrical connection structures such as conductive connecting wires, so it has a relatively thin thickness, which is conducive to the thinning of electronic equipment provided with the fingerprint chip packaging structure develop.
results.owner: 南昌欧菲生物识别技术有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint sensor packaging module and manufacturing method thereof
results.abstract: A fingerprint sensor packaging module includes a light-pervious cover layer, a conductive pattern layer on the light-pervious cover layer, a finger sensing chip on the conductive pattern layer, a circuit board on the light-pervious cover layer, and a package member. The conductive pattern layer includes a plurality of pads. The fingerprint sensing chip is electrically connected to the conductive pattern layer by contacting to the pads. The circuit board is electrically connected to the conductive pattern layer and has a hole and the hole exposes the fingerprint sensing chip. The fingerprint sensing chip is disposed in the hole. The package member disposed in the hole and at least cover the fingerprint sensing chip.

results.title: A wearable apparatus
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a wearable apparatus, this a wearable apparatus includes the main part, the main part includes: metal casing and nonmetal core, nonmetal core inlays in metal casing's inner chamber, and the last border of nonmetal core is at least and metal casing's up end parallel and level, makes the last border of nonmetal core can partly expose metal casing, a wearable apparatus's antenna is walked the line and is connected the back with printed circuit board PCB, sets up the position of the border and up end parallel and level metal casing on nonmetal core. The technical scheme of the utility model, last border through setting up nonmetal core at least and metal casing's up end parallel and level makes the last border of nonmetal core can partly expose metal casing to establish the antenna in the position portion with up end parallel and level metal casing last border and walk the line, make the antenna walk the line and can expose metal casing, improve a wearable apparatus's antenna performance.
results.owner: 歌尔声学股份有限公司

results.title: Electronic device
results.abstract: Various embodiments of the present disclosure relate to a wearable electronic device including a speaker, and particularly to a wearable electronic device worn on a user's ear.  According to various embodiments of the present disclosure, an electronic device may include a housing; A first surface disposed in the housing inner space facing a first direction, a second surface facing a second direction different from the first direction, and a third surface facing a third direction different from the first and second directions a battery comprising a first pole on the first surface and a second pole on the second surface; a power management circuit that is spaced apart from the first surface of the battery by a predetermined distance and provides power used for operation of the electronic device to at least one electronic component disposed inside the electronic device using power from the battery; A first part comprising; and a second portion electrically connected to the battery and disposed to surround at least a portion of the second side and/or the third side of the battery. an antenna electrically connected to the printed circuit board and communicating with an external electronic device; and a connection member disposed on the first surface of the battery and electrically connecting the first portion of the printed circuit board and the first pole of the battery. In addition, various embodiments may be possible.

results.title: Interchangeable Powering Assembly for Smart Ring
results.abstract: An interchangeable powering assembly for a smart ring that is worn on a segment of a finger of a user. The assembly powers the smart ring without requiring the smart ring to be removed from the finger, but rather through at least one interchangeable power source having ornamental characteristics. The power source detachably couples to the smart ring through an integrated retention housing and a coupling member. The retention housing integrates into the smart ring. The retention housing includes at least one internal contact for electrically communicating with the electrical and sensing components of the smart ring, and at least one external contact for electrically communicating with the interchangeable power source. The coupling member detachably mounts into a housing aperture that forms in the retention housing to carry electrical power from the interchangeable power source to the retention housing for electrical distribution to the smart ring through the contacts.

results.title: Customizable wearable electronic device and method of assembling the same
results.abstract: Example customizable wearable electronic devices and methods of assembling the same are disclosed. An example customizable wearable electronic device includes a housing bottom element; a housing top element, the housing top element including a radio frequency (RF) attenuating portion and an RF conducting portion, the RF attenuating portion including a material that attenuates RF energy, the RF conducting portion including a conductive material, the housing top The element is separated from the housing bottom element by an electrically isolating gap element; a conductive contact for coupling the RF conductive portion of the top housing element to a communication module in the customizable wearable electronic device; A selected one of the different custom parts is electrically coupled to the RF conductive portion of the housing top member when the selected custom part is assembled to the housing top member.

results.title: Wearable electronic devices having a multi-use single switch and methods of use thereof
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device includes a body defining an aperture therethrough, sized and shaped to receive a digit of a user. The wearable electronic device may include a processor housed in the body and an input device at least partially extending from an outer surface of the body to receive input from another digit of the user. The input device has an actuating surface that is movable between a first position and a second position. Movement of the actuating surface between the first position and second position provides an input to the processor. The wearable electronic device includes a transmitter coupled to the processor and configured to send electronic transmissions to an external electronic device, the electronic transmissions corresponding to the inputs received from the user, and a power source for providing power to the processor, the input device, and the transmitter.

results.title: Fixing belt of wearable device, method for manufacturing the same, and wearable device
results.abstract: A method for manufacturing a fixing belt for a wearable device, includes providing a flexible circuit board including a first area, a second area, and a pad in the first area; disposing an insulating layer on the flexible circuit board, the insulating layer being disposed in the second area; forming an electric conductive portion in the insulating layer; disposing a first protective layer and a second protective layer on opposite surfaces of the flexible circuit board, the electric conductive portion being between the flexible circuit board and the first protective layer; mounting an electronic component on the pad. A portion of the fixing belt containing the second area is a plug-in area, and the plug-in area is configured to be engaged with a device body of the wearable device, the electric conductive portion is disposed in the plug-in area.

results.title: Wear sensing device with housing
results.abstract: A wear sensing device (42) is disclosed. The wear sensing device may have a wear sensor (66). The wear sensor may have a plurality of wear members (74), a communication device (72), and a processing device (68). The processing device is configured to generate a signal representative of wear based on the state of the plurality of wear members. The processing means may also be configured to transmit the signal using the communication means. The wear sensing device may also have a housing (56). The housing may at least partially surround the wear sensor and include a plurality of discrete slots (76). The plurality of wear members may be positioned in the plurality of separate slots.

results.title: Wearable electronic equipment and communication system
results.abstract: The utility model is about a kind of Wearable electronic equipment and communication system, relates to communication technical field, and fundamental purpose is to make Wearable electronic equipment that the communication module of external unit can be utilized to carry out access network.Wearable electronic equipment comprises: housing, is provided with draw-in groove in described housing; Stationary installation, described stationary installation is connected with described housing, described Wearable electronic equipment to be fixed on supporter by described stationary installation and when described Wearable electronic equipment is fixed on described supporter by described stationary installation, described stationary installation and described housing form annulus; Process chip, is fixedly installed in described housing, connects described draw-in groove, and described process chip is the chip obtaining data based on the subscriber identification card be placed in described draw-in groove; Wireless communication module, is fixedly installed in described housing, is electrically connected described process chip, and described wireless communication module is the communication module described data being wirelessly sent to external unit.

results.title: For fixing the device of wearable device main body
results.abstract: The utility model provides a kind of for fixing the device of wearable device main body; described device includes protective shell and cutting; the protective shell is equipped with the groove body for accommodating the wearable device main body; the protective shell, which is equipped with, is inserted into the socket in the protective shell for the cutting; when the cutting is inserted into the protective shell; the cutting and the protective shell are relatively fixed; fixing groove in the cutting and the wearable device main body cooperates, and the wearable device main body is fixed in the groove body.The utility model is convenient to installation and removal wearable device main body, and volume is more small and exquisite.
results.owner: 深圳市亿兆发科技有限公司

results.title: An easy-to-wear myoelectric bracelet
results.abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of wearable devices, and discloses an easy-to-wear myoelectric wristband, which comprises a host module and an eight-channel circular platform-shaped ring belt, and the eight-channel circular platform-shaped belt is located below the host module. The scheme includes a host module and an eight-channel round-shaped ring belt arranged in sequence, and the end of the eight-channel round-table ring belt is a hook-and-loop fastener around the hole; the host module is a hard plastic shell, and the module is equipped with a switch button, an indicator light, Magnetic charging column, circuit board and battery; the eight-channel round-shaped ring belt is made of silicone material, and the ring belt is round-shaped, and there are eight-channel flexible circuits and conductive copper pillars arranged in an array on the ring belt; Velcro and silicone ring belt are glued Sticking method, Velcro adjusts the tightness of the arm through the back-adhesive way of the end hole of the silicone ring belt and fixes the ring belt on the front part of the forearm. The round platform type of the present application fits the body curvature of the forearm, and has a strong integrated appearance, good fit performance, good fixability, and good adjustability.
results.owner: 浙江柔灵科技有限公司

results.title: Smart Host and Wearable Devices
results.abstract: The utility model discloses an intelligent host and a wearable device. The intelligent host includes a casing, a circuit board, a display screen and a near-field communication module. There is an accommodating space formed in the casing, the circuit board is set in the accommodating space, the display screen is set in the casing, and the display screen is electrically connected to the circuit board, the near field communication module is set in the casing, and the near field communication module passes through the first interface. The electrical components are electrically connected to the circuit board. By setting the near-field communication module on the casing instead of the circuit board, the increase in the volume of the circuit board due to the addition of the near-field communication module is avoided, and at the same time, the empty space in the casing is effectively used to make the structure of the smart host More compact, the smart host can achieve a more miniaturized design.
results.owner: 广东小天才科技有限公司

results.title: A device with a USB interface and a wearable device
results.abstract: The utility model proposes a device with a USB interface, which includes a shell and a groove. The shell includes a USB tongue support. The USB tongue support is provided with a groove, and the USB tongue is inserted into the groove. , forming a complete USB socket. The utility model also discloses a wearable device with a USB interface. In implementing the device and wearable device with a USB interface of the present invention, the tongue of the USB interface is directly inserted into the casing, and the groove of the casing and the USB tongue form a complete waterproof USB.
results.owner: 广东天波教育科技有限公司

results.title: Wearable device antenna and wearable device
results.abstract: Provided in the present invention is a wearable device antenna. The wearable device antenna comprises a surface body and a circuit board; the surface body comprises a metal base and a metal crown, the metal crown covering the metal base and being insulated from the metal base; the circuit board is received in the space formed between the metal crown and the metal base; and the circuit board is electrically connected to the metal crown by means of a first transmission body, and the circuit board is electrically connected to the metal base by means of a second transmission body. Also provided in the present invention is a wearable device.

results.title: Smart Rings and Chargers
results.abstract: Embodiments of the present application provide a smart finger ring and a charger, wherein the smart finger ring includes: a finger ring body, including a finger ring chamber and an annular side wall surrounding the finger ring chamber, the side wall has an inner surface located in the finger ring chamber and an inner surface The oppositely arranged outer surface, the insulating part, is arranged on the inner surface of the side wall along the radial direction of the ring body; the first charging electrode is arranged on the inner surface of the side wall; and the second charging electrode is arranged on the inner surface of the side wall, The second charging electrode is separated from the first charging electrode by an insulating portion. In the embodiment of the present application, at least a part of the first charging electrode and at least a part of the second charging electrode are insulated from each other and arranged on the inner surface of the side wall along the radial direction of the ring body, which increases the number of the first charging electrode and the second charging electrode and the The contact area of the inner surface of the ring body increases the contact area of the first charging electrode and the second charging electrode and the charging structure on the charger when the smart ring is matched with the charger.
results.owner: Oppo广东移动通信有限公司

results.title: Detachable wearable device comprising flexible patch
results.abstract: A wearable device, according to the technical concept of the present invention, comprises: an electronic module including at least one protruding electrode; a flexible patch including a contact electrode electrically connected to the at least one protruding electrode; and a coupling member covering one surface of the flexible patch and at least one side of the electronic module such that the contact electrode of the flexible patch is in close contact with the at least one protruding electrode of the electronic module.

results.title: Fingerprint module and electronic equipment equipped with fingerprint module
results.abstract: The utility model relates to a fingerprint module and an electronic device provided with the fingerprint module. The fingerprint module includes a circuit substrate and a chip. One side of the circuit substrate is provided with a connection surface, and a part of the connection surface is recessed to form an accommodation space with a bottom for accommodating The bottom of the space is formed with a conductive surface facing the connection surface, and a conductive structure is provided on the conductive surface. One end of the chip is accommodated in the accommodation space, and the other end of the chip protrudes from the connection surface; the fingerprint module also includes a first sealant, the first sealant Glue is filled between the inner wall of the containing space and the chip. In the above-mentioned fingerprint module, the gap between the chip and the inner wall of the accommodation space is filled with the first sealant, and since the first sealant has a large filling space, the surrounding space of the part where the chip is located in the accommodation space can be completely filled , to achieve a higher waterproof performance. Moreover, since the chip part is accommodated in the circuit substrate, the thickness of the fingerprint module is reduced, which is beneficial to the thinning of electronic equipment provided with the fingerprint module.
results.owner: 南昌欧菲生物识别技术有限公司

results.title: Electronic equipment assembly
results.abstract: The application discloses electronic equipment subassembly belongs to consumer electronics equipment subassembly technical field. The electronic equipment assembly comprises a wearable charging device and an electronic equipment body, wherein the wearable charging device comprises a main body part and a finger part connected with the main body part; the power supply device further comprises a power supply element and a power transmission element, wherein the power supply element is arranged on the main body part; the power transmission element is provided in the main body portion or the finger portion; the power supply element is electrically connected with the power transmission element; the electronic equipment body is provided with a battery and a rear shell covering the battery, wherein the rear shell is provided with a power receiving element, the battery is electrically connected with the power receiving element, and the power receiving element is abutted against the power transmission element and is electrically conducted. The charging device is worn on the hand of a user, so that the user can conveniently charge the electronic equipment body through the charging device while using the electronic equipment body, and the charging device is not limited by the length of a charging wire.
results.owner: 维沃移动通信有限公司

results.title: A conductive device for wearable devices
results.abstract: The invention discloses a conductive device of a wearable device. The wearable device includes a dial part and a watchband part, the dial part has a built-in first metal element; the watchband part is rotatably connected with the dial part, and the watchband part has a built-in second metal element The conductive device includes a connector and a conductive element, the first connection end of the connector is penetrated in the watchband part and is arranged towards the second metal element, the second connection end of the connector is connected with the first metal element, and the The first conductive end is in contact with the second metal element, and the second conductive end of the conductive element is connected with the first connection end. By implementing the design of the present invention, the electrical conduction between the first metal element and the connector and the second metal element can be realized by using the conductive element, so as to avoid the increase or occurrence of the resistance value due to the rotational friction between the connector and the second metal element The phenomenon of open circuit prolongs the service life of the connector and the second metal element, thereby ensuring the electrical conductivity of the strap part and the dial part.
results.owner: 广东小天才科技有限公司

results.title: Wearable device supporting environment information measurement
results.abstract: According to an embodiment of the present invention, there is provided a wearable device including a housing forming a part of a body of a wearable device, a sensor module accommodated in the housing and generating data by measuring a numerical value or concentration of environmental information on the operating environment, Wherein the housing includes a first groove formed on one side for introducing the outside atmosphere into the housing with respect to the supply of outside air to the sensor module and a second groove formed on one side of the housing, And a second groove formed on the other surface facing the one side surface so that the outer atmosphere discharged from the housing may be discharged to the outside of the housing, wherein the first groove and the second groove are formed on the one side surface and the other side surface The one side surface and the other side surface are etched to a predetermined depth so as to have a stepped portion and the first hollow and the second hollow are respectively formed as a central region Wherein the first hollow and the second hollow are mutually communicated and connected to each other by a tube disposed inside the housing and a suction fan for sucking the outside atmosphere based on the rotation is provided in the inner space of the tube, And at least a part of the sensor module penetrates through the tube.

results.title: Fingerprint sensor module, portable electronic device having the same, and manufacturing method thereof
results.abstract: The present invention relates to a fingerprint sensor module having excellent sensing sensitivity, a portable electronic device having the fingerprint sensor module, and a method of manufacturing the same. A fingerprint sensor module according to an embodiment of the present invention includes a fingerprint sensor, a bracket, and a molding material. Here, the fingerprint sensor has a sensing part using a conductor formed on the substrate and a sensor circuit part electrically connected to the sensing part. The bracket has a groove formed therein to press the sensing part into the groove to receive the fingerprint sensor. The molding material fills the empty space of the groove and covers the sensor circuit portion and the sensing portion.

results.title: Fingerprint sensor chip package structure
results.abstract: The present invention provides a fingerprint sensing chip package structure, comprising: a metal substrate having a through opening and two grooves extending from opposite sides of the through opening; a fingerprint sensing chip disposed in the through opening and having an upper The surface and the lower surface, the lower surface has a solder pad; the cover plate is fixed on the metal substrate and covers the upper surface of the fingerprint sensor chip; the flexible circuit board is arranged on the lower surface of the fingerprint sensor chip, and has a first surface and The second surface has a first metal contact; and a metal reinforcing plate is embedded in the two grooves and covers the through opening; wherein, the solder pad is electrically connected to the first metal contact through a wire.
results.owner: 致伸科技股份有限公司

results.title: Wearable charging apparatus
results.abstract: A wearable charging apparatus configured for charging of a wearable device while the wearable device is in an operative position, such as on the wrist of the user the wearable charging apparatus includes a front housing portion, a rear charging portion, a coupling member and a charge system. The wearable device is positionable between the front housing portion and the rear charging portion. The front portion has a battery and the rear charging portion has a wearable charge coil that is placed in operable position relative to the wearable device and configured to electrically communicate with a coil within the body of the wearable device and coupled to a wearable battery therewith, to, in turn, transfer power from the battery within the cavity to the wearable battery.

results.title: Fingerprint recognition device and electronic device
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a fingerprint identification device and an electronic device. The fingerprint identification device comprises: a bottom plate body; a fingerprint detection chip, the fingerprint detection chip is mounted on a first surface of the bottom plate body; a touch sensing ring , the touch sensing ring is installed on the first surface of the bottom plate body and surrounds the fingerprint detection chip, and the touch sensing ring is electrically connected with the chip pins of the fingerprint detection chip; the isolation layer, the isolation layer A layer coats the touch-sensitive ring at least on a side of the touch-sensitive ring facing away from the first surface. In the fingerprint identification device of the utility model, the isolation layer can isolate the user's finger from the touch induction ring when the user's finger touches the fingerprint identification device, thereby effectively preventing the current conduction between the user's finger and the touch induction ring, preventing the user from conducting current. The self-static conduction to the touch sensing ring causes the fingerprint identification device to malfunction, making the fingerprint identification device safer and more reliable.

results.title: Ring-type wearable terminal and flexible substrate
results.abstract: A ring-type wearable terminal capable of developing a plurality of sizes while suppressing an increase in manufacturing cost is provided.   A ring-type wearable terminal includes a ring and a communication unit housed in the ring. The communication unit includes a ring-shaped flexible substrate 30. The flexible substrate 30 includes a joining portion 38 configured to be able to be joined at a plurality of different positions in the longitudinal direction according to the size of the ring. By changing the joining position of the joining portion 38, the diameter of the flexible substrate 30 formed in a ring shape can be adjusted to the size of the ring. Thereby, since one flexible substrate 30 can be used for a ring of a plurality of sizes, an increase in manufacturing cost when a plurality of sizes are developed can be suppressed.   [Selection] Figure 6

results.title: A wearable key and vehicle
results.abstract: Embodiments of the present application provide a wearable key and a vehicle, which relate to the technical field of key design. The wearable key includes: a body, a circuit board assembly, and a control element; the circuit board assembly is electrically connected to the control element , the circuit board assembly and the manipulation element are both provided on the body, the manipulation element is provided with a manipulation portion, and the manipulation portion is exposed outside the body. The wearable key is used to improve the convenience of carrying the key.
results.owner: 恒大恒驰新能源汽车研究院(上海)有限公司

results.title: A kind of intelligent wearable device showing pointer driving structure
