results.abstract: The present invention relates to intelligent wearable device fields, specially a kind of intelligent wearable device that can show pointer driving structure, including shell, pointer driving structure and the pointer being arranged in pointer driving structure, the pointer driving structure is located at housing central section region, the enclosure interior is equipped with power circuit block, the power circuit block is located at around pointer driving structure, vertically arranged along inner walls, all or part of the pointer driving structure is not covered in vertical direction by power circuit block;The shell at least has a straight line edge, and the power circuit block includes the circuit board and/or power supply vertically arranged along inner wall along the straight line.Intelligent wearable device disclosed by the invention makes traditional wearable device while taking into account mechanical type watch aesthetic feeling, realizes the function that interconnects between smart phone.
results.owner: 深圳智芯数据服务有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint identification module and manufacturing method thereof
results.abstract: The invention relates to a fingerprint identification module, which comprises a substrate, a fingerprint sensing die, a mold sealing layer and a circuit board. The substrate has a plurality of electrical contacts, and a plurality of electrical contacts are exposed outside the substrate. The fingerprint sensing die is attached to the substrate and electrically connected to the substrate to sense a fingerprint image. The mold sealing layer is formed on the substrate and seals the fingerprint sensing die therein, and the circuit board has a plurality of connection pads, and the circuit board is electrically connected to the substrate by a plurality of connection pads and a plurality of electrical contacts; wherein the substrate and the circuit The board is not integrally formed.
results.owner: 致伸科技股份有限公司

results.title: A wearable device with body sensing function
results.abstract: The utility model provides a wearable device with body sensory sensing function, relates to the technical field of wearable devices, and comprises: a fixed ring, the outer surface of the fixed ring is fixedly connected with a shell, and the inside of the shell is provided with a fixing mechanism. A sensor is arranged inside the casing, and the fixing mechanism includes a cover plate arranged on the top of the casing, glass is arranged on one side of the cover plate, and a push plate is arranged on one side of the casing. In the utility model, by setting the fixing mechanism, the cover plate provided with the sealing ring is used to seal and close the shell, so that the sensor has a good sealing feature inside the shell, reducing the damage of the sensor caused by the infiltration of water source into the inside of the shell, and improving the sensor's durability. The waterproof feature inside the shell improves the working efficiency of the sensor to sense the wearer's body sensation normally, and improves the waterproof measures when the sensor is in use.
results.owner: 上海众商网络科技有限公司

results.title: An electronic accessory, smart wearable product, smart protection method and related system
results.abstract: The invention discloses an electronic accessory, an intelligent wearable product, an intelligent protection method and a related system, wherein, the electronic accessory may include: a hollow shell, in which a circuit board is arranged; and a shell detachably connected to the shell The body connecting piece, the shell connecting piece includes: the shell base and the base connecting plate located under the shell base; the shell is detachably connected to the shell base, and the circuit board is electrically connected to the base connecting plate; the base The connection board is used for electrical connection with other electronic accessories. The above-mentioned electronic accessories in the present invention can conveniently and quickly realize the installation of the electronic accessories and then assemble them into a complete circuit. For the same or different circuit boards, after being contained in the housing, quick assembly or replacement between components can be realized, and the base connecting plate is used as a common/universal connector, which can match different circuit boards and has strong versatility.
results.owner: 智甲科技（北京）有限公司（Cn）

results.title: Wearable device and earbud
results.abstract: A wearable device includes a main body, a detection module and a controller. The detection module is located on the main body and includes an upper casing, an opposite lower casing and a proximity sensor. The lower casing has an elastic material. The proximity sensor is located on the upper casing to measure a distance from the proximity sensor to the elastic material. The controller is electrically connected to the detection module. The elastic material has a contact surface for the user to contact when the wearable device is worn on the user, thereby switching between an active mode and a standby mode of the wearable device. In addition, the present disclosure further includes an earbud.

results.title: Wearable device and smart watch
results.abstract: Disclosed are a wearable device and a smart watch. A printed circuit board (PCB) is provided in the wearable device. An antenna and an extension component for extending a reference ground of the antenna are assembled on the PCB board, the extension component being disposed outside the PCB board, and being connected to the PCB board by using a metal connector. A first connection end of the metal connector is connected to the PCB board, and a second connection end of the metal connector is connected to the extension component. The technical solutions provided in the present invention can overcome the shortcomings of low transmit power of an antenna and poor receiving sensitivity of the antenna in a current wearable device.

results.title: Wearable device for measuring bio-signals
results.abstract: A wearable device for measuring bio-signals is disclosed. The wearable device may comprise a frame, a display and a strap part. The wearable device may comprise: at least one first electrode disposed on the rear surface of the frame; at least one second electrode disposed at the strap part, and a main circuit board disposed inside the frame, and electrically connected to the at least one first electrode and the at least one second electrode in order to measure bio-signals. The wearable device may comprise a conductive connection member for electrical connection between the strap part and the frame. At least a part of the frame or the strap part is a non-conductive material, and signals can be transmitted from the at least one second electrode at the strap part to the main circuit board in the frame through the conductive connection member. The at least one second electrode can be exposed through one surface of the strap part. Alternatively, at least a part of the frame is a conductive material, and a part of the frame can be formed as a segmented region so as to be used as an independent signal transmission path. In addition, other various embodiments are possible.

results.title: Wearable remote control and information input device
results.abstract: 1. A wearable device for remote control and input of information, characterized in that on the outer surface of the device’s casing, which provides reliable fastening of the devices and its components to a person’s finger, a minimum quantity of each component of the device is equal to one: input devices that convert to electrical signals movements and finger presses on the surface and other elements of the input device processed by the microprocessor-based computing device built into the case and subsequently transmitted embedded wireless communication device enabling communication with other computer devices, power to all the electronic devices placed in the housing is provided a wearable device battery, rechargeable integrated into the housing receiver wireless zaryadki.2. Wearable device for remote control and input of information according to claim 1, characterized in that the identification module of the contactless access card interacting with the reader using RFID technology is located in the device’s case. The wearable device for remote control and input of information according to claim 1, characterized in that for communication with other wearable devices, a communication cable is used, which also supplies power.

results.title: Wearable equipment key and circuit thereof
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a wearable equipment key and a circuit thereof. The wearable equipment key comprises a magnet block, a Hall element and an operating lever, wherein the Hall element is arranged in a wearable equipment shell and is connected with a micro processing controller circuit of wearable equipment; the magnet block is slidably arranged and fixed at one end of the operating lever. The wearable equipment key and the circuit thereof provided by the utility model have the advantages that multiple functions can be realized, more design space can be saved for small-size wearable equipment and the use by users is facilitated.
results.owner: 上海华勤通讯技术有限公司

results.title: A portable wearable electronic device
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a portable wearable electronic device, comprising a dial and a watch strap. A lock is installed on the left side of the dial, and movable columns are installed on the upper and lower sides of the lock, and the movable columns are close to the lock. A lever is installed at the position of the horizontal center line, and a return spring is connected to the position of the lever close to the horizontal center line of the lock. The watch strap is installed at the position of the lock buckle and the lock plate close to the vertical centerline of the dial, the rear end of the dial is installed with a buckle, and the left and right sides of the heat conduction layer are provided with heat dissipation holes. A second insulating layer is installed below the layer. The portable wearable electronic device is provided with an arc-shaped lower end surface of the buckle, which can better fit the curvature of the wearer's wrist, improve wearing comfort, and the buckle can facilitate the dial to be stuck in a pocket or a belt to achieve Easy to carry effect.

results.title: An antistatic fingerprint sensor chip packaging structure and manufacturing method
results.abstract: The invention discloses an antistatic fingerprint sensing chip packaging structure and a manufacturing method thereof. The antistatic fingerprint sensing chip packaging structure includes a substrate, a fingerprint sensing chip, and a protective cover. The substrate and the The fingerprint sensor chips are interconnected through bonding wires, a metal ring is provided on the side of the protective cover, a conduction column is provided between the metal ring and the substrate, and the connection between the substrate and the fingerprint sensor chip is The space between the fingerprint sensor chip and the protective cover is bonded by adhesive glue, and the upper surface of the substrate, the fingerprint sensor chip, the bonding wire, the metal ring, the conductive column and the protective cover are plastic-sealed body encapsulation. In the packaging structure of the fingerprint sensor chip of the present invention, a metal ring is added on the side of the protective cover, and the metal ring is connected to the conductive column to conduct the static electricity in the process of fingerprint recognition, effectively preventing the risk of the fingerprint chip being broken down by static electricity, and improving chip lifetime.
results.owner: 华天科技（西安）有限公司

results.title: Narrow strip-shaped fingerprint chip, side-edge type fingerprint chip module and electronic equipment
results.abstract: The utility model provides a side formula fingerprint chip module, include: a narrow strip fingerprint chip comprising: an integrated circuit die to perform a fingerprint sensing operation; the integrated circuit comprises a substrate, a first electrode and a second electrode, wherein the substrate comprises a first surface and a second surface which are oppositely arranged along the thickness direction, an integrated circuit bare chip is arranged on the first surface so as to be electrically connected with the outside, an external terminal and an electrostatic conduction piece are arranged on the substrate, the external terminal is exposed from the second surface, and at least one part of the electrostatic conduction piece is exposed from the second surface so as to discharge static electricity; a package for packaging an integrated circuit die; the circuit board is attached to the second surface; the reinforcing plate is arranged on the other side surface of the circuit board back to the narrow strip-shaped fingerprint chip, the part of the electrostatic conduction piece exposed from the second surface is used as an electrostatic conduction terminal, the electrostatic conduction piece comprises a plurality of electrostatic conduction terminals which are separated from each other, and the electrostatic conduction terminal is located in a region between the external terminal and the edge of the substrate adjacent to the external terminal. The utility model also provides a narrow strip form fingerprint chip and electronic equipment.
results.owner: 深圳阜时科技有限公司

results.title: A smart wearable finger touch element set information device
results.abstract: The utility model discloses an intelligent wearable finger contact element set information device, which comprises a flexible contact element switch array glove, an attached flexible interface saddle and a controller. The flexible contact element switch array glove comprises a glove body, and fingers of the glove body The belly, the back of the finger, the center of the palm and the back of the palm are all distributed with circuit loops composed of conductive flexible wires, interface lines and switch contacts, covering each finger area and forming a multiplex switch array loop, line loop, interface line and The switch contacts extend symmetrically to the back of the hand and on the palm of the hand and are arranged regularly. The attached flexible interface saddle is attached to the flexible contact element switch array glove and fixed with the controller. The controller is connected to the flexible contact element through the attached flexible interface saddle. The switch array glove establishes a flexible connection and transmission of electrical signals. The utility model has a simple structure and convenient operation. It adopts a wearable structure and can be easily worn and controlled. The physical buttons and operating rods are abandoned. different controls.

results.title: Fixture of fingerprint identification module and manufacturing method of fingerprint identification module
results.abstract: The present invention provides a fixture for a fingerprint identification module, comprising a base, an upper cover, and a rotating shaft connected to the base or the upper cover, the base includes a plurality of receiving spaces, each receiving space for accommodating a circuit board and a fingerprint sensing component fixed on the circuit board, wherein the upper cover is fixed to the base by magnetic attraction, and includes a plurality of perforations respectively corresponding to the plurality of accommodation spaces, and each of the perforations is for an output component to pass through The insulating material is output through the output member and placed at the periphery of the junction of the circuit board and the fingerprint sensing element.
results.owner: 致伸科技股份有限公司

results.title: Coupled Multi-Frequency Antennas in Wearable Wireless Devices
results.abstract: The invention discloses a wearable wireless device. In one embodiment, the wearable wireless device includes: a circuit board; a casing for accommodating the circuit board, the casing has a front face and a back face, and the back face is set closer to the front face when worn a user; a first antenna element electrically connected to the circuit board and located on the front surface of the housing; and a second antenna element electrically connected to the circuit board and located on the front surface of the housing.

results.title: Fingerprint recognition device, manufacturing method therefor and electronic device
results.abstract: Disclosed are fingerprint recognition device having an improved structure to enable a driving device of an integrated circuit to have durability, a manufacturing method therefor, and an electronic device. The fingerprint recognition device can comprise: an integrated circuit electrically connected to at least one sensor electrode; a first circuit board located at an upper part of the integrated circuit and provided with the at least one sensor electrode; a second circuit board electrically connected to the first circuit board and located at a lower part of the integrated circuit; a molding layer provided at a lower part of the first circuit board to surround the integrated circuit so as to protect the integrated circuit from the outside; and a connection part electrically connecting the first circuit board and the second circuit board.

results.title: Stepped retaining ring
results.abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a two-part holding ring (101).   A rigid upper portion (110) has an annular recess along its inner diameter. The wearable annular lower portion (105) has an inner diameter, an annular extension defined by the inner diameter, and a vertical wall that is perpendicular to and opposite the inner surface of the second portion. The annular extension (225) fits into the annular recess of the annular first part. The bonding material is on the vertical wall of the annular second portion.   [Selection] Figure 3
results.owner: アプライド  マテリアルズ  インコーポレイテッド

results.title: Connector of wearable equipment
results.abstract: A connector for a wearable device. One end of a connector of the wearable device is connected with the wearable device which can be worn on a human body, and the other end of the connector of the wearable device is connected with a connector of a main control device, wherein the main control device is used for controlling the wearable device to train a target part of the human body; the connector comprises a shell and a circuit board, wherein the circuit board is arranged in the shell and is provided with a plurality of electric connecting channels; the electric stimulation device comprises a main control device, a plurality of electric connection contact points, one electric connection contact point corresponds to one electric connection channel, every two electric connection contact points form an electric stimulation channel, and the electric stimulation channel is used for receiving electric signals for training the target part of the human body from a connector of the main control device. The connector of the wearable device is matched with the connector of the main control device for use, is simple in structure and easy to carry, and effectively avoids inconvenience caused by heavy volume.
results.owner: 苏州易型健康科技有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint sensing chip package structure
results.abstract: The invention provides a fingerprint sensing chip packaging structure, which includes: a metal substrate having a through opening and two grooves extending from opposite sides of the through opening; a fingerprint sensing chip disposed in the through opening and having an upper surface And a lower surface, which has a solder pad; a cover plate, which is fixed on the metal substrate and covers the upper surface of the fingerprint sensor chip; a flexible circuit board, which is provided on the lower surface of the fingerprint sensor chip, and has a first surface and a second surface; Surface, the second surface has a first metal contact; and a metal reinforcing plate, which is embedded in the two grooves and covers the through opening; wherein the pad is electrically connected to the first metal contact through a wire.
results.owner: 致伸科技股份有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint sensor chip package structure and manufacturing method thereof
results.abstract: A fingerprint sensor chip package structure including a circuit carrier and a fingerprint sensor chip is provided. The fingerprint sensor chip is disposed on the circuit carrier. The fingerprint sensor chip includes a chip body and a plurality of sensing structures. The chip body has an active surface, a fingerprint sensing back surface, a plurality of bond pads disposed on the active surface and a plurality of through holes. The chip body is electrically connected to the circuit carrier with the active surface facing the circuit carrier. The sensing structures are disposed in the through holes respectively. Each of the sensing structures includes a first dielectric layer, a first metal layer, a second dielectric layer and a second metal layer. The first dielectric layer is exposed on the fingerprint sensing back surface. The second metal layer extends to the active surface to be electrically connected to the corresponding bond pad.

results.title: Charging interface and smart wearable device
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a charging interface and an intelligent wearable device, which belong to the technical field of intelligent wearable devices. The charging interface of the utility model includes a circuit board and a connecting piece, the circuit board includes at least one contact, and the contact is an oval structure; the connecting piece includes at least one elastic thimble, and each elastic thimble is used to connect a corresponding contact, And the elastic thimbles correspond to the contacts one by one. The circuit board of the charging interface includes contacts with an elliptical structure, and the connecting piece includes an elastic thimble, and the elastic thimble connects the contacts. By setting the contacts of the elliptical structure, the connecting piece can be conveniently connected with the circuit board, and the cost is low. lower.
results.owner: 深圳市源芯智能科技有限公司

results.title: A wearable device with a detachable key module
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a wearable device with a detachable key module, comprising a device seat, a key module and a wearable device body; wherein, a slot is formed on the device seat; the key module can be docked with respect to the slot Fixing and dismounting are separated; the wearable device body is fixed relative to the device base or the key module. The wearable device with the detachable key module of the present invention provides a slot on the device base 1 so that the key module can be disassembled relative to the slot, which can greatly facilitate people who are accustomed to wearing wearable devices for important keys It is easy to carry, and the key module is not easy to lose, with strong practicability.

results.title: Wearable device with disposable parts and reusable parts
results.abstract: Embodiments of a wearable device are provided. Wearable devices include reusable components and disposable components. The disposable includes a patient engaging substrate having an adhesive on the bottom side, electrodes on the bottom side, a disposable electrical connector, and a disposable mechanical connector. The reusable component includes a plurality of sealed housings mechanically coupled to each other and movable relative to each other, each of the plurality of housings houses one or more of a capacitor and a controller, the reusable component mechanical connector is adapted to The removably connectable to the disposable part mechanical connector and the reusable part electrical connector are adapted to be removably connected to the disposable part electrical connector. The device may include a cardiopulmonary physiology monitor or an automated external defibrillator among other types of devices.

results.title: High reliability fingerprint module
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of high reliability fingerprint module, including cover board, fingerprint chip, basic ring, flexible PCB, in the fingerprint chip insertion basic ring, the bottom margin of the basic ring is connected with the bonding of flexible PCB one end, and the fingerprint chip is installed on flexible PCB upper surface and is electrically connected with flexible PCB；Flexible PCB one end is chip interconnecting piece, and the other end is connector mounting portion, and capacitor element, resistance device and inductance component are equipped on the middle interconnecting piece between chip interconnecting piece and connector mounting portion；One epoxy glue adhesion coating is covered in the capacitor element, resistance device and inductance component surface and positioned at capacitor element, the flexible PCB region of resistance device and inductance component periphery.The utility model is conducive to reinforce capacitor element, resistance device and inductance component and contact of the device with air has also been isolated so that device is not easy to fall off in flexible PCB bonding strength, electrically bad caused by preventing humidity from aoxidizing.
results.owner: 江苏凯尔生物识别科技有限公司

results.title: Wearable device including multi-band antenna
results.abstract: A wearable device, comprising: a housing including a first surface, a second surface and a side surface, wherein a metal frame is formed on at least a part of the side surface; a display; a printed circuit board (PCB); on the PCB; and a ground area provided in the PCB, wherein the metal frame is electrically connected to the communication circuit at a first point of the metal frame and is selectively connected to the ground area at a second point of the metal frame, and wherein the communication circuit is configured to: transmit and/or receive signals in the first frequency band through the first electrical path formed without being connected to the ground area at the second point; and by being connected at the second point to The second electrical path formed in the case of the ground area transmits and/or receives signals in the second frequency band.

results.title: A wearable device based on myoelectric signals
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a wearable device based on myoelectric signals, comprising a main body 1, a main body 2 is arranged on both sides of the main body 1, a control module is arranged between two groups of the main body 2, the main body 1 and the main body 2 are arranged between two groups. The inner sidewall of the second main body is provided with a carrier cloth near the edge. The front side of the carrier cloth is provided with a carrier groove. The inner sidewall of the carrier groove is provided with a heating wire. The surface of the carrier cloth is provided with a Velcro 1 near the edge of the bearing groove, the side wall of the carrier cloth is provided with a pad, and the surface of the pad is provided with a Velcro 2 near the side away from the carrier cloth. There is a connecting cloth in between. The wearable device based on myoelectric signals can heat the user, can effectively resist the cold, so that the user can have a good body feeling even when the temperature is low, and can well fasten the cuff on the user's arm, avoid falling off.

results.title: Stretchable multi-layer wearable tag capable of wireless communications
results.abstract: A wearable tag capable of wireless communications includes a first elastic layer, a second elastic layer over the first elastic layer, wherein the second elastic layer is embedded with a first conductive circuit. The wearable tag includes a dielectric layer on the second elastic layer, a third elastic layer on the dielectric layer, wherein the third elastic layer is embedded with a second conductive circuit, wherein the dielectric layer comprises via holes that contain electric connections between the semiconductor chip and the first conductive circuit. A semiconductor chip is in connection with the first conductive circuit and the second conductive circuit, wherein the semiconductor chip, the first conductive circuit, and the second conductive circuit are configured to wirelessly communicate with external devices. The wearable tag also includes a fourth elastic layer on the semiconductor chip.

results.title: Wearable computing device mount with docking station
results.abstract: In one example according to the present disclosure, a wearable computing device mount is described. The wearable mount includes a harness that can be worn by a user and a plate that attaches to the harness. The computing device is selectively mounted to the board via mechanical fasteners. The mount also includes a docking station coupled to the board. The docking station includes a computing device port for engaging an electrical connector of the computing device when the computing device is mounted to the board, and an auxiliary port for receiving an auxiliary component, wherein the docking station electrically connects the computing device to the auxiliary component. join.
results.owner: 惠普发展公司，有限责任合伙企业

results.title: Wearable electronic device including multiple electrodes
results.abstract: A housing comprising a front plate and a rear plate facing in a direction opposite to the front plate, a display viewable through at least a portion of the front plate, disposed on the rear plate, a first electrode, a second electrode, a third Disclosed is a wearable electronic device comprising an electrode and a biocontact circuit including a fourth electrode, a contact impedance measurement module, a processor, and a memory operatively coupled to the processor. The wearable electronic device uses the contact impedance measuring module to provide a first contact impedance, a second contact impedance, and a third contact impedance respectively corresponding to the first electrode, the second electrode, the third electrode, and the fourth electrode. , and a fourth contact impedance is measured, and the degree of contact of a plurality of regions on the rear plate including the first region, the second region, the third region, and the fourth region to at least a part of the user's body is measured. A user interface may be identified based on the contact impedances, and a user interface indicating the contact degree of each of the plurality of regions may be displayed on the display. In addition to this, various embodiments identified through the specification may be possible.

results.title: Arm-worn device for live interactive equipment
results.abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of arm-worn devices, in particular to an arm-worn device for on-site interactive equipment, comprising a wearable device, wherein the wearable device includes a wearable ring main body, and a first fixing block is fixedly installed on one side of the wearable ring main body, so that the A protective box is fixedly installed on one side of the first fixing block, a first sliding groove is opened on one side of the first fixing block, and a first sliding block is slidably installed inside the first sliding groove. An interactive device main body is fixedly installed on one side of the slider, and the interactive device main body is installed inside the protective box, and one side of the first slider is provided with a fixing mechanism. The utility model is provided with a fixing mechanism, and the limiting column is inserted and installed into the interior of the limiting hole, so that the first sliding block can be firmly fixed inside the first chute, which increases the firmness of the structure and also facilitates the The staff disassembles and installs the main body of the interactive device, which is convenient for the staff to use.
results.owner: 河南畅学教育科技有限责任公司

results.title: Assembled wear-resisting ring and atomizing disc comprising same
results.abstract: The utility model discloses an assembled wear-resisting ring and an atomizing disc containing the same, wherein the assembled wear-resisting ring comprises a plurality of wear-resisting pieces distributed along the circumferential direction, the wear-resisting pieces are in a ring structure, and both sides of each wear-resisting piece are provided with semi-closed grooves; the semi-closed grooves between two adjacent wear-resistant pieces are combined into an installation groove for accommodating the end part of the guide column; the atomizing disc comprises an upper disc, a lower disc, a flow guide column and a spliced wear-resistant ring, wherein the spliced wear-resistant ring is divided into an upper wear-resistant ring and a lower wear-resistant ring, a wear-resistant sheet in the upper wear-resistant ring is an upper wear-resistant sheet, and a wear-resistant sheet in the lower wear-resistant ring is a lower wear-resistant sheet; the upper wear-resistant ring is arranged on the lower portion of the upper disc, the lower wear-resistant ring is arranged on the upper portion of the lower disc, the upper portion of each flow guide column is embedded in the mounting groove between every two adjacent upper wear-resistant sheets, and the lower portion of each flow guide column is embedded in the mounting groove between every two adjacent lower wear-resistant sheets. The utility model discloses a pin-connected panel wear ring can prevent the wearing and tearing of atomizing disk in the atomizing exit, and this wear pad is processed easily, and is with low costs.
results.owner: 广州市珑基机械科技有限公司

results.title: Method of attaching electronic module on fabrics by stitching plated through holes
results.abstract: A wearable electronics assembly includes one or more electronic modules coupled to a wearable electronics fabric. Each of the one or more electronic modules includes one or more plated through holes, through each of which is coupled an electrically conductive wire. The electrically conductive wire is stitched through the plated through hole and to a fabric onto which the electronic module is attached. The electronic module can include one or more electronic components coupled to a printed circuit board.

results.title: Wearable electronic product convenient for replacing functional module
results.abstract: The present utility model is applicable to the technical field of wearable electronic products. Provided is a wearable electronic product convenient for replacing a functional module, comprising a shell, and a module assembly and a mainboard within the shell. The shell comprises a front shell and a rear shell detachably connected to each other. The mainboard is provided with a control circuit and one or more elastic sheets, and the elastic sheets are electrically connected to the control circuit. The module assembly comprises a circuit board assembly and a functional module. One end of the circuit board assembly is provided with a male plug, and the other end thereof is provided with one or more external terminals. The functional module is provided with a female plug. The male plug and the female plug are inserted into each other. The external terminals are in one-to-one contact with the elastic sheets. The control circuit can load software having a plurality of functions. The circuit board assembly and the functional module are inserted into each other, so that it is convenient to assemble and disassemble and replace a different functional module, without changing the structure and size of an associated component. In addition, the elastic sheets are in contact with the external terminals to realize an electrical connection, thereby achieving a simple assembly, a wide contact area and a stable product performance.
results.owner: 深圳市沃特沃德股份有限公司

results.title: Wearable device for measuring biometric signals
results.abstract: Disclosed is a wearable device for measuring biosignals.  The wearable device may include a frame, a display, and a strap part. The wearable device includes at least one first electrode disposed on the back side of the frame, at least one second electrode disposed on the strap part, and at least one first electrode and at least one electrode disposed inside the frame for measuring biosignals. and a main circuit board electrically connected to the second electrode of  The wearable device may include a conductive connection member for electrical connection between the strap part and the frame. At least a portion of the frame or the strap part is made of a non-conductive material, and a signal may be transmitted from the at least one second electrode in the strap part to the main circuit board in the frame via the conductive connection member. At least one second electrode may be exposed through one surface of the strap part.  Alternatively, at least a portion of the frame may be made of a conductive material, and a portion of the frame may be formed as a segmented region to be used as an independent signal transmission path.  In addition to this, various other embodiments are possible.

results.title: Wearable Electronic Device and Method of Manufacturing Thereof
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device and method of manufacture are disclosed. The electronic device includes at least a printed circuit board, a non-rechargeable battery, a processing system, and a package material. The printed circuit board, the non-rechargeable battery and the processing system are completely and hermetically sealed and surrounded by the package material, such as silicone resin. The package process may include at least a molding process wherein the battery, the PCB and the processing system are placed into a mold cavity and package material, such as liquid resin, is supplied into the cavity and cured. The wearable electronic device fully embedded in the package material and is affixed to an article of clothing or item worn by the user, such as wrist band, head band, sock, glove, and shoe.

results.title: Electronic equipment
results.abstract: The application provides an electronic device, the electronic device includes: a functional device, a first connecting strip, a second connecting strip and a connecting piece, the first connecting strip and the second connecting strip are both connected to the functional device , the electronic device has a wearing state, and when the electronic device is in a wearing state, the connecting pieces are respectively detachably connected to one end of the first connecting belt and the second connecting belt far away from the functional device, to form a wearable ring. The electronic device provided in this application is not easy to fall off after being worn.
results.owner: Oppo广东移动通信有限公司

results.title: Wearable body temperature monitoring device and method
results.abstract: The present invention provides a wearable body temperature monitoring device and method, wherein the wearable body temperature monitoring device includes: a hollow housing having a sensing surface and an outer surface, and the sensing surface and the outer surface are opposite sides, The sensing surface is provided with an opening; and a circuit board is housed in the hollow housing, the circuit board has a first side surface opposite to the sensing surface and a second side surface opposite to the outer surface, And the circuit board is configured with a non-contact temperature sensor, a wireless transmission module, a processing unit and a battery, wherein the non-contact temperature sensor is located on the first side and is aligned with the opening of the sensing surface. . The device of the present invention can immediately respond to abnormal body temperature changes when attached to clothing.
results.owner: 豪展醫療科技股份有限公司

results.title: System, apparatus, and method for implementing a touch interface on a wearable device
results.abstract: The present disclosure is directed to apparatuses, systems, and methods for implementing a touch interface on a wearable computing device. Described herein is a wearable computing device comprising a printed circuit board (PCB), a housing configured to be attached to a user, enclosed over the PCB, and including a display surface, a plurality of electronic components disposed on the PCB and including a plurality of display components to generate display data visible through the display surface of the housing, and a user input touch interface at least partially overlapping the display surface of the housing. The user touch interface includes an array of capacitive touch sensitive electrode elements disposed on the PCB, wherein at least some of the electrode elements are interspersed on the PCB between two or more of the display components, and sensing circuitry configured to detect changes in the array of capacitive touch sensitive electrode elements.

results.title: A composite wear-resistant ring with a double-layer structure
results.abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of wear-resistant rings, in particular to a composite wear-resistant ring with a double-layer structure, which comprises an inner-layer ring body, and an outer-layer ring body is contacted and connected to the outer side of the first connecting block. A protection ring is connected to the outer side of the outer ring body, an assembly block is fixedly connected to the outer end of the protection ring, and a sector ring is contacted and connected to the outer side of the assembly block. The ends are respectively contacted and connected with clamping blocks, the inner side of the groove is hinged with a movable column, and the outer side of the movable column is fixedly connected with a movable plate. In the utility model, an outer ring body is contacted and connected through the outer side of the first connecting block, a protection ring is contacted and connected to the outer side of the outer ring body, an assembly block is fixedly connected to the outer end of the protection ring, and a sector ring is contacted and connected to the outer side of the assembly block. The outer ring body of the outer layer and the outer end of the inner layer ring body are respectively contacted and connected with a clamping block, so that the outer layer ring body and the inner layer ring body will not fall off after being rubbed, and at the same time, the disassembly is convenient.
results.owner: 无锡市大宏机械设备制造有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint module and electronic device
results.abstract: Disclosed are a fingerprint module (20) and an electronic device (100). The fingerprint module (20) comprises a circuit board (21), an adhesive (23) and a sensing chip (22), wherein the circuit board (21) is provided with a chip mounting area (211) and an accommodating portion (212) arranged around the chip mounting area (211), the sensing chip (22) is arranged in the chip mounting area (211), and the adhesive (23) is arranged on the accommodating portion (212) and is connected to the periphery of the sensing chip (22). The fingerprint module (20) avoids the problems of the complex structure and high production cost of an existing fingerprint module.
results.owner: 南昌欧菲生物识别技术有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint identification module and terminal equipment
results.abstract: The invention provides a fingerprint recognition module, which includes a substrate, a sensing chip, a metal wire and a cover plate, the sensing chip is fixed on the substrate, the substrate is provided with a first solder joint, and the upper surface of the sensing chip is There is a second soldering point on it, the metal wire is electrically connected to the first soldering point and the second soldering point, the cover plate is fixed on the side of the sensing chip away from the substrate, and the cover A groove is provided on the surface of the board close to the induction chip, and the metal wire is partially accommodated in the groove. The bent part of the metal wire is accommodated in the groove, which realizes the function of reducing the distance between the cover plate and the chip, and achieves the technical effect of reducing the volume of the fingerprint recognition module and improving the recognition accuracy.
results.owner: 南昌欧菲生物识别技术有限公司

results.title: Wearable equipment with electrocardio monitor function
results.abstract: The utility model discloses wearable equipment with an electrocardio monitoring function, which comprises a main body and an electrocardio monitoring patch, wherein the main body is provided with a back surface attached to a wrist when being worn and a front surface opposite to the back surface, and the back surface of the main body is provided with an inward sunken assembling part; the electrocardio monitoring paste is assembled in the assembling part and is provided with an inner side surface and an outer side surface which are opposite, and the inner side surface is attached to the bottom surface of the assembling part when the electrocardio monitoring paste is assembled in the assembling part; the electrocardio monitoring paste comprises an attaching part used for attaching the electrocardio monitoring paste on the body surface of a user, an electrocardio electrode used for collecting electrocardiosignals on the body surface of the user, a sensor used for converting the electrocardiosignals into electrocardio data, and a wireless communication module used for transmitting the electrocardio data to the main body or the mobile terminal. The electrocardio monitoring patch is assembled on the back of the wearable device, can be worn with one, is convenient to carry, and can be taken by a user at any time in daily wearing so as to carry out long-time electrocardio monitoring.

results.title: Wear rings and wear ring arrangements
results.abstract: The present invention is a wear ring (10) for the guidance of two machine components (30, 32) arranged movably relative to each other along/about an axis of movement (34), the wear ring being made of plastic or reinforced plastic material It relates to a wear ring formed as a single member and divided to have two free ends (14). The wear ring 10 has a cross-sectional width W that increases radially towards the rear side of the wear ring 10 at least locally. The wear ring is on the front side 16 of the wear ring and/or on the rear side 18 of the wear ring to increase the deformability and facilitate the mounting of the wear ring in the mounting groove of the machine element 30, 32. It has one or more grooves 24 formed in. The invention also relates to a wear ring arrangement wherein the wear ring fits within a mounting groove (54) of one of the machine components (30, 32) of the wear ring arrangement (100).

results.title: Antenna of wearable equipment and wearable equipment
results.abstract: An antenna of a wearable device and the wearable device. In the antenna, a metal bottom shell (3) of the wearable device is used as an antenna radiation body, a printed circuit substrate (7) is used as a grounding plate, and the metal bottom shell (3) is connected with a communication circuit module on the printed circuit substrate (7) through an antenna feeder (9); the metal middle shell (1) is connected with the metal bottom shell (3) through a first connecting line (2), and the metal middle shell (1), the metal bottom shell (3) and the gap form a slot antenna. By adopting the metal bottom shell (3) as the antenna radiation body, the printed circuit board (7) is used as the grounding plate, and the printed circuit board and the antenna are connected through the antenna feeder (9) to form the antenna, when the wearable device is worn, the arm is in contact with the metal bottom shell (3) as the radiation body, the effect of the arm on improving the impedance of the antenna is larger than the absorption effect, so that the radiation efficiency of the antenna when the wearable device is positioned on the arm is better than that of the antenna when the wearable device is positioned under a free space, and the radiation effect of the antenna of the whole wearable device is improved.

results.title: Wearable electronic device and manufacturing method thereof
results.abstract: The present application provides a wearable electronic device and a preparation method thereof. The housing of the wearable electronic device is provided with thermally conductive electrodes, the temperature sensor is provided and connected to the bearing board, and the first heat insulating member is provided between the housing and the bearing board. , a first through hole is arranged on the first heat insulating member, and the temperature sensor is arranged corresponding to the first through hole. Based on this, the carrying plate can be used as a carrier of the temperature sensor to carry a fixed temperature sensor, and the heat conduction connection between the temperature sensor and the heat conduction electrode is firmer and more stable; The thermal insulation can avoid the error influence caused by the temperature of other regions of the casing on the temperature sensor, and the temperature sensor can detect the temperature of the external object more accurately.
results.owner: Oppo广东移动通信有限公司

results.title: Electronic equipment including sensor modules
results.abstract: An electronic device is disclosed. The electronic device includes a housing and a sensor module disposed in at least a portion of the housing. The sensor module includes: a fingerprint recognition sensor; a protective layer covering the fingerprint recognition sensor; an adhesive member disposed on the protective layer; and a ceramic layer placed on the adhesive member, wherein an edge of the ceramic layer, an edge of the adhesive member, and An edge of a portion of the protective layer includes a machined surface. Other embodiments are also possible.

results.title: Wearable electronic device, and related connecting device
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device includes an electronic device body and a connection block. The electronic device body includes a first circuit module, a first fastening unit, and a first connecting unit. The first circuit module includes a control unit. The first connecting unit includes a plurality of first circuit contacts, wherein the first circuit contact is electrically connected to the control unit of the first circuit module, and the control unit determines a power supply condition of each of the first circuit contacts. The connection block includes a second fastening unit and a second connection unit. The second fastening unit is configured to fasten the first fastening unit. The second connection unit includes a plurality of second circuit contacts. The second connecting unit is configured to be connected to the first connecting unit, such that the first circuit contact is docked with the second circuit contact.
results.owner: 拓連科技股份有限公司

results.title: Open circuit wear sensors for use with conductive wear counterfaces
results.abstract: A component includes a surface subjected to a conductive wear counter surface (50). The part comprises: a substrate (10); one or more material layers (32) covering the substrate (10); a wear surface layer (16) covering the one or more material layers (32); a first A pair of separate and electrically open-circuited wear sensor conductors (12/14) disposed in said substrate (10), in said one or more layers of material (32), or in said wear surface layer (16) a first wear alarm circuit (68/69/70/74) for communicating with said first pair of conductors (12/14) to provide a first wear alarm; and wherein, when said wear opposing surface (50 ) wears away the respective covering layers, the wear counter surface (50) interconnects the first pair of conductors (12/14) to activate the first wear alarm circuit (68/69/70/74).
results.owner: 西门子能量股份有限公司

results.title: Wearing detection circuit and smart wearable device
results.abstract: The invention discloses a wearing detection circuit and an intelligent wearable device. The wearing detection circuit includes a charging interface, a switch and a wearing detection chip. The charging interface includes a charging post, and the switching switch has a first switch position connecting the wearing detection chip and the charging post so that the charging post serves as a detection plate for the wearing detection chip. Connect the charging interface of the smart wearable device to the wearing detection chip by setting the switch, so that the charging column of the charging interface can be used as the detection plate of the wearing detection chip for wearing detection, thus omitting the need to set a special metal sheet for wearing detection, simplifying the smart The assembly complexity of the components of the wearable device reduces the cost of the smart wearable device.

results.title: Fingerprint die set and terminal device
results.abstract: The utility model provides a kind of fingerprint film group component, including fingerprint mould group, circuit board, elastic electrode and connector, wherein, elastic electrode is set in fingerprint mould group, connector is set on circuit board, and elastic electrode is connect with connector, to realize being electrically connected for fingerprint mould group and circuit board.Fingerprint die set provided by the utility model is connect by elastic electrode with connector, to realize being electrically connected for fingerprint mould group and circuit board, it is possible to reduce the connection distance of fingerprint mould group and circuit board saves the use of material, brief cost, convenient for assembling.
results.owner: 珠海市魅族科技有限公司

results.title: Sensor for wear measurement, method of making, and method of operating same
results.abstract:
A wear sensor comprising:
         an insulating substrate having a top surface and a bottom surface;   a conductive electrode formed on said top surface of said insulating substrate;   an insulating wear lining material having a first side secured to said top surface of said insulating substrate and conductive electrode, an opposite second side that will be worn down by relative motion between the wear sensor and a moving component;   one or more contact points where the electrical properties between the electrode and the moving component can be measured; and   one or more perforations through the thickness of the substrate and electrode, through which an adhesive may flow, thereby increasing the peel strength between the wear sensor and race or between the wear sensor and the wear liner.

results.title: Wearable device and its static protection circuit
results.abstract: A wearable device includes: a first function module, an exposed contact point, a second function module, an electrostatic protection circuit, a detection module, a switching module, and a processing module. The ESD protection circuit converts the electrostatic input to an output voltage when an electrostatic input occurs. The detection module detects whether the exposed contact is connected to the external electronic module. The switching module electrically connects the exposed contact to the second functional module when the detecting module determines that the exposed contact is connected with the external electronic module, so that the external electronic module passes the exposed contact and the second functional mode. The group performs the transmission behavior, and when the detecting module determines that the exposed contact is not connected to the external electronic module, the exposed contact is electrically connected to the static protection circuit. The processing module receives the output voltage to reset the first functional module according to the output voltage.
results.owner: 宏達國際電子股份有限公司

results.title: Wearable devices and related systems
results.abstract: A wearable computing device may include a processor, memory, and a display operatively coupled to the processor and memory to display output therefrom. The processor and memory can be positioned within the resiliently compliant body. The elastic soft body may include a first end and an opposite second end, a first edge and an opposite second edge, wherein the first edge and the opposite second edge are between the first end and the opposite second end extend between. The body may further include a wearer active portion positioned between the first end and the intermediate region, wherein the finger active portion of the resiliently compliant body extends circumferentially about a longitudinally extending axis to define an open interior region, the longitudinally extending axis Positioned parallel to the first end and spaced from the resiliently compliant body, wherein the inner region of the wearer active portion defines an inner surface.
results.owner: 智能专利有限责任公司

results.title: Wearable device and electrostatic discharge protection circuit of the same
results.abstract: A wearable device is provided. The wearable device includes a first functional module, at least one exposed contact, a second functional module, an ESD protection circuit that converts an ESD input to an output voltage when the ESD input occurs, a detection module that detects whether the exposed contact is connected to an external electronic module, a switch module and a processing module. The switch module electrically connects the exposed contact and the second functional module when the exposed contact is connected to the external electronic module to perform a transmission behavior with the second functional module through the exposed contact. The switch module electrically connects the exposed contact and the ESD protection circuit when the exposed contact is not connected to the external electronic module. The processing module receives the input voltage to reset the first function module according to the input voltage.

results.title: Novel touch finger sleeve
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a novel touch finger sleeve, which comprises a finger sleeve body including an inner layer and an outer layer. The inner layer is made of plastics and the outer layer is a conductor made of conductive foam. An elastic band for fixing the finger sleeve body on a finger is arranged at the position of an opening of the finger sleeve body, so as to function in fixation. The length of the finger sleeve body is from a finger tip to a second joint of the finger or from the finger tip to a finger root. As the outer layer of the finger sleeve is the conductor and a user sleeves the finger sleeve on the finger or outside a glove, the novel touch finger sleeve is convenient and practical when being used for electronic products such as a touch screen mobile phone and the like.

results.title: Wearable electronic device including overlapping communication antennas
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device is described. The wearable electronic device includes two communication antennas. The first of the two communication antennas is a current-carrying antenna that is electrically and physically connected to the printed circuit board of the wearable electronic device, and is housed in a first portion of the housing configured for mounting on a person's skin . The second of the two communication antennas is a scatterer antenna that is physically connected to the inner surface of the second portion of the housing and is configured to overlap a portion of the current-carrying antenna. The second portion of the housing faces away from the human skin when the wearable device is mounted on the human skin. The current from the current-carrying antenna is induced in the scatterer antenna to enable communication between the wearable electronic device and one or more other electronic devices.
results.owner: 威里利生命科学有限责任公司

results.title: Wearable device, control method and control device for wearable device
results.abstract: The present application discloses a wearable device, a control method and a control device for the wearable device. The disclosed wearable device includes a main body part, a connection belt and a detachable module, the connection belt is connected with the main body part, the main body part includes a functional module and a first battery, and the detachable module includes a second battery; There is an installation slot, the installation slot has a port, the detachable module can be installed into the installation slot through the port, and is detachably connected to the main body; when the detachable module is connected to the main body, the detachable module The orientation of the port of the installation slot is limited and matched with the main body, and the second battery is electrically connected to the functional module. When the detachable module is separated from the main body, the first battery is electrically connected to the functional module. The above solution can solve the problem that the wearable device in the background technology cannot perform continuous work for a long time.
results.owner: 维沃移动通信有限公司

results.title: Intelligent finger ring for body fat detection
results.abstract: The utility model discloses an intelligent finger ring for body fat detection, which comprises an inner shell, an outer shell, a circuit board, a first electrode and a second electrode, wherein the inner shell and the outer shell are sleeved with each other; the circuit board is fixed between the inner shell and the outer shell, and a body fat detection module is fixedly arranged on the circuit board; the first electrode is fixed on the inner shell and provided with a sensing surface exposed on the inner surface of the inner shell, and the second electrode is fixed on the outer shell and provided with a sensing surface exposed on the outer surface of the outer shell. According to the intelligent finger ring for detecting the body fat, the body fat rate can be detected by arranging the body fat detection module and the detection electrode, and the first electrode is tightly attached to the skin of a human body due to the good attaching tightness of the finger ring and the finger, so that the detection accuracy is improved; and the finger ring has small volume and is convenient to carry.
results.owner: 潍坊歌尔电子有限公司

results.title: A wearable device and its control method
results.abstract: The present application discloses a wearable device and a control method thereof. The wearable device includes a casing, and a main circuit disposed inside the casing. The casing includes a bottom casing, an elastic component and a device for detecting a user. A sensor component for physiological indicators, the inner side of the elastic component is arranged around the sensor component, the outer side of the elastic component is connected to the bottom case, and the sensor component is electrically connected to the main circuit, when the user's physiological indicators need to be detected , the elastic component makes the sensor component close to the user's skin through elastic deformation. By setting the elastic component on the wearable device, when the user wears the wearable device to measure physiological indicators, the deformation of the elastic component causes the sensor component to automatically float up, filling the gap between the wearable device and the user's skin, reducing looseness and shaking and other phenomena, thereby improving the measurement accuracy.

results.title: Wearable electronic device and assembly method of the wearable electronic device
results.abstract: The present invention provides a wearable electronic device, which includes a plurality of sub-spheres and a main sphere. The main sphere is concatenated with these sub-spheres. The main sphere includes a lower cover, an upper cover, a threading post, a chip and a wireless transmission element. The lower cover has a first installation space. The upper cover is arranged on the lower cover and covers the first installation space, wherein the upper cover has a second installation space, and the first installation space is communicated with the second installation space. The threading post is clamped between the lower cover and the upper cover, and is located in the first installation space and the second installation space. The chip is arranged in the first installation space. The wireless transmission element is arranged in the first installation space and is electrically connected to the chip. Another method for assembling a wearable electronic device is proposed.
results.owner: 酷碁科技股份有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint recognition device, method of manufacturing the same, and electronic device thereof
results.abstract: Disclosed are fingerprint recognition device having an improved structure to enable a driving device of an integrated circuit to have durability, a manufacturing method therefor, and an electronic device. The fingerprint recognition device comprise: an integrated circuit electrically connected to at least one sensor electrode; a first circuit board located at an upper portion of the integrated circuit and provided with the at least one sensor electrode; a second circuit board electrically connected to the first circuit board and located at under the integrated circuit; a molding layer provided under the first circuit board to surround the integrated circuit so as to protect the integrated circuit from the outside; and a connection part electrically connecting the first circuit board and the second circuit board.

results.title: Combination structure for touch device and wearable device
results.abstract: The present invention provides a combination structure for a touch device and a wearable device. The combination structure comprises: an annular frame; a glass cover plate, the glass cover plate being located in the middle area of the annular frame and connected to the annular frame; and a touch circuit board, a flexible circuit connected to the touch circuit board, and a main board connected to the flexible circuit, which are all provided below the glass cover plate. A recess is provided at the lower end of the annular frame, the recess is configured to accommodate the flexible circuit, and the bottom surface of the glass cover plate has a stepped structure. Also disclosed is the wearable device. The combination structure of the present invention can greatly reduce the contact area between the flexible circuit and the touch circuit board, thereby reducing the width of a black edge, improving the reliability of the device, and improving user experience.
results.owner: 广东高驰运动科技有限公司

results.title: Ring type monitoring device and monitoring system
results.abstract: The application discloses ring formula guardianship equipment and monitored system. The ring formula guardianship equipment includes: a housing, a battery and a circuit board assembly; the shell comprises an annular part and a protruding part, wherein the inner space of the annular part is used for accommodating the battery, and the inner space of the protruding part is used for accommodating the circuit board assembly; the battery is used for supplying power for the circuit board assembly; the circuit board assembly comprises a processing unit and a monitoring unit; the monitoring unit is used for acquiring physiological parameter data of a wearer, and the processing unit is used for carrying out corresponding operation according to the acquired physiological parameter data.

results.title: Pressing structure and use its Wearable electronic installation
results.abstract: The present invention is about a kind of pressing structure and the Wearable electronic installation using it, and pressing structure includes: actuated piece, and it has the first sliding part and the first accommodation space；Driven member, it is contained in this first accommodation space, and has contact part and the second sliding part on this driven member, and this second sliding part is corresponding with this first sliding part；First housing, it has the second accommodation space and opening, and this second accommodation space is in order to accommodate this actuated piece and this driven member；And elastic component, the first end of this elastic component connects with this actuated piece；Wherein, by this elastic component effect, this actuated piece can drive this driven member to move, so that driven member can stretch out in the opening of the first housing and protrudes from the bottom surface of the first housing or flush with bottom surface.Use the above-mentioned pressing structure of the present invention Wearable electronic installation, wherein, when contact part for sensing module, can by sense module stable be close to user, it is thus achieved that testing result accurately, improve detection module the degree of accuracy.
results.owner: 苏州佳世达电通有限公司

results.title: Improved Ring Wearable Touch Display Device
results.abstract: The invention discloses an improved ring-shaped wearable touch display device. A display module, a transparent protective case, a ring-shaped soft touch module are sequentially arranged from the bottom up, and the ring-shaped soft touch module is covered with a transparent case on the top. On the touch module, the ring-shaped flexible touch module can be sensed by touch to make the display module display. The present invention uses a ring-shaped flexible circuit board and a ring-shaped soft touch module with multiple sensing points on it to replace the conventional indium tin oxide as a touch-sensing interface, and can cooperate with user gestures and applications The software can be expanded into a wearable touch display device with higher specifications, and the manufacturing cost of the conventional indium tin oxide touch sensing layer can be saved. In addition, the transparent shell covering the ring-shaped soft touch module can be made 3D curved surface to conform to the exterior design of existing watches.
results.owner: 业成光电（深圳）有限公司

results.title: Wearable input device
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a wearable input device comprising a body, wherein the body is connected with a battery membrane to form a sleeving range and sheathed on the hand of a user by the battery membrane. The battery membrane is used for providing electric power for a track sensor and a wireless transmitter in the body to lead the track sensor to sense the moving of an object (such as fingers) on the body and then generate control signals corresponding to the moving position of the object, then the control signals are transmitted to a mainframe computer through the wireless transmitter so as to conduct the indicator operation of the picture of the operating system of the mainframe computer.
results.owner: 昆盈企业股份有限公司

results.title: Equipment for communication via the human body, customizable with accessories
results.abstract: The present invention relates to a portable electronic device (1) including a module (2) that performs communication via a human body. The module has a contact surface (3) that makes electrical contact with the wearer's skin. The portable electronic device includes a base (4, 14) including a module, means (5A, 5B) for attaching the electronic device to a part of the wearer's body so as to contact the skin, and a private accessory. (7) or means (6A, 6B) for attaching the watch case (8) to the electronic device. The portable electronic device comprises means (6A, 6B) for mounting a private accessory (7) or watch case (8), which is arranged on the base (4, 14) or the fastening means (5A, 5B) It is characterized by that.   [Selection] Figure 4
results.owner: ジェムアルト  エスアー

results.title: Wearable Socket
results.abstract: A wearable socket according to an embodiment of the present invention includes: a soft socket portion worn toward the skin near a cut portion; A sensing electrode protruding from the inner surface of the soft socket to sense the biosignal of the skin, and made of a conductive fiber; And a hard socket unit coupled to one side of the soft socket so as to overlap and cover the sensing electrode, and mounted with an artificial body module controlled according to a bio-signal detected by the sensing electrode.

results.title: Touch sensing module, touch display device and manufacturing method thereof
results.abstract: The present invention is a touch sensing module, a touch display device and a manufacturing method thereof, including a cover plate, a touch sensing module, a display module, an insulating layer, a first connecting layer and a second connecting layer. The insulating layer is arranged from the edge of the touch sensor module to the edge of the metal grid provided on the touch sensor module. The insulating layer cover the metal circuit, ground circuit and the edge of the metal grid provided by the touch sensor module. The first connecting layer is deposed between the cover plate and the touch sensing module. The second connecting layer is deposed between the touch sensing module and the display module. The insulating layer is provided with at least one hollow area where it overlaps the second connecting layer. The hollow area exposes part of the metal circuit. The second connection layer is filled in the hollow area. The metal circuit exposed in the hollow area first reacts with the foreign matter. Achieve the purpose of preventing foreign matter from reacting with the metal grid.
results.owner: 大陸商業成科技（成都）有限公司

results.title: DEVICE FOR FASTENING REPLACEABLE WEAR DETAIL
results.abstract: A device is disclosed for attaching a replaceable wear part (4) to be mounted on a guide edge (22) of a tool (1), in which a support surface (21) is formed on the guide edge (22) that is capable of receiving and attaching a latch (3) of a wear parts, or the retainer (3) of the wear part, or the wear part (4) forms a fastening protrusion (31), and the other part of the lock (3) of the wear part or the wear part (4) forms the corresponding socket (43), the fastening protrusion (31 ) and socket (43) are equipped with interacting guides (32, 431), guides (32) of the retainer (3) of the wear part are formed as guide surfaces (32a, 32c, 32e) facing the supporting surface (21) and inclined relative to the supporting surface (21), extending in the direction from the guide edge (22).

results.title: Data communication device
results.abstract: An object of the present invention is to provide a human body communication device with high communication quality.   In the present invention, in order to solve this problem, a communication electrode 15 is provided so as to be exposed from a main body case 21 at a bottom surface 21a. On the other hand, the ground electrode 16 is extended from the inside of the main body case 21 to the outside of the main body case 21. Then, the ground electrode 16 is disposed in a direction facing the surface 15 b in which the surface 15 a of the communication electrode 15 is extended to the outside of the main body case 21. Further, the portion extended to the outside of the main body case 21 has a surface 16a opposed to the surface 15b, and the surface 16a is covered with the insulator 22a. Thereby, when the data communication device 11 is attached to the human body of the wearer 1004, the insulator 22a can prevent the ground electrode 16 from directly touching the wearer 1004.   [Selected figure] Figure 1
results.owner: パナソニックＩｐマネジメント株式会社

results.title: Wearable ring-shaped electronic device, and methods of the ring-shaped electronic device
results.abstract: A method, performed by a wearable electronic ring-shaped device comprising a plurality of outer touch sensitive areas arranged on an outer face of the electronic ring-shaped device. The method comprises: • sensing a touch pattern of the electronic ring-shaped device with at least a first outer touch sensitive area of the plurality of touch sensitive areas; and • in response to sensing the touch pattern activating the electronic ring-shaped device to sense a gesture with one or more of the plurality of touch sensitive areas.

results.title: A kind of intelligent body-sensing input finger ring
results.abstract: The present invention discloses a kind of intelligent body-sensing input finger ring,Including receiver,Finger ring shell,Ring body,Charging device and intelligent apparatus,Described intelligent apparatus are built in finger ring shell,Finger ring shell is connected with ring body,Intelligent apparatus include control module,Switch module,Wireless module,Functional module and induction module,Control module includes intelligent chip,Control circuit module,Drive circuit module,Electric power detection module and battery,Charging device includes transmitter module and receiver module,Transmitter module is arranged in receiver,Receiver module is arranged in finger ring shell and is connected with intelligent apparatus,Intelligent chip connects control circuit module and drive circuit module respectively,Drive circuit module and battery are connected,Battery is connected with electric power detection module,Intelligent body-sensing input finger ring realizes that sliding finger in the air carries out the moving operation of different directions to device pointer using wireless module and induction module,The characteristics of with Nover practical.

results.title: Electronic installation and Wearable electronic installation
results.abstract: The present invention provides a kind of electronic installation and Wearable electronic installation, can ensure antenna performance in limited space, the Wearable electronic installation includes：Housing, wearing portion, circuit board and metal extension apparatus；The wearing portion couples the housing；The circuit board is arranged in the housing, and the circuit board has access area and antenna, and the antenna is arranged at the first side of the circuit board；The metal extension apparatus is arranged at the hull outside, and the metal extension apparatus couples the access area and wriggled back and forth along the second side of the circuit board.
results.owner: 苏州佳世达电通有限公司

results.title: Ring with an asymmetrical inner surface
results.abstract: A ring comprising: an inner surface; an outer surface; and a central axis; the inner surface and the outer surface are connected by an upper surface and a lower surface; the central axis is orthogonal to the ring; the inner surface comprises an inner top portion, inner narrow portion, and inner bottom portion; the inner top portion of the inner surface comprises an inner top circumference; the inner narrow portion of the inner surface comprises an inner narrow circumference; the inner bottom portion of the inner surface comprises an inner bottom circumference; the inner narrow circumference is less than both the inner top circumference and the inner bottom circumference; and the inner surface is configured to matingly engage with a finger of a user such that when the ring is placed on the finger it is held substantially in place and is substantially prevented from being accidentally removed from the finger.

results.title: A metal ring for fingerprint identification sensor and its preparation method and application
results.abstract: The invention is applicable to the field of sensors, and provides a metal ring for a fingerprint identification sensor, a preparation method and application thereof.
