The metal ring for the fingerprint identification sensor, the metal ring includes a metal ring base, the metal ring base includes a bottom and a top formed by protruding from the inner circumference of the bottom, the top includes a first surface and is connected to the first surface. A first outer wall surface connected to one surface, the bottom includes a second surface connected to the first outer wall surface, a conductive layer is deposited on the surface of the metal ring base, and on the first surface, the first outer wall surface, An insulating layer is arranged on the conductive layer of the second surface. The preparation method of the metal ring for the fingerprint identification sensor includes the following steps: providing a metal ring base; electroplating a conductive layer on the surface of the metal ring base; plating the first surface and the first outer wall surface with the conductive layer , The second surface is electroplated with an insulating layer.
results.owner: 深圳指芯智能科技有限公司

results.title: A fingerprint identification module and a bonding device for metal rings of the fingerprint identification module
results.abstract: The utility model relates to a fingerprint recognition module and a bonding device for the metal ring of the fingerprint recognition module, comprising a metal ring, a circuit module and a connection layer, the circuit module including a fingerprint recognition chip and a flexible circuit board, and the fingerprint recognition chip is welded on On the upper surface of the flexible circuit board, the connection layer includes a conductive material and an adhesive, the adhesive surrounds the conductive material, the conductive material conducts the metal ring and the flexible circuit board, and the adhesive bonds the metal ring and the flexible circuit board The flexible circuit board is bonded to the metal ring by adhesive, and the conductive area is surrounded by the adhesive bonding area, so that the conductive area can be hidden and the conductive area is protected by the adhesive. Reduces the risk of oxidative open circuits. At the same time, the thickness of the adhesive is highly controllable, which can improve the thickness consistency of the product, and the structure is simple, so it is worth promoting.
results.owner: 江西合力泰科技有限公司

results.title: External expansion devices and wearable devices
results.abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of wearable devices, and provides an external expansion device, which includes a body that can be bent to be worn. The body has a charging part for supplying power to the main body of the wearable device and is used for fixing and positioning the wearable device. The locking part of the belt has two positioning holes for the belt to pass through, and the two positioning holes are arranged on the body at intervals and both pass through the upper and lower surfaces of the body. A wearable device is also provided, including a main body, a wearable belt and the above-mentioned external expansion device, and the belt is arranged on the main body. The utility model adopts an attachment design, does not need to change the shape of the existing wearable device, and will not affect the use of various functional modules of the existing wearable device; the charging part provides electric energy for the existing wearable device, which improves the performance of the wearable device. Its battery life; through the locking part, the wearable device can be fixed and positioned on the device, so that the two are integrated, and the existing wearing method will not be changed.
results.owner: 深圳柔电技术有限公司

results.title: Touchpad Module and Electronics
results.abstract: The invention relates to a touch panel module and an electronic device, wherein the touch panel module is used for assembling on the casing of the electronic device. The casing has a touch area. The touch panel module includes at least one elastic arm, a metal layer, a circuit board and a touch panel. The elastic arm is located in the touch area and integrally formed with the casing. The metal layer is disposed on the casing and outside the touch area. The circuit board is assembled in the touch area of the casing. The touchpad is assembled on the circuit board. The touch panel has at least one key area, and the key area is substantially located above the elastic arm. The invention can effectively reduce the additional materials and production time required in the production process, thereby reducing the production cost of the touch panel module and the electronic device.

results.title: A fingerprint sensor structure without metal ring with internal motor
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a fingerprint sensor structure without a metal ring with an internal motor, which is composed of a fingerprint identification sensor, a circuit board and a socket connector. The top of the fingerprint identification sensor is a fingerprint identification area, and the bottom of the fingerprint identification sensor is a fingerprint identification area. It is fixedly connected with the top of the circuit board, the bottom end of the circuit board is fixedly installed with a vibration motor, the middle position of the bottom of the circuit board is provided with a fingerprint recognition circuit, and the other end of the bottom of the circuit board is electrically connected to the socket connector through a wire. sexual connection. The utility model adopts a passive design scheme, which does not require a metal ring to trigger, which prevents the possibility of the active metal ring being shaken off from the root; the structural design of the vibration motor increases the vibration touch feeling and has more comfortable operation feedback; The overall practicability of the fingerprint module is greatly increased, the application reliability is correspondingly improved, the intelligent feedback is more intuitive, and the appearance is also improved.
results.owner: 图正(无锡)研究院有限公司

results.title: Electronic device comprising heat dissipation structure
results.abstract: A wearable electronic device according to one embodiment of the present invention comprises: a housing; a first printed circuit board (PCB); a second PCB disposed parallel to the first PCB; a first interposer; and a second interposer. The housing may include at least one first opening in a first portion. The first interposer and the second interposer are disposed between the first PCB and the second PCB. The first interposer and the second interposer are disposed such that a first end of the first interposer and a second end of the second interposer facing the first end are spaced apart from each other by at least a predetermined distance. A first space between the first end and the second end may be connected to the at least one first opening of the housing. Various other embodiments may be possible.

results.title: A kind of wearable electronic equipment
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of wearable electronic equipment, including housing, pcb board is provided with the housing, function button is equipped with the pcb board, the housing upper end is provided with plastic cement upper casing, and the plastic cement upper casing top is provided with metal upper shell, and the function button is arranged on the plastic cement upper casing lower section, pressing operation to the function button is realized by the position for pressing the metal upper shell corresponding function button, the metal upper shell can elasticity recovery after pressing.In the utility model, upper surface is using the metal shell with elastic deformation function, wherein mechanical function button is arranged on metal shell lower section, so product external surfaces are very succinct, metal shell is not easy to deformation after long-time use；Key activities space is also reserved in wearable electronic equipment, the pressing of button becomes allelopathic clearly, improves operating accuracy.

results.title: An integrated circuit board for fingerprint lock
results.abstract: The utility model discloses an integrated circuit board for a fingerprint lock, which comprises a main body and a fingerprint identification area, corner irons are fixed on both sides of the main body, and a groove is arranged on the right side of the corner iron. The inside of the main body is provided with screw holes, the fingerprint identification area is disposed above the main body, and the inside of the fingerprint identification area is provided with a card slot, the inside of the card slot is installed with a copper needle, and a base is installed below the copper needle. The integrated circuit board for fingerprint lock is provided with corner irons and grooves, through the corner irons arranged on both sides of the main body and the grooves arranged on one side of the corner irons, so that the main body can pass through the corner irons and the grooves. The groove and the inside of the fingerprint lock are installed and fixed, and the height of the corner iron can reserve a vacuum position above the main body, so that the circuit board has a protective function, avoiding the internal installation of the main body and the fingerprint lock and making the parts above the main body vulnerable. Squeeze, causing damage to the circuit board and increasing the purchase cost of repairs.
results.owner: 深圳市汇芯线路科技有限公司

results.title: Wearable host device with heat dissipation structure
results.abstract: The present invention provides a wearable host device having a heat dissipation structure, comprising: a body and at least one heat conduction element. The main body includes a front portion and a rear portion. An accommodating space is located between the front portion and the rear portion. A circuit board and a battery are disposed in the accommodating space, and the circuit board has a first side. The front portion and the second side have the at least one heat source for the back portion and any one or both sides of the first side and the second side. The heat conducting component is disposed in the accommodating space and is located on either or both sides of the first side and the second side of the circuit board and contacts the heat source.

results.title: Fingerprint recognition sensor package
results.abstract: The fingerprint recognition sensor package according to the technical idea of the present invention includes a printed circuit board having an opening in the center and including a bonding pad on an upper surface, a sensor unit disposed in the opening and including a sensor unit for fingerprint recognition and an upper electrode pad on the upper surface A sensor chip, a bonding wire connecting the bonding pad and the upper electrode pad, and a molding member formed around the fingerprint recognition sensor chip covering the bonding pad, the upper electrode pad, and the bonding wire, and a lower surface of the printed circuit board, The lower surface of the fingerprint recognition sensor chip and the lower surface of the molding member are coplanar, the sensor unit is opened from the molding member, and the surface on which the sensor unit is located in the fingerprint recognition sensor chip and the surface to which the bonding wire is attached are identical to each other. do.

results.title: Dustproof and waterproof fingerprint recognition module
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of dustproof and waterproof fingerprint recognition module, and cover board and fingerprint chip are installed in the through-hole of basic ring；The circuit board is located at the underface of fingerprint chip and basic ring, this basic ring lateral surface bottom is provided with a groove, one sealing ring is embedded in groove and between hand-set lid and basic ring, and the lower surface of the circuit board is fitted with a metal strengthening piece, this metal strengthening on piece is provided with one and walks line three-way hole；Annulus silica gel ring inner end is bonded by the first glue layer with metal strengthening under piece surface edge zone and is connected, the annulus silica gel ring outboard end is bonded by the second glue layer with circuit board bottom outside face and is connected, and a FPC soft arranging wires run through to walk the bottom that line three-way hole is connected to the circuit board.Interior of mobile phone is isolated from the outside by the utility model, can effective water proof and dust proof, there is when pressing cushioning effect, make handfeel of keys more preferably.
results.owner: 江苏凯尔生物识别科技有限公司

results.title: Fingerprint sensing apparatus and terminal device
results.abstract: A fingerprint sensing apparatus and a terminal device. The fingerprint sensing apparatus comprises a fingerprint identification chip (10), a printed circuit board (20) and a metal outer ring (30). The fingerprint identification chip (10) is provided with a capacitive button channel pin (11). The printed circuit board (20) is provided with a welding pad area (C). The welding pad area (C) is electrically connected to the capacitive button channel pin (11).
results.owner: 深圳市汇顶科技股份有限公司

results.title: Conductive connector of intelligent wearable product and intelligent wearable equipment
results.abstract: The utility model discloses a product's conductive joint and intelligent wearing equipment are dressed to intelligence. The conducting terminal is fixedly arranged on a wearable product base body, the conducting terminal is electrically connected with a functional component of the intelligent wearable product and at least used for enabling the functional component to be electrically connected with a power supply and/or a control component of the intelligent wearable product, wherein the conducting terminal comprises an insulating shell and a splicing plug packaged inside the insulating shell or between the insulating shell and the wearable product base body, and the splicing plug is electrically connected with the functional component through a pin connector. The utility model provides a splicing plug in intelligent wearable equipment, which adopts a contact pin joint connection mode to be electrically connected with functional components such as a heating plate, and then is packaged by an insulating shell, and is aligned, fixed and glued in the insulating shell; the flexible electrodes of functional components such as the heating plate only need to expose the contact pin joint to be used for being connected with the splicing plug, and other wires are not needed.
results.owner: 苏州捷迪纳米科技有限公司

results.title: Configurable packaged sensor module and method of manufacturing the same
results.abstract: A fingerprint sensor module includes a fingerprint sensor assembly having a circuit element attached thereto. The fingerprint sensor assembly is electrically connected to a Printed Circuit Board (PCB) substrate having a cutout to receive a circuit component. The entire fingerprint sensor assembly and at least a portion of the PCB are encapsulated in an encapsulating material to produce a structurally robust fingerprint sensor module suitable for integration into an electronic device, such as a smartphone or other internet of things (IOT) electronic device.
results.owner: 傲迪司威生物识别公司

results.title: Wearable device button and its circuit
results.abstract: The invention discloses a button of a wearable device and a circuit thereof, wherein the button of the wearable device includes a magnetic block, a Hall element and an operating rod; The microprocessor controller circuit of the type equipment is connected; the magnetic block is slidably set and fixed on one end of the operating rod. The button of the wearable device and its circuit provided by the present invention can realize multiple functions, and will save more design space for the small-sized wearable device, and is convenient for users to use.
results.owner: 上海华勤通讯技术有限公司
